verses.en: Lord, by thy favour thou hast made my mountain to stand strong: thou didst hide thy face, and I was troubled.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، بِرِضَاكَ ثَبَّتَّ لِجَبَلِي عِزًّا. حَجَبْتَ وَجْهَكَ فَصِرْتُ مُرْتَاعًا.

verses.en: I cried to thee, O Lord; and unto the Lord I made supplication.
verses.ar: إِلَيْكَ يَارَبُّ أَصْرُخُ، وإِلَى ٱلسَّيِّدِ أَتَضَرَّعُ

verses.en: What profit is there in my blood, when I go down to the pit? Shall the dust praise thee? shall it declare thy truth?
verses.ar: مَا ٱلْفَائِدَةُ مِنْ دَمِي إِذَا نَزَلْتُ إِلَى ٱلْحُفْرَةِ؟ هَلْ يَحْمَدُكَ ٱلتُّرَابُ؟ هَلْ يُخْبِرُ بِحَقِّكَ؟

verses.en: Hear, O Lord, and have mercy upon me: Lord, be thou my helper.
verses.ar: ٱسْتَمِعْ يَارَبُّ وَٱرْحَمْنِي. يَارَبُّ، كُنْ مُعِينًا لِي.

verses.en: Thou hast turned for me my mourning into dancing: thou hast put off my sackcloth, and girded me with gladness;
verses.ar: حَوَّلْتَ نَوْحِي إِلَى رَقْصٍ لِي. حَلَلْتَ مِسْحِي وَمَنْطَقْتَنِي فَرَحًا،

verses.en: To the end that my glory may sing praise to thee, and not be silent. O Lord my God, I will give thanks unto thee for ever.
verses.ar: لِكَيْ تَتَرَنَّمَ لَكَ رُوحِي وَلَا تَسْكُتَ. يَارَبُّ إِلَهِي، إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ أَحْمَدُكَ.

verses.en: In thee, O Lord, do I put my trust; let me never be ashamed: deliver me in thy righteousness.
verses.ar: عَلَيْكَ يَارَبُّ تَوَكَّلْتُ. لَا تَدَعْنِي أَخْزَى مَدَى ٱلدَّهْرِ. بِعَدْلِكَ نَجِّنِي.

verses.en: Bow down thine ear to me; deliver me speedily: be thou my strong rock, for an house of defence to save me.
verses.ar: أَمِلْ إِلَيَّ أُذُنَكَ. سَرِيعًا أَنْقِذْنِي. كُنْ لِي صَخْرَةَ حِصْنٍ، بَيْتَ مَلْجَإٍ لِتَخْلِيصِي.

verses.en: For thou art my rock and my fortress; therefore for thy name’s sake lead me, and guide me.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ صَخْرَتِي وَمَعْقِلِي أَنْتَ. مِنْ أَجْلِ ٱسْمِكَ تَهْدِينِي وَتَقُودُنِي.

verses.en: Pull me out of the net that they have laid privily for me: for thou art my strength.
verses.ar: أَخْرِجْنِي مِنَ ٱلشَّبَكَةِ ٱلَّتِي خَبَّأُوهَا لِي، لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ حِصْنِي.

verses.en: Into thine hand I commit my spirit: thou hast redeemed me, O Lord God of truth.
verses.ar: فِي يَدِكَ أَسْتَوْدِعُ رُوحِي. فَدَيْتَنِي يَارَبُّ إِلَهَ ٱلْحَقِّ.

verses.en: I have hated them that regard lying vanities: but I trust in the Lord.
verses.ar: أَبْغَضْتُ ٱلَّذِينَ يُرَاعُونَ أَبَاطِيلَ كَاذِبَةً. أَمَّا أَنَا فَعَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ تَوَكَّلْتُ.

verses.en: I will be glad and rejoice in thy mercy: for thou hast considered my trouble; thou hast known my soul in adversities;
verses.ar: أَبْتَهِجُ وَأَفْرَحُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ، لِأَنَّكَ نَظَرْتَ إِلَى مَذَلَّتِي، وَعَرَفْتَ فِي ٱلشَّدَائِدِ نَفْسِي،

verses.en: And hast not shut me up into the hand of the enemy: thou hast set my feet in a large room.
verses.ar: وَلَمْ تَحْبِسْنِي فِي يَدِ ٱلْعَدُوِّ، بَلْ أَقَمْتَ فِي ٱلرُّحْبِ رِجْلِي.

verses.en: Have mercy upon me, O Lord, for I am in trouble: mine eye is consumed with grief, yea, my soul and my belly.
verses.ar: اِرْحَمْنِي يَارَبُّ لِأَنِّي فِي ضِيْقٍ. خَسَفَتْ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ عَيْنِي. نَفْسِي وَبَطْنِي.

verses.en: For my life is spent with grief, and my years with sighing: my strength faileth because of mine iniquity, and my bones are consumed.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ حَيَاتِي قَدْ فَنِيَتْ بِٱلْحُزْنِ، وَسِنِينِي بِٱلتَّنَهُّدِ. ضَعُفَتْ بِشَقَاوَتِي قُوَّتِي، وَبَلِيَتْ عِظَامِي.

verses.en: I was a reproach among all mine enemies, but especially among my neighbours, and a fear to mine acquaintance: they that did see me without fled from me.
verses.ar: عِنْدَ كُلِّ أَعْدَائِي صِرْتُ عَارًا، وَعِنْدَ جِيرَانِي بِٱلْكُلِّيَّةِ، وَرُعْبًا لِمَعَارِفِي. ٱلَّذِينَ رَأَوْنِي خَارِجًا هَرَبُوا عَنِّي.

verses.en: I am forgotten as a dead man out of mind: I am like a broken vessel.
verses.ar: نُسِيتُ مِنَ ٱلْقَلْبِ مِثْلَ ٱلْمَيْتِ. صِرْتُ مِثْلَ إِنَاءٍ مُتْلَفٍ.

verses.en: For I have heard the slander of many: fear was on every side: while they took counsel together against me, they devised to take away my life.
verses.ar: لِأَنِّي سَمِعْتُ مَذَمَّةً مِنْ كَثِيرِينَ. ٱلْخَوْفُ مُسْتَدِيرٌ بِي بِمُؤَامَرَتِهِمْ مَعًا عَلَيَّ. تَفَكَّرُوا فِي أَخْذِ نَفْسِي.

verses.en: But I trusted in thee, O Lord: I said, Thou art my God.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنَا فَعَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ يَارَبُّ. قُلْتُ: «إِلَهِي أَنْتَ».

verses.en: My times are in thy hand: deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.
verses.ar: فِي يَدِكَ آجَالِي. نَجِّنِي مِنْ يَدِ أَعْدَائِي وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ يَطْرُدُونَنِي.

verses.en: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant: save me for thy mercies’ sake.
verses.ar: أَضِئْ بِوَجْهِكَ عَلَى عَبْدِكَ. خَلِّصْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ.

verses.en: Let me not be ashamed, O Lord; for I have called upon thee: let the wicked be ashamed, and let them be silent in the grave.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، لَا تَدَعْنِي أَخْزَى لِأَنِّي دَعَوْتُكَ. لِيَخْزَ ٱلْأَشْرَارُ. لِيَسْكُتُوا فِي ٱلْهَاوِيَةِ.

verses.en: Let the lying lips be put to silence; which speak grievous things proudly and contemptuously against the righteous.
verses.ar: لِتُبْكَمْ شِفَاهُ ٱلْكَذِبِ، ٱلْمُتَكَلِّمَةُ عَلَى ٱلصِّدِّيقِ بِوَقَاحَةٍ، بِكِبْرِيَاءَ وَٱسْتِهَانَةٍ.

verses.en: Oh how great is thy goodness, which thou hast laid up for them that fear thee; which thou hast wrought for them that trust in thee before the sons of men!
verses.ar: مَا أَعْظَمَ جُودَكَ ٱلَّذِي ذَخَرْتَهُ لِخَائِفِيكَ، وَفَعَلْتَهُ لِلْمُتَّكِلِينَ عَلَيْكَ تُجَاهَ بَنِي ٱلْبَشَرِ!

verses.en: Thou shalt hide them in the secret of thy presence from the pride of man: thou shalt keep them secretly in a pavilion from the strife of tongues.
verses.ar: تَسْتُرُهُمْ بِسِتْرِ وَجْهِكَ مِنْ مَكَايِدِ ٱلنَّاسِ. تُخْفِيهِمْ فِي مَظَلَّةٍ مِنْ مُخَاصَمَةِ ٱلْأَلْسُنِ

verses.en: Blessed be the Lord: for he hath shewed me his marvellous kindness in a strong city.
verses.ar: مُبَارَكٌ ٱلرَّبُّ، لِأَنَّهُ قَدْ جَعَلَ عَجَبًا رَحْمَتَهُ لِي فِي مَدِينَةٍ مُحَصَّنَةٍ.

verses.en: For I said in my haste, I am cut off from before thine eyes: nevertheless thou heardest the voice of my supplications when I cried unto thee.
verses.ar: وَأَنَا قُلْتُ فِي حَيْرَتِي: «إِنِّي قَدِ ٱنْقَطَعْتُ مِنْ قُدَّامِ عَيْنَيْكَ». وَلَكِنَّكَ سَمِعْتَ صَوْتَ تَضَرُّعِي إِذْ صَرَخْتُ إِلَيْكَ.

verses.en: O love the Lord, all ye his saints: for the Lord preserveth the faithful, and plentifully rewardeth the proud doer.
verses.ar: أَحِبُّوا ٱلرَّبَّ يَا جَمِيعَ أَتْقِيَائِهِ. ٱلرَّبُّ حَافِظُ ٱلْأَمَانَةِ، وَمُجَازٍ بِكِثْرَةٍ ٱلْعَامِلَ بِٱلْكِبْرِيَاءِ.

verses.en: Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the Lord.
verses.ar: لِتَتَشَدَّدْ وَلْتَتَشَجَّعْ قُلُوبُكُمْ، يَا جَمِيعَ ٱلْمُنْتَظِرِينَ ٱلرَّبَّ.

verses.en: Blessed is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is covered.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِلَّذِي غُفِرَ إِثْمُهُ وَسُتِرَتْ خَطِيَّتُهُ.

verses.en: Blessed is the man unto whom the Lord imputeth not iniquity, and in whose spirit there is no guile.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِرَجُلٍ لَا يَحْسِبُ لَهُ ٱلرَّبُّ خَطِيَّةً، وَلَا فِي رُوحِهِ غِشٌّ.

verses.en: When I kept silence, my bones waxed old through my roaring all the day long.
verses.ar: لَمَّا سَكَتُّ بَلِيَتْ عِظَامِي مِنْ زَفِيرِي ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ،

verses.en: For day and night thy hand was heavy upon me: my moisture is turned into the drought of summer. Selah.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ يَدَكَ ثَقُلَتْ عَلَيَّ نَهَارًا وَلَيْلًا. تَحَوَّلَتْ رُطُوبَتِي إِلَى يُبُوسَةِ ٱلْقَيْظِ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: I acknowledged my sin unto thee, and mine iniquity have I not hid. I said, I will confess my transgressions unto the Lord; and thou forgavest the iniquity of my sin. Selah.
verses.ar: أَعْتَرِفُ لَكَ بِخَطِيَّتِي وَلَا أَكْتُمُ إِثْمِي. قُلْتُ: «أَعْتَرِفُ لِلرَّبِّ بِذَنْبِي» وَأَنْتَ رَفَعْتَ أَثَامَ خَطِيَّتِي. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: For this shall every one that is godly pray unto thee in a time when thou mayest be found: surely in the floods of great waters they shall not come nigh unto him.
verses.ar: لِهَذَا يُصَلِّي لَكَ كُلُّ تَقِيٍّ فِي وَقْتٍ يَجِدُكَ فِيهِ. عِنْدَ غَمَارَةِ ٱلْمِيَاهِ ٱلْكَثِيرَةِ إِيَّاهُ لَا تُصِيبُ.

verses.en: Thou art my hiding place; thou shalt preserve me from trouble; thou shalt compass me about with songs of deliverance. Selah.
verses.ar: أَنْتَ سِتْرٌ لِي. مِنَ ٱلضِّيقِ تَحْفَظُنِي. بِتَرَنُّمِ ٱلنَّجَاةِ تَكْتَنِفُنِي. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye.
verses.ar: «أُعَلِّمُكَ وَأُرْشِدُكَ ٱلطَّرِيقَ ٱلَّتِي تَسْلُكُهَا. أَنْصَحُكَ. عَيْنِي عَلَيْكَ.

verses.en: Be ye not as the horse, or as the mule, which have no understanding: whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, lest they come near unto thee.
verses.ar: لَا تَكُونُوا كَفَرَسٍ أَوْ بَغْلٍ بِلَا فَهْمٍ. بِلِجَامٍ وَزِمَامٍ زِينَتِهِ يُكَمُّ لِئَلَّا يَدْنُوَ إِلَيْكَ».

verses.en: Many sorrows shall be to the wicked: but he that trusteth in the Lord, mercy shall compass him about.
verses.ar: كَثِيرَةٌ هِيَ نَكَبَاتُ ٱلشِّرِّيرِ، أَمَّا ٱلْمُتَوَكِّلُ عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ فَٱلرَّحْمَةُ تُحِيطُ بِهِ.

verses.en: Be glad in the Lord, and rejoice, ye righteous: and shout for joy, all ye that are upright in heart.
verses.ar: ٱفْرَحُوا بِٱلرَّبِّ وَٱبْتَهِجُوا يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ، وَٱهْتِفُوا يَا جَمِيعَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِي ٱلْقُلُوبِ.

verses.en: Rejoice in the Lord, O ye righteous: for praise is comely for the upright.
verses.ar: اِهْتِفُوا أَيُّهَا ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ بِٱلرَّبِّ. بِٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِينَ يَلِيقُ ٱلتَّسْبِيحُ.

verses.en: Praise the Lord with harp: sing unto him with the psaltery and an instrument of ten strings.
verses.ar: ٱحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ بِٱلْعُودِ. بِرَبَابَةٍ ذَاتِ عَشَرَةِ أَوْتَارٍ رَنِّمُوا لَهُ.

verses.en: Sing unto him a new song; play skilfully with a loud noise.
verses.ar: غَنُّوا لَهُ أُغْنِيَةً جَدِيدَةً. أَحْسِنُوا ٱلْعَزْفَ بِهُتَافٍ.

verses.en: For the word of the Lord is right; and all his works are done in truth.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ كَلِمَةَ ٱلرَّبِّ مُسْتَقِيمَةٌ، وَكُلَّ صُنْعِهِ بِٱلْأَمَانَةِ.

verses.en: He loveth righteousness and judgment: the earth is full of the goodness of the Lord.
verses.ar: يُحِبُّ ٱلْبِرَّ وَٱلْعَدْلَ. ٱمْتَلَأَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْ رَحْمَةِ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: By the word of the Lord were the heavens made; and all the host of them by the breath of his mouth.
verses.ar: بِكَلِمَةِ ٱلرَّبِّ صُنِعَتِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتُ، وَبِنَسَمَةِ فِيهِ كُلُّ جُنُودِهَا.

verses.en: He gathereth the waters of the sea together as an heap: he layeth up the depth in storehouses.
verses.ar: يَجْمَعُ كَنَدٍّ أَمْوَاهَ ٱلْيَمِّ. يَجْعَلُ ٱللُّجَجَ فِي أَهْرَاءٍ.

verses.en: Let all the earth fear the Lord: let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him.
verses.ar: لِتَخْشَ ٱلرَّبَّ كُلُّ ٱلْأَرْضِ، وَمِنْهُ لِيَخَفْ كُلُّ سُكَّانِ ٱلْمَسْكُونَةِ.

verses.en: For he spake, and it was done; he commanded, and it stood fast.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ قَالَ فَكَانَ. هُوَ أَمَرَ فَصَارَ.

verses.en: The Lord bringeth the counsel of the heathen to nought: he maketh the devices of the people of none effect.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ أَبْطَلَ مُؤَامَرَةَ ٱلْأُمَمِ. لَاشَى أَفْكَارَ ٱلشُّعُوبِ.

verses.en: The counsel of the Lord standeth for ever, the thoughts of his heart to all generations.
verses.ar: أَمَّا مُؤَامَرَةُ ٱلرَّبِّ فَإِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ تَثْبُتُ. أَفْكَارُ قَلْبِهِ إِلَى دَوْرٍ فَدَوْرٍ.

verses.en: Blessed is the nation whose God is the Lord; and the people whom he hath chosen for his own inheritance.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِلْأُمَّةِ ٱلَّتِي ٱلرَّبُّ إِلَهُهَا، ٱلشَّعْبِ ٱلَّذِي ٱخْتَارَهُ مِيرَاثًا لِنَفْسِهِ.

verses.en: The Lord looketh from heaven; he beholdeth all the sons of men.
verses.ar: مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ نَظَرَ ٱلرَّبُّ. رَأَى جَمِيعَ بَنِي ٱلْبَشَرِ.

verses.en: From the place of his habitation he looketh upon all the inhabitants of the earth.
verses.ar: مِنْ مَكَانِ سُكْنَاهُ تَطَلَّعَ إِلَى جَمِيعِ سُكَّانِ ٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: He fashioneth their hearts alike; he considereth all their works.
verses.ar: ٱلْمُصَوِّرُ قُلُوبَهُمْ جَمِيعًا، ٱلْمُنْتَبِهُ إِلَى كُلِّ أَعْمَالِهِمْ.

verses.en: There is no king saved by the multitude of an host: a mighty man is not delivered by much strength.
verses.ar: لَنْ يَخْلُصَ ٱلْمَلِكُ بِكِثْرَةِ ٱلْجَيْشِ. ٱلْجَبَّارُ لَا يُنْقَذُ بِعِظَمِ ٱلْقُوَّةِ.

verses.en: An horse is a vain thing for safety: neither shall he deliver any by his great strength.
verses.ar: بَاطِلٌ هُوَ ٱلْفَرَسُ لِأَجْلِ ٱلْخَلَاصِ، وَبِشِدَّةِ قُوَّتِهِ لَا يُنَجِّي.

verses.en: Behold, the eye of the Lord is upon them that fear him, upon them that hope in his mercy;
verses.ar: هُوَذَا عَيْنُ ٱلرَّبِّ عَلَى خَائِفِيهِ ٱلرَّاجِينَ رَحْمَتَهُ،

verses.en: To deliver their soul from death, and to keep them alive in famine.
verses.ar: لِيُنَجِّيَ مِنَ ٱلْمَوْتِ أَنْفُسَهُمْ، وَلِيَسْتَحْيِيَهُمْ فِي ٱلْجُوعِ.

verses.en: Our soul waiteth for the Lord: he is our help and our shield.
verses.ar: أَنْفُسُنَا ٱنْتَظَرَتِ ٱلرَّبَّ. مَعُونَتُنَا وَتُرْسُنَا هُوَ.

verses.en: For our heart shall rejoice in him, because we have trusted in his holy name.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ بِهِ تَفْرَحُ قُلُوبُنَا، لِأَنَّنَا عَلَى ٱسْمِهِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ ٱتَّكَلْنَا.

verses.en: Let thy mercy, O Lord, be upon us, according as we hope in thee.
verses.ar: لِتَكُنْ يَارَبُّ رَحْمَتُكَ عَلَيْنَا حَسْبَمَا ٱنْتَظَرْنَاكَ.

verses.en: I will bless the Lord at all times: his praise shall continually be in my mouth.
verses.ar: أُبَارِكُ ٱلرَّبَّ فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ. دَائِمًا تَسْبِيحُهُ فِي فَمِي.

verses.en: My soul shall make her boast in the Lord: the humble shall hear thereof, and be glad.
verses.ar: بِٱلرَّبِّ تَفْتَخِرُ نَفْسِي. يَسْمَعُ ٱلْوُدَعَاءُ فَيَفْرَحُونَ.

verses.en: O magnify the Lord with me, and let us exalt his name together.
verses.ar: عَظِّمُوا ٱلرَّبَّ مَعِي، وَلْنُعَلِّ ٱسْمَهُ مَعًا.

verses.en: I sought the Lord, and he heard me, and delivered me from all my fears.
verses.ar: طَلَبْتُ إِلَى ٱلرَّبِّ فَٱسْتَجَابَ لِي، وَمِنْ كُلِّ مَخَاوِفِي أَنْقَذَنِي.

verses.en: They looked unto him, and were lightened: and their faces were not ashamed.
verses.ar: نَظَرُوا إِلَيْهِ وَٱسْتَنَارُوا، وَوُجُوهُهُمْ لَمْ تَخْجَلْ.

verses.en: This poor man cried, and the Lord heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.
verses.ar: هَذَا ٱلْمِسْكِينُ صَرَخَ، وَٱلرَّبُّ ٱسْتَمَعَهُ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ ضِيقَاتِهِ خَلَّصَهُ.

verses.en: The angel of the Lord encampeth round about them that fear him, and delivereth them.
verses.ar: مَلَاكُ ٱلرَّبِّ حَالٌّ حَوْلَ خَائِفِيهِ، وَيُنَجِّيهِمْ.

verses.en: O taste and see that the Lord is good: blessed is the man that trusteth in him.
verses.ar: ذُوقُوا وَٱنْظُرُوا مَا أَطْيَبَ ٱلرَّبَّ! طُوبَى لِلرَّجُلِ ٱلْمُتَوَكِّلِ عَلَيْهِ.

verses.en: O fear the Lord, ye his saints: for there is no want to them that fear him.
verses.ar: ٱتَّقُوا ٱلرَّبَّ يَا قِدِّيسِيهِ، لِأَنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَوَزٌ لِمُتَّقِيهِ.

verses.en: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger: but they that seek the Lord shall not want any good thing.
verses.ar: ٱلْأَشْبَالُ ٱحْتَاجَتْ وَجَاعَتْ، وَأَمَّا طَالِبُو ٱلرَّبِّ فَلَا يُعْوِزُهُمْ شَيْءٌ مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ.

verses.en: Come, ye children, hearken unto me: I will teach you the fear of the Lord.
verses.ar: هَلُمَّ أَيُّهَا ٱلْبَنُونَ ٱسْتَمِعُوا إِلَيَّ فَأُعَلِّمَكُمْ مَخَافَةَ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: What man is he that desireth life, and loveth many days, that he may see good?
verses.ar: مَنْ هُوَ ٱلْإِنْسَانُ ٱلَّذِي يَهْوَى ٱلْحَيَاةَ، وَيُحِبُّ كَثْرَةَ ٱلْأَيَّامِ لِيَرَى خَيْرًا؟

verses.en: Keep thy tongue from evil, and thy lips from speaking guile.
verses.ar: صُنْ لِسَانَكَ عَنِ ٱلشَّرِّ، وَشَفَتَيْكَ عَنِ ٱلتَّكَلُّمِ بِٱلْغِشِّ.

verses.en: Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.
verses.ar: حِدْ عَنِ ٱلشَّرِّ، وَٱصْنَعِ ٱلْخَيْرَ. ٱطْلُبِ ٱلسَّلَامَةَ، وَٱسْعَ وَرَاءَهَا.

verses.en: The eyes of the Lord are upon the righteous, and his ears are open unto their cry.
verses.ar: عَيْنَا ٱلرَّبِّ نَحْوَ ٱلصِّدِّيقِينَ، وَأُذُنَاهُ إِلَى صُرَاخِهِمْ.

verses.en: The face of the Lord is against them that do evil, to cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.
verses.ar: وَجْهُ ٱلرَّبِّ ضِدُّ عَامِلِي ٱلشَّرِّ لِيَقْطَعَ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ذِكْرَهُمْ.

verses.en: The righteous cry, and the Lord heareth, and delivereth them out of all their troubles.
verses.ar: أُولَئِكَ صَرَخُوا، وَٱلرَّبُّ سَمِعَ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ شَدَائِدِهِمْ أَنْقَذَهُمْ.

verses.en: The Lord is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit.
verses.ar: قَرِيبٌ هُوَ ٱلرَّبُّ مِنَ ٱلْمُنْكَسِرِي ٱلْقُلُوبِ، وَيُخَلِّصُ ٱلْمُنْسَحِقِي ٱلرُّوحِ.

verses.en: Many are the afflictions of the righteous: but the Lord delivereth him out of them all.
verses.ar: كَثِيرَةٌ هِيَ بَلَايَا ٱلصِّدِّيقِ، وَمِنْ جَمِيعِهَا يُنَجِّيهِ ٱلرَّبُّ.

verses.en: He keepeth all his bones: not one of them is broken.
verses.ar: يَحْفَظُ جَمِيعَ عِظَامِهِ. وَاحِدٌ مِنْهَا لَا يَنْكَسِرُ.

verses.en: Evil shall slay the wicked: and they that hate the righteous shall be desolate.
verses.ar: ٱلشَّرُّ يُمِيتُ ٱلشِّرِّيرَ، وَمُبْغِضُو ٱلصِّدِّيقِ يُعَاقَبُونَ.

verses.en: The Lord redeemeth the soul of his servants: and none of them that trust in him shall be desolate.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ فَادِي نُفُوسِ عَبِيدِهِ، وَكُلُّ مَنِ ٱتَّكَلَ عَلَيْهِ لَا يُعَاقَبُ.

verses.en: Plead my cause, O Lord, with them that strive with me: fight against them that fight against me.
verses.ar: خَاصِمْ يَارَبُّ مُخَاصِمِيَّ. قَاتِلْ مُقَاتِلِيَّ.

verses.en: Take hold of shield and buckler, and stand up for mine help.
verses.ar: أَمْسِكْ مِجَنًّا وَتُرْسًا وَٱنْهَضْ إِلَى مَعُونَتِي،

verses.en: Draw out also the spear, and stop the way against them that persecute me: say unto my soul, I am thy salvation.
verses.ar: وَأَشْرِعْ رُمْحًا وَصُدَّ تِلْقَاءَ مُطَارِدِيَّ. قُلْ لِنَفْسِي: «خَلَاصُكِ أَنَا».

verses.en: Let them be confounded and put to shame that seek after my soul: let them be turned back and brought to confusion that devise my hurt.
verses.ar: لِيَخْزَ وَلْيَخْجَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ نَفْسِي. لِيَرْتَدَّ إِلَى ٱلْوَرَاءِ وَيَخْجَلِ ٱلْمُتَفَكِّرُونَ بِإِسَاءَتِي.

verses.en: Let them be as chaff before the wind: and let the angel of the Lord chase them.
verses.ar: لِيَكُونُوا مِثْلَ ٱلْعُصَافَةِ قُدَّامَ ٱلرِّيحِ، وَمَلَاكُ ٱلرَّبِّ دَاحِرُهُمْ.

verses.en: Let their way be dark and slippery: and let the angel of the Lord persecute them.
verses.ar: لِيَكُنْ طَرِيقُهُمْ ظَلَامًا وَزَلَقًا، وَمَلَاكُ ٱلرَّبِّ طَارِدُهُمْ.

verses.en: For without cause have they hid for me their net in a pit, which without cause they have digged for my soul.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُمْ بِلَا سَبَبٍ أَخْفَوْا لِي هُوَّةَ شَبَكَتِهِمْ. بِلَا سَبَبٍحَفَرُوا لِنَفْسِي.

verses.en: Let destruction come upon him at unawares; and let his net that he hath hid catch himself: into that very destruction let him fall.
verses.ar: لِتَأْتِهِ ٱلتَّهْلُكَةُ وَهُوَ لَا يَعْلَمُ، وَلْتَنْشَبْ بِهِ ٱلشَّبَكَةُ ٱلَّتِي أَخْفَاهَا، وَفِي ٱلتَّهْلُكَةِ نَفْسِهَا لِيَقَعْ.

verses.en: And my soul shall be joyful in the Lord: it shall rejoice in his salvation.
verses.ar: أَمَّا نَفْسِي فَتَفْرَحُ بِٱلرَّبِّ وَتَبْتَهِجُ بِخَلَاصِهِ.

verses.en: All my bones shall say, Lord, who is like unto thee, which deliverest the poor from him that is too strong for him, yea, the poor and the needy from him that spoileth him?
verses.ar: جَمِيعُ عِظَامِي تَقُولُ: «يَارَبُّ، مَنْ مِثْلُكَ ٱلْمُنْقِذُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ مِمَّنْ هُوَ أَقْوَى مِنْهُ، وَٱلْفَقِيرَ وَٱلْبَائِسَ مِنْ سَالِبِهِ؟».

verses.en: False witnesses did rise up; they laid to my charge things that I knew not.
verses.ar: شُهُودُ زُورٍ يَقُومُونَ، وَعَمَّا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ يَسْأَلُونَنِي.

verses.en: They rewarded me evil for good to the spoiling of my soul.
verses.ar: يُجَازُونَنِي عَنِ ٱلْخَيْرِ شَرًّا، ثَكَلًا لِنَفْسِي.

verses.en: But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth: I humbled my soul with fasting; and my prayer returned into mine own bosom.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنَا فَفِي مَرَضِهِمْ كَانَ لِبَاسِي مِسْحًا. أَذْلَلْتُ بِٱلصَّوْمِ نَفْسِي، وَصَلَاتِي إِلَى حِضْنِي تَرْجِعُ.

verses.en: I behaved myself as though he had been my friend or brother: I bowed down heavily, as one that mourneth for his mother.
verses.ar: كَأَنَّهُ قَرِيبٌ، كَأَنَّهُ أَخِي كُنْتُ أَتَمَشَّى. كَمَنْ يَنُوحُ عَلَى أُمِّهِ ٱنْحَنَيْتُ حَزِينًا.

verses.en: But in mine adversity they rejoiced, and gathered themselves together: yea, the abjects gathered themselves together against me, and I knew it not; they did tear me, and ceased not:
verses.ar: وَلَكِنَّهُمْ فِي ظَلْعِي فَرِحُوا وَٱجْتَمَعُوا. ٱجْتَمَعُوا عَلَيَّ شَاتِمِينَ وَلَمْ أَعْلَمْ. مَزَّقُوا وَلَمْ يَكُفُّوا.

verses.en: With hypocritical mockers in feasts, they gnashed upon me with their teeth.
verses.ar: بَيْنَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ ٱلْمُجَّانِ لِأَجْلِ كَعْكَةٍ حَرَّقُوا عَلَيَّ أَسْنَانَهُمْ.

verses.en: Lord, how long wilt thou look on? rescue my soul from their destructions, my darling from the lions.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، إِلَى مَتَى تَنْظُرُ؟ ٱسْتَرِدَّ نَفْسِي مِنْ تَهْلُكَاتِهِمْ، وَحِيدَتِي مِنَ ٱلْأَشْبَالِ.

verses.en: I will give thee thanks in the great congregation: I will praise thee among much people.
verses.ar: أَحْمَدُكَ فِي ٱلْجَمَاعَةِ ٱلْكَثِيرَةِ. فِي شَعْبٍ عَظِيمٍ أُسَبِّحُكَ.

verses.en: Let not them that are mine enemies wrongfully rejoice over me: neither let them wink with the eye that hate me without a cause.
verses.ar: لَا يَشْمَتْ بِي ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَعْدَائِي بَاطِلًا، وَلَا يَتَغَامَزْ بِٱلْعَيْنِ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبْغِضُونَنِي بِلَا سَبَبٍ.

verses.en: For they speak not peace: but they devise deceitful matters against them that are quiet in the land.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُمْ لَا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ بِٱلسَّلَامِ، وَعَلَى ٱلْهَادِئِينَ فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ بِكَلَامِ مَكْرٍ.

verses.en: Yea, they opened their mouth wide against me, and said, Aha, aha, our eye hath seen it.
verses.ar: فَغَرُوا عَلَيَّ أَفْوَاهَهُمْ. قَالُوا: «هَهْ! هَهْ!قَدْ رَأَتْ أَعْيُنُنَا».

verses.en: This thou hast seen, O Lord: keep not silence: O Lord, be not far from me.
verses.ar: قَدْ رَأَيْتَ يَارَبُّ، لَا تَسْكُتْ. يَا سَيِّدُ، لَا تَبْتَعِدْ عَنِّي.

verses.en: Stir up thyself, and awake to my judgment, even unto my cause, my God and my Lord.
verses.ar: ٱسْتَيْقِظْ وَٱنْتَبِهْ إِلَى حُكْمِي، يَا إِلَهِي وَسَيِّدِي إِلَى دَعْوَايَ.

verses.en: Judge me, O Lord my God, according to thy righteousness; and let them not rejoice over me.
verses.ar: ٱقْضِ لِي حَسَبَ عَدْلِكَ يَارَبُّ إِلَهِي، فَلَا يَشْمَتُوا بِي.

verses.en: Let them not say in their hearts, Ah, so would we have it: let them not say, We have swallowed him up.
verses.ar: لَا يَقُولُوا فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ: «هَهْ! شَهْوَتُنَا». لَا يَقُولُوا: «قَدِ ٱبْتَلَعْنَاهُ!».

verses.en: Let them be ashamed and brought to confusion together that rejoice at mine hurt: let them be clothed with shame and dishonour that magnify themselves against me.
verses.ar: لِيَخْزَ وَلْيَخْجَلْ مَعًا ٱلْفَرِحُونَ بِمُصِيبَتِي. لِيَلْبِسِ ٱلْخِزْيَ وَٱلْخَجَلَ ٱلْمُتَعَظِّمُونَ عَلَيَّ.

verses.en: Let them shout for joy, and be glad, that favour my righteous cause: yea, let them say continually, Let the Lord be magnified, which hath pleasure in the prosperity of his servant.
verses.ar: لِيَهْتِفْ وَيَفْرَحِ ٱلْمُبْتَغُونَ حَقِّي، وَلْيَقُولُوا دَائِمًا: «لِيَتَعَظَّمِ ٱلرَّبُّ ٱلْمَسْرُورُ بِسَلَامَةِ عَبْدِهِ».

verses.en: And my tongue shall speak of thy righteousness and of thy praise all the day long.
verses.ar: وَلِسَانِي يَلْهَجُ بِعَدْلِكَ. ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ بِحَمْدِكَ.

verses.en: The transgression of the wicked saith within my heart, that there is no fear of God before his eyes.
verses.ar: نَأْمَةُ مَعْصِيَةِ ٱلشِّرِّيرِ فِي دَاخِلِ قَلْبِي أَنْ لَيْسَ خَوْفُ ٱللهِ أَمَامَ عَيْنَيْهِ.

verses.en: For he flattereth himself in his own eyes, until his iniquity be found to be hateful.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ مَلَّقَ نَفْسَهُ لِنَفْسِهِ مِنْ جِهَةِ وِجْدَانِ إِثْمِهِ وَبُغْضِهِلإ.

verses.en: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit: he hath left off to be wise, and to do good.
verses.ar: كَلَامُ فَمِهِ إِثْمٌ وَغِشٌّ. كَفَّ عَنِ ٱلتَّعَقُّلِ، عَنْ عَمَلِ ٱلْخَيْرِ.

verses.en: He deviseth mischief upon his bed; he setteth himself in a way that is not good; he abhorreth not evil.
verses.ar: يَتَفَكَّرُ بِٱلْإِثْمِ عَلَى مَضْجَعِهِ. يَقِفُ فِي طَرِيقٍ غَيْرِ صَالِحٍ. لَا يَرْفُضُ ٱلشَّرَّ.

verses.en: Thy mercy, O Lord, is in the heavens; and thy faithfulness reacheth unto the clouds.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ رَحْمَتُكَ. أَمَانَتُكَ إِلَى ٱلْغَمَامِ.

verses.en: Thy righteousness is like the great mountains; thy judgments are a great deep: O Lord, thou preservest man and beast.
verses.ar: عَدْلُكَ مِثْلُ جِبَالِ ٱللهِ، وَأَحْكَامُكَ لُجَّةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ. ٱلنَّاسَ وَٱلْبَهَائِمَ تُخَلِّصُ يَارَبُّ.

verses.en: How excellent is thy lovingkindness, O God! therefore the children of men put their trust under the shadow of thy wings.
verses.ar: مَا أَكْرَمَ رَحْمَتَكَ يَا ٱللهُ! فَبَنُو ٱلْبَشَرِ فِي ظِلِّ جَنَاحَيْكَ يَحْتَمُونَ.

verses.en: They shall be abundantly satisfied with the fatness of thy house; and thou shalt make them drink of the river of thy pleasures.
verses.ar: يَرْوَوْنَ مِنْ دَسَمِ بَيْتِكَ، وَمِنْ نَهْرِ نِعَمِكَ تَسْقِيهِمْ.

verses.en: For with thee is the fountain of life: in thy light shall we see light.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ عِنْدَكَ يَنْبُوعَ ٱلْحَيَاةِ. بِنُورِكَ نَرَى نُورًا.

verses.en: O continue thy lovingkindness unto them that know thee; and thy righteousness to the upright in heart.
verses.ar: أَدِمْ رَحْمَتَكَ لِلَّذِينَ يَعْرِفُونَكَ، وَعَدْلَكَ لِلْمُسْتَقِيمِي ٱلْقَلْبِ.

verses.en: Let not the foot of pride come against me, and let not the hand of the wicked remove me.
verses.ar: لَا تَأْتِنِي رِجْلُ ٱلْكِبْرِيَاءِ، وَيَدُ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ لَا تُزَحْزِحْنِي.

verses.en: There are the workers of iniquity fallen: they are cast down, and shall not be able to rise.
verses.ar: هُنَاكَ سَقَطَ فَاعِلُو ٱلْإِثْمِ. دُحِرُوا فَلَمْ يَسْتَطِيعُوا ٱلْقِيَامَ.

verses.en: Fret not thyself because of evildoers, neither be thou envious against the workers of iniquity.
verses.ar: لَا تَغَرْ مِنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ، وَلَا تَحْسِدْ عُمَّالَ ٱلْإِثْمِ،

verses.en: For they shall soon be cut down like the grass, and wither as the green herb.
verses.ar: فَإِنَّهُمْ مِثْلَ ٱلْحَشِيشِ سَرِيعًا يُقْطَعُونَ، وَمِثْلَ ٱلْعُشْبِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ يَذْبُلُونَ.

verses.en: Trust in the Lord, and do good; so shalt thou dwell in the land, and verily thou shalt be fed.
verses.ar: ٱتَّكِلْ عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ وَٱفْعَلِ ٱلْخَيْرَ. ٱسْكُنِ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَٱرْعَ ٱلْأَمَانَةَ.

verses.en: Delight thyself also in the Lord; and he shall give thee the desires of thine heart.
verses.ar: وَتَلَذَّذْ بِٱلرَّبِّ فَيُعْطِيَكَ سُؤْلَ قَلْبِكَ.

verses.en: Commit thy way unto the Lord; trust also in him; and he shall bring it to pass.
verses.ar: سَلِّمْ لِلرَّبِّ طَرِيقَكَ وَٱتَّكِلْ عَلَيْهِ وَهُوَ يُجْرِي،

verses.en: And he shall bring forth thy righteousness as the light, and thy judgment as the noonday.
verses.ar: وَيُخْرِجُ مِثْلَ ٱلنُّورِ بِرَّكَ، وَحَقَّكَ مِثْلَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ.

verses.en: Rest in the Lord, and wait patiently for him: fret not thyself because of him who prospereth in his way, because of the man who bringeth wicked devices to pass.
verses.ar: ٱنْتَظِرِ ٱلرَّبَّ وَٱصْبِرْ لَهُ، وَلَا تَغَرْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِي يَنْجَحُ فِي طَرِيقِهِ، مِنَ ٱلرَّجُلِ ٱلْمُجْرِي مَكَايِدَ.

verses.en: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath: fret not thyself in any wise to do evil.
verses.ar: كُفَّ عَنِ ٱلْغَضَبِ، وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلسَّخَطَ، وَلَا تَغَرْ لِفِعْلِ ٱلشَّرِّ،

verses.en: For evildoers shall be cut off: but those that wait upon the Lord, they shall inherit the earth.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ عَامِلِي ٱلشَّرِّ يُقْطَعُونَ، وَٱلَّذِينَ يَنْتَظِرُونَ ٱلرَّبَّ هُمْ يَرِثُونَ ٱلْأَرْضَ.

verses.en: For yet a little while, and the wicked shall not be: yea, thou shalt diligently consider his place, and it shall not be.
verses.ar: بَعْدَ قَلِيلٍلَا يَكُونُ ٱلشِّرِّيرُ تَطَّلِعُ فِي مَكَانِهِ فَلَا يَكُونُ.

verses.en: But the meek shall inherit the earth; and shall delight themselves in the abundance of peace.
verses.ar: أَمَّا ٱلْوُدَعَاءُ فَيَرِثُونَ ٱلْأَرْضَ، وَيَتَلَذَّذُونَ فِي كَثْرَةِ ٱلسَّلَامَةِ.

verses.en: The wicked plotteth against the just, and gnasheth upon him with his teeth.
verses.ar: ٱلشِّرِّيرُ يَتَفَكَّرُ ضِدَّ ٱلصِّدِّيقِ وَيُحَرِّقُ عَلَيْهِ أَسْنَانَهُ.

verses.en: The Lord shall laugh at him: for he seeth that his day is coming.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ يَضْحَكُ بِهِ لِأَنَّهُ رَأَى أَنَّ يَوْمَهُ آتٍ!

verses.en: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow, to cast down the poor and needy, and to slay such as be of upright conversation.
verses.ar: ٱلْأَشْرَارُ قَدْ سَلُّوا ٱلسَّيْفَ وَمَدُّوا قَوْسَهُمْ لِرَمْيِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ وَٱلْفَقِيرِ، لِقَتْلِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِ طَرِيقُهُمْ.

verses.en: Their sword shall enter into their own heart, and their bows shall be broken.
verses.ar: سَيْفُهُمْ يَدْخُلُ فِي قَلْبِهِمْ، وَقِسِيُّهُمْ تَنْكَسِرُ.

verses.en: A little that a righteous man hath is better than the riches of many wicked.
verses.ar: اَلْقَلِيلُ ٱلَّذِي لِلصِّدِّيقِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ ثَرْوَةِ أَشْرَارٍ كَثِيرِينَ.

verses.en: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken: but the Lord upholdeth the righteous.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ سَوَاعِدَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ تَنْكَسِرُ، وَعَاضِدُ ٱلصِّدِّيقِينَ ٱلرَّبُّ.

verses.en: The Lord knoweth the days of the upright: and their inheritance shall be for ever.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ عَارِفٌ أَيَّامَ ٱلْكَمَلَةِ، وَمِيرَاثُهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ يَكُونُ.

verses.en: They shall not be ashamed in the evil time: and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.
verses.ar: لَا يُخْزَوْنَ فِي زَمَنِ ٱلسُّوءِ، وَفِي أَيَّامِ ٱلْجُوعِ يَشْبَعُونَ.

verses.en: But the wicked shall perish, and the enemies of the Lord shall be as the fat of lambs: they shall consume; into smoke shall they consume away.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱلْأَشْرَارَ يَهْلِكُونَ، وَأَعْدَاءُ ٱلرَّبِّ كَبَهَاءِ ٱلْمَرَاعِي. فَنُوا. كَٱلدُّخَانِ فَنُوا.

verses.en: The wicked borroweth, and payeth not again: but the righteous sheweth mercy, and giveth.
verses.ar: ٱلشِّرِّيرُ يَسْتَقْرِضُ وَلَا يَفِي، أَمَّا ٱلصِّدِّيقُ فَيَتَرَأَّفُ وَيُعْطِي.

verses.en: For such as be blessed of him shall inherit the earth; and they that be cursed of him shall be cut off.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱلْمُبَارَكِينَ مِنْهُ يَرِثُونَ ٱلْأَرْضَ، وَٱلْمَلْعُونِينَ مِنْهُ يُقْطَعُونَ.

verses.en: The steps of a good man are ordered by the Lord: and he delighteth in his way.
verses.ar: مِنْ قِبَلِ ٱلرَّبِّ تَتَثَبَّتُ خَطَوَاتُ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ وَفِي طَرِيقِهِ يُسَرُّ.

verses.en: Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down: for the Lord upholdeth him with his hand.
verses.ar: إِذَا سَقَطَ لَا يَنْطَرِحُ، لِأَنَّ ٱلرَّبَّ مُسْنِدٌ يَدَهُ.

verses.en: I have been young, and now am old; yet have I not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his seed begging bread.
verses.ar: أَيْضًا كُنْتُ فَتىً وَقَدْ شِخْتُ، وَلَمْ أَرَ صِدِّيقًا تُخُلِّيَ عَنْهُ، وَلَا ذُرِّيَّةً لَهُ تَلْتَمِسُ خُبْزًا.

verses.en: He is ever merciful, and lendeth; and his seed is blessed.
verses.ar: ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ يَتَرَأَّفُ وَيُقْرِضُ، وَنَسْلُهُ لِلْبَرَكَةِ.

verses.en: Depart from evil, and do good; and dwell for evermore.
verses.ar: حِدْ عَنِ ٱلشَّرِّ وَٱفْعَلِ ٱلْخَيْرَ، وَٱسْكُنْ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: For the Lord loveth judgment, and forsaketh not his saints; they are preserved for ever: but the seed of the wicked shall be cut off.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱلرَّبَّ يُحِبُّ ٱلْحَقَّ، وَلَا يَتَخَلَّى عَنْ أَتْقِيَائِهِ. إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ يُحْفَظُونَ. أَمَّا نَسْلُ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ فَيَنْقَطِعُ.

verses.en: The righteous shall inherit the land, and dwell therein for ever.
verses.ar: ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ يَرِثُونَ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَيَسْكُنُونَهَا إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: The mouth of the righteous speaketh wisdom, and his tongue talketh of judgment.
verses.ar: فَمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقِ يَلْهَجُ بِٱلْحِكْمَةِ، وَلِسَانُهُ يَنْطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ.

verses.en: The law of his God is in his heart; none of his steps shall slide.
verses.ar: شَرِيعَةُ إِلَهِهِ فِي قَلْبِهِ. لَا تَتَقَلْقَلُ خَطَوَاتُهُ.

verses.en: The wicked watcheth the righteous, and seeketh to slay him.
verses.ar: ٱلشِّرِّيرُ يُرَاقِبُ ٱلصِّدِّيقَ مُحَاوِلًا أَنْ يُمِيتَهُ.

verses.en: The Lord will not leave him in his hand, nor condemn him when he is judged.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ لَا يَتْرُكُهُ فِي يَدِهِ، وَلَا يَحْكُمُ عَلَيْهِ عِنْدَ مُحَاكَمَتِهِ.

verses.en: Wait on the Lord, and keep his way, and he shall exalt thee to inherit the land: when the wicked are cut off, thou shalt see it.
verses.ar: ٱنْتَظِرِ ٱلرَّبَّ وَٱحْفَظْ طَرِيقَهُ، فَيَرْفَعَكَ لِتَرِثَ ٱلْأَرْضَ. إِلَى ٱنْقِرَاضِ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ تَنْظُرُ.

verses.en: I have seen the wicked in great power, and spreading himself like a green bay tree.
verses.ar: قَدْ رَأَيْتُ ٱلشِّرِّيرَ عَاتِيًا، وَارِفًا مِثْلَ شَجَرَةٍ شَارِقَةٍ نَاضِرَةٍ.

verses.en: Yet he passed away, and, lo, he was not: yea, I sought him, but he could not be found.
verses.ar: عَبَرَ فَإِذَا هُوَ لَيْسَ بِمَوْجُودٍ، وَٱلْتَمَسْتُهُ فَلَمْ يُوجَدْ.

verses.en: Mark the perfect man, and behold the upright: for the end of that man is peace.
verses.ar: لَاحِظِ ٱلْكَامِلَ وَٱنْظُرِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ، فَإِنَّ ٱلْعَقِبَ لِإِنْسَانِ ٱلسَّلَامَةِ.

verses.en: But the transgressors shall be destroyed together: the end of the wicked shall be cut off.
verses.ar: أَمَّا ٱلْأَشْرَارُ فَيُبَادُونَ جَمِيعًا. عَقِبُ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ يَنْقَطِعُ.

verses.en: But the salvation of the righteous is of the Lord: he is their strength in the time of trouble.
verses.ar: أَمَّا خَلَاصُ ٱلصِّدِّيقِينَ فَمِنْ قِبَلِ ٱلرَّبِّ، حِصْنِهمْ فِي زَمَانِ ٱلضِّيقِ.

verses.en: And the Lord shall help them, and deliver them: he shall deliver them from the wicked, and save them, because they trust in him.
verses.ar: وَيُعِينُهُمُ ٱلرَّبُّ وَيُنَجِّيهِمْ. يُنْقِذُهُمْ مِنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ وَيُخَلِّصُهُمْ، لِأَنَّهُمُ ٱحْتَمَوْا بِهِ.

verses.en: O Lord, rebuke me not in thy wrath: neither chasten me in thy hot displeasure.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، لَا تُوَبِّخْنِي بِسَخَطِكَ، وَلَا تُؤَدِّبْنِي بِغَيْظِكَ،

verses.en: For thine arrows stick fast in me, and thy hand presseth me sore.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ سِهَامَكَ قَدِ ٱنْتَشَبَتْ فِيَّ، وَنَزَلَتْ عَلَيَّ يَدُكَ.

verses.en: There is no soundness in my flesh because of thine anger; neither is there any rest in my bones because of my sin.
verses.ar: لَيْسَتْ فِي جَسَدِي صِحَّةٌ مِنْ جِهَةِ غَضَبِكَ. لَيْسَتْ فِي عِظَامِي سَلَامَةٌ مِنْ جِهَةِ خَطِيَّتِي.

verses.en: For mine iniquities are gone over mine head: as an heavy burden they are too heavy for me.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ آثَامِي قَدْ طَمَتْ فَوْقَ رَأْسِي. كَحِمْلٍ ثَقِيلٍ أَثْقَلَ مِمَّا أَحْتَمِلُ.

verses.en: My wounds stink and are corrupt because of my foolishness.
verses.ar: قَدْ أَنْتَنَتْ، قَاحَتْ حُبُرُ ضَرْبِي مِنْ جِهَةِ حَمَاقَتِي.

verses.en: I am troubled; I am bowed down greatly; I go mourning all the day long.
verses.ar: لَوِيتُ. ٱنْحَنَيْتُ إِلَى ٱلْغَايَةِ. ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ ذَهَبْتُ حَزِينًا.

verses.en: For my loins are filled with a loathsome disease: and there is no soundness in my flesh.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ خَاصِرَتَيَّ قَدِ ٱمْتَلَأَتَا ٱحْتِرَاقًا، وَلَيْسَتْ فِي جَسَدِي صِحَّةٌ.

verses.en: I am feeble and sore broken: I have roared by reason of the disquietness of my heart.
verses.ar: خَدِرْتُ وَٱنْسَحَقْتُ إِلَى ٱلْغَايَةِ. كُنْتُ أَئِنُّ مِنْ زَفِيرِ قَلْبِي.

verses.en: Lord, all my desire is before thee; and my groaning is not hid from thee.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، أَمَامَكَ كُلُّ تَأَوُّهِي، وَتَنَهُّدِي لَيْسَ بِمَسْتُورٍ عَنْكَ.

verses.en: My heart panteth, my strength faileth me: as for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.
verses.ar: قَلْبِي خَافِقٌ. قُوَّتِي فَارَقَتْنِي، وَنُورُ عَيْنِي أَيْضًا لَيْسَ مَعِي.

verses.en: My lovers and my friends stand aloof from my sore; and my kinsmen stand afar off.
verses.ar: أَحِبَّائِي وَأَصْحَابِي يَقِفُونَ تُجَاهَ ضَرْبَتِي، وَأَقَارِبِي وَقَفُوا بَعِيدًا.

verses.en: They also that seek after my life lay snares for me: and they that seek my hurt speak mischievous things, and imagine deceits all the day long.
verses.ar: وَطَالِبُو نَفْسِي نَصَبُوا شَرَكًا، وَٱلْمُلْتَمِسُونَ لِيَ ٱلشَّرَّ تَكَلَّمُوا بِٱلْمَفَاسِدِ، وَٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ يَلْهَجُونَ بِٱلْغِشِّ.

verses.en: But I, as a deaf man, heard not; and I was as a dumb man that openeth not his mouth.
verses.ar: وَأَمَّا أَنَا فَكَأَصَمَّ لَا أَسْمَعُ. وَكَأَبْكَمَ لَا يَفْتَحُ فَاهُ.

verses.en: Thus I was as a man that heareth not, and in whose mouth are no reproofs.
verses.ar: وَأَكُونُ مِثْلَ إِنْسَانٍلَا يَسْمَعُ، وَلَيْسَ فِي فَمِهِ حُجَّةٌ.

verses.en: For in thee, O Lord, do I hope: thou wilt hear, O Lord my God.
verses.ar: لِأَنِّي لَكَ يَارَبُّ صَبَرْتُ، أَنْتَ تَسْتَجِيبُ يَارَبُّ إِلَهِي.

verses.en: For I said, Hear me, lest otherwise they should rejoice over me: when my foot slippeth, they magnify themselves against me.
verses.ar: لِأَنِّي قُلْتُ: «لِئَلَّا يَشْمَتُوا بِي». عِنْدَمَا زَلَّتْ قَدَمِي تَعَظَّمُوا عَلَيَّ.

verses.en: For I am ready to halt, and my sorrow is continually before me.
verses.ar: لِأَنِّي مُوشِكٌ أَنْ أَظْلَعَ، وَوَجَعِي مُقَابِلِي دَائِمًا.

verses.en: For I will declare mine iniquity; I will be sorry for my sin.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّنِي أُخْبِرُ بِإِثْمِي، وَأَغْتَمُّ مِنْ خَطِيَّتِي.

verses.en: But mine enemies are lively, and they are strong: and they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.
verses.ar: وَأَمَّا أَعْدَائِي فَأَحْيَاءٌ. عَظُمُوا. وَٱلَّذِينَ يُبْغِضُونَنِي ظُلْمًا كَثُرُوا.

verses.en: They also that render evil for good are mine adversaries; because I follow the thing that good is.
verses.ar: وَٱلْمُجَازُونَ عَنِ ٱلْخَيْرِ بِشَرٍّ، يُقَاوِمُونَنِي لِأَجْلِ ٱتِّبَاعِي ٱلصَّلَاحَ.

verses.en: Forsake me not, O Lord: O my God, be not far from me.
verses.ar: لَا تَتْرُكْنِي يَارَبُّ. يَاإِلَهِي، لَا تَبْعُدْ عَنِّي.

verses.en: Make haste to help me, O Lord my salvation.
verses.ar: أَسْرِعْ إِلَى مَعُونَتِي يَارَبُّ يَا خَلَاصِي.

verses.en: I said, I will take heed to my ways, that I sin not with my tongue: I will keep my mouth with a bridle, while the wicked is before me.
verses.ar: قُلْتُ: «أَتَحَفَّظُ لِسَبِيلِي مِنَ ٱلْخَطَإِ بِلِسَانِي. أَحْفَظُ لِفَمِي كِمَامَةً فِيمَا ٱلشِّرِّيرُ مُقَابِلِي».

verses.en: I was dumb with silence, I held my peace, even from good; and my sorrow was stirred.
verses.ar: صَمَتُّ صَمْتًا، سَكَتُّ عَنِ ٱلْخَيْرِ، فَتَحَرَّكَ وَجَعِي.

verses.en: My heart was hot within me, while I was musing the fire burned: then spake I with my tongue,
verses.ar: حَمِيَ قَلْبِي فِي جَوْفِي. عِنْدَ لَهَجِي ٱشْتَعَلَتِ ٱلنَّارُ. تَكَلَّمْتُ بِلِسَانِي:

verses.en: Lord, make me to know mine end, and the measure of my days, what it is; that I may know how frail I am.
verses.ar: «عَرِّفْنِي يَارَبُّ نِهَايَتِي وَمِقْدَارَ أَيَّامِي كَمْ هِيَ، فَأَعْلَمَ كَيْفَ أَنَا زَائِلٌ.

verses.en: Behold, thou hast made my days as an handbreadth; and mine age is as nothing before thee: verily every man at his best state is altogether vanity. Selah.
verses.ar: هُوَذَا جَعَلْتَ أَيَّامِي أَشْبَارًا، وَعُمْرِي كَلَا شَيْءَ قُدَّامَكَ. إِنَّمَا نَفْخَةً كُلُّ إِنْسَانٍ قَدْ جُعِلَ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: Surely every man walketh in a vain shew: surely they are disquieted in vain: he heapeth up riches, and knoweth not who shall gather them.
verses.ar: إِنَّمَا كَخَيَالٍ يَتَمَشَّى ٱلْإِنْسَانُ. إِنَّمَا بَاطِلًا يَضِجُّونَ. يَذْخَرُ ذَخَائِرَ وَلَا يَدْرِي مَنْ يَضُمُّهَا.

verses.en: And now, Lord, what wait I for? my hope is in thee.
verses.ar: «وَٱلْآنَ، مَاذَا ٱنْتَظَرْتُ يَارَبُّ؟ رَجَائِي فِيكَ هُوَ.

verses.en: Deliver me from all my transgressions: make me not the reproach of the foolish.
verses.ar: مِنْ كُلِّ مَعَاصِيَّ نَجِّنِي. لَا تَجْعَلْنِي عَارًا عِنْدَ ٱلْجَاهِلِ.

verses.en: I was dumb, I opened not my mouth; because thou didst it.
verses.ar: صَمَتُّ. لَا أَفْتَحُ فَمِي، لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ فَعَلْتَ.

verses.en: Remove thy stroke away from me: I am consumed by the blow of thine hand.
verses.ar: ٱرْفَعْ عَنِّي ضَرْبَكَ. مِنْ مُهَاجَمَةِ يَدِكَ أَنَا قَدْ فَنِيتُ.

verses.en: When thou with rebukes dost correct man for iniquity, thou makest his beauty to consume away like a moth: surely every man is vanity. Selah.
verses.ar: بِتَأْدِيبَاتٍ إِنْ أَدَّبْتَ ٱلْإِنْسَانَ مِنْ أَجْلِ إِثْمِهِ، أَفْنَيْتَ مِثْلَ ٱلْعُثِّ مُشْتَهَاهُ. إِنَّمَا كُلُّ إِنْسَانٍ نَفْخَةٌ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: Hear my prayer, O Lord, and give ear unto my cry; hold not thy peace at my tears: for I am a stranger with thee, and a sojourner, as all my fathers were.
verses.ar: اِسْتَمِعْ صَلَاتِي يَارَبُّ، وَٱصْغَ إِلَى صُرَاخِي. لَا تَسْكُتْ عَنْ دُمُوعِي. لِأَنِّي أَنَا غَرِيبٌ عِنْدَكَ. نَزِيلٌ مِثْلُ جَمِيعِ آبَائِي.

verses.en: O spare me, that I may recover strength, before I go hence, and be no more.
verses.ar: ٱقْتَصِرْ عَنِّي فَأَتَبَلَّجَ قَبْلَ أَنْ أَذْهَبَ فَلَا أُوجَدَ».

verses.en: I waited patiently for the Lord; and he inclined unto me, and heard my cry.
verses.ar: اِنْتِظَارًا ٱنْتَظَرْتُ ٱلرَّبَّ، فَمَالَ إِلَيَّ وَسَمِعَ صُرَاخِي،

verses.en: He brought me up also out of an horrible pit, out of the miry clay, and set my feet upon a rock, and established my goings.
verses.ar: وَأَصْعَدَنِي مِنْ جُبِّ ٱلْهَلَاكِ، مِنْ طِينِ ٱلْحَمْأَةِ، وَأَقَامَ عَلَى صَخْرَةٍ رِجْلَيَّ. ثَبَّتَ خُطُوَاتِي،

verses.en: And he hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God: many shall see it, and fear, and shall trust in the Lord.
verses.ar: وَجَعَلَ فِي فَمِي تَرْنِيمَةً جَدِيدَةً، تَسْبِيحَةً لِإِلَهِنَا. كَثِيرُونَ يَرَوْنَ وَيَخَافُونَ وَيَتَوَكَّلُونَ عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: Blessed is that man that maketh the Lord his trust, and respecteth not the proud, nor such as turn aside to lies.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِلرَّجُلِ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ ٱلرَّبَّ مُتَّكَلَهُ، وَلَمْ يَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى ٱلْغَطَارِيسِ وَٱلْمُنْحَرِفِينَ إِلَى ٱلْكَذِبِ.

verses.en: Many, O Lord my God, are thy wonderful works which thou hast done, and thy thoughts which are to us-ward: they cannot be reckoned up in order unto thee: if I would declare and speak of them, they are more than can be numbered.
verses.ar: كَثِيرًا مَا جَعَلْتَ أَنْتَ أَيُّهَا ٱلرَّبُّ إِلَهِي عَجَائِبَكَ وَأَفْكَارَكَ مِنْ جِهَتِنَا. لَا تُقَوَّمُ لَدَيْكَ. لَأُخْبِرَنَّ وَأَتَكَلَّمَنَّ بِهَا. زَادَتْ عَنْ أَنْ تُعَدَّ.

verses.en: Sacrifice and offering thou didst not desire; mine ears hast thou opened: burnt offering and sin offering hast thou not required.
verses.ar: بِذَبِيحَةٍ وَتَقْدِمَةٍ لَمْ تُسَرَّ. أُذُنَيَّ فَتَحْتَ. مُحْرَقَةً وَذَبِيحَةَ خَطِيَّةٍ لَمْ تَطْلُبْ.

verses.en: Then said I, Lo, I come: in the volume of the book it is written of me,
verses.ar: حِينَئِذٍ قُلْتُ: «هَأَنَذَا جِئْتُ. بِدَرْجِ ٱلْكِتَابِ مَكْتُوبٌ عَنِّي:

verses.en: I delight to do thy will, O my God: yea, thy law is within my heart.
verses.ar: أَنْ أَفْعَلَ مَشِيئَتَكَ يَا إِلَهِي سُرِرْتُ، وَشَرِيعَتُكَ فِي وَسَطِ أَحْشَائِي».

verses.en: I have preached righteousness in the great congregation: lo, I have not refrained my lips, O Lord, thou knowest.
verses.ar: بَشَّرْتُ بِبِرٍّ فِي جَمَاعَةٍ عَظِيمَةٍ. هُوَذَا شَفَتَايَ لَمْ أَمْنَعْهُمَا. أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ عَلِمْتَ.

verses.en: I have not hid thy righteousness within my heart; I have declared thy faithfulness and thy salvation: I have not concealed thy lovingkindness and thy truth from the great congregation.
verses.ar: لَمْ أَكْتُمْ عَدْلَكَ فِي وَسَطِ قَلْبِي. تَكَلَّمْتُ بِأَمَانَتِكَ وَخَلَاصِكَ. لَمْ أُخْفِ رَحْمَتَكَ وَحَقَّكَ عَنِ ٱلْجَمَاعَةِ ٱلْعَظِيمَةِ.

verses.en: Withhold not thou thy tender mercies from me, O Lord: let thy lovingkindness and thy truth continually preserve me.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ فَلَا تَمْنَعْ رَأْفَتَكَ عَنِّي. تَنْصُرُنِي رَحْمَتُكَ وَحَقُّكَ دَائِمًا.

verses.en: For innumerable evils have compassed me about: mine iniquities have taken hold upon me, so that I am not able to look up; they are more than the hairs of mine head: therefore my heart faileth me.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ شُرُورًا لَا تُحْصَى قَدِ ٱكْتَنَفَتْنِي. حَاقَتْ بِي آثَامِي، وَلَا أَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ أُبْصِرَ. كَثُرَتْ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ شَعْرِ رَأْسِي، وَقَلْبِي قَدْ تَرَكَنِي.

verses.en: Be pleased, O Lord, to deliver me: O Lord, make haste to help me.
verses.ar: اِرْتَضِ يَارَبُّ بِأَنْ تُنَجِّيَنِي. يَارَبُّ، إِلَى مَعُونَتِي أَسْرِعْ.

verses.en: Let them be ashamed and confounded together that seek after my soul to destroy it; let them be driven backward and put to shame that wish me evil.
verses.ar: لِيَخْزَ وَلْيَخْجَلْ مَعًا ٱلَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ نَفْسِي لِإِهْلَاكِهَا. لِيَرْتَدَّ إِلَى ٱلْوَرَاءِ، وَلْيَخْزَ ٱلْمَسْرُورُونَ بِأَذِيَّتِي.

verses.en: Let them be desolate for a reward of their shame that say unto me, Aha, aha.
verses.ar: لِيَسْتَوْحِشْ مِنْ أَجْلِ خِزْيِهِمِ ٱلْقَائِلُونَ لِي: «هَهْ! هَهْ!».

verses.en: Let all those that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: let such as love thy salvation say continually, The Lord be magnified.
verses.ar: لِيَبْتَهِجْ وَيَفْرَحْ بِكَ جَمِيعُ طَالِبِيكَ مُحِبُّو خَلَاصِكَ: «يَتَعَظَّمُ ٱلرَّبُّ».

verses.en: But I am poor and needy; yet the Lord thinketh upon me: thou art my help and my deliverer; make no tarrying, O my God.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنَا فَمِسْكِينٌ وَبَائِسٌ. ٱلرَّبُّ يَهْتَمُّ بِي. عَوْنِي وَمُنْقِذِي أَنْتَ. يَا إِلَهِي لَا تُبْطِئْ.

verses.en: Blessed is he that considereth the poor: the Lord will deliver him in time of trouble.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِلَّذِي يَنْظُرُ إِلَى ٱلْمِسْكِينِ. فِي يَوْمِ ٱلشَّرِّ يُنَجِّيهِ ٱلرَّبُّ.

verses.en: The Lord will preserve him, and keep him alive; and he shall be blessed upon the earth: and thou wilt not deliver him unto the will of his enemies.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ يَحْفَظُهُ وَيُحْيِيهِ. يَغْتَبِطُ فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ، وَلَا يُسَلِّمُهُ إِلَى مَرَامِ أَعْدَائِهِ.

verses.en: The Lord will strengthen him upon the bed of languishing: thou wilt make all his bed in his sickness.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ يَعْضُدُهُ وَهُوَ عَلَى فِرَاشِ ٱلضُّعْفِ. مَهَّدْتَ مَضْجَعَهُ كُلَّهُ فِي مَرَضِهِ.

verses.en: I said, Lord, be merciful unto me: heal my soul; for I have sinned against thee.
verses.ar: أَنَا قُلْتُ: «يَارَبُّ ٱرْحَمْنِي. ٱشْفِ نَفْسِي لِأَنِّي قَدْ أَخْطَأْتُ إِلَيْكَ».

verses.en: Mine enemies speak evil of me, When shall he die, and his name perish?
verses.ar: أَعْدَائِي يَتَقَاوَلُونَ عَلَيَّ بِشَرٍّ: «مَتَى يَمُوتُ وَيَبِيدُ ٱسْمُهُ؟»

verses.en: And if he come to see me, he speaketh vanity: his heart gathereth iniquity to itself; when he goeth abroad, he telleth it.
verses.ar: وَإِنْ دَخَلَ لِيَرَانِي يَتَكَلَّمُ بِٱلْكَذِبِ. قَلْبُهُ يَجْمَعُ لِنَفْسِهِ إِثْمًا. يَخْرُجُ. فِي ٱلْخَارِجِ يَتَكَلَّمُ.

verses.en: All that hate me whisper together against me: against me do they devise my hurt.
verses.ar: كُلُّ مُبْغِضِيَّ يَتَنَاجَوْنَ مَعًا عَلَيَّ. عَلَيَّ تَفَكَّرُوا بِأَذِيَّتِي.

verses.en: An evil disease, say they, cleaveth fast unto him: and now that he lieth he shall rise up no more.
verses.ar: يَقُولُونَ: «أَمْرٌ رَدِيءٌ قَدِ ٱنْسَكَبَ عَلَيْهِ. حَيْثُ ٱضْطَجَعَ لَا يَعُودُ يَقُومُ».

verses.en: Yea, mine own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, which did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his heel against me.
verses.ar: أَيْضًا رَجُلُ سَلَامَتِي، ٱلَّذِي وَثِقْتُ بِهِ، آكِلُ خُبْزِي، رَفَعَ عَلَيَّ عَقِبَهُ!

verses.en: But thou, O Lord, be merciful unto me, and raise me up, that I may requite them.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ فَٱرْحَمْنِي وَأَقِمْنِي، فَأُجَازِيَهُمْ.

verses.en: By this I know that thou favourest me, because mine enemy doth not triumph over me.
verses.ar: بِهَذَا عَلِمْتُ أَنَّكَ سُرِرْتَ بِي، أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَهْتِفْ عَلَيَّ عَدُوِّي.

verses.en: And as for me, thou upholdest me in mine integrity, and settest me before thy face for ever.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنَا فَبِكَمَالِي دَعَمْتَنِي، وَأَقَمْتَنِي قُدَّامَكَ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel from everlasting, and to everlasting. Amen, and Amen.
verses.ar: مُبَارَكٌ ٱلرَّبُّ إِلَهُ إِسْرَائِيلَ، مِنَ ٱلْأَزَلِ وَإِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ. آمِينَ فَآمِينَ.

verses.en: As the hart panteth after the water brooks, so panteth my soul after thee, O God.
verses.ar: كَمَا يَشْتَاقُ ٱلْإِيَّلُ إِلَى جَدَاوِلِ ٱلْمِيَاهِ، هَكَذَا تَشْتَاقُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ يَا ٱللهُ.

verses.en: My soul thirsteth for God, for the living God: when shall I come and appear before God?
verses.ar: عَطِشَتْ نَفْسِي إِلَى ٱللهِ، إِلَى ٱلْإِلَهِ ٱلْحَيِّ. مَتَى أَجِيءُ وَأَتَرَاءَى قُدَّامَ ٱللهِ؟

verses.en: My tears have been my meat day and night, while they continually say unto me, Where is thy God?
verses.ar: صَارَتْ لِي دُمُوعِي خُبْزًا نَهَارًا وَلَيْلًا إِذْ قِيلَ لِي كُلَّ يَوْمٍ: «أَيْنَ إِلَهُكَ؟».

verses.en: When I remember these things, I pour out my soul in me: for I had gone with the multitude, I went with them to the house of God, with the voice of joy and praise, with a multitude that kept holyday.
verses.ar: هَذِهِ أَذْكُرُهَا فَأَسْكُبُ نَفْسِي عَلَيَّ: لِأَنِّي كُنْتُ أَمُرُّ مَعَ ٱلْجُمَّاعِ، أَتَدَرَّجُ مَعَهُمْ إِلَى بَيْتِ ٱللهِ بِصَوْتِ تَرَنُّمٍ وَحَمْدٍ، جُمْهُورٌ مُعَيِّدٌ.

verses.en: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why art thou disquieted in me? hope thou in God: for I shall yet praise him for the help of his countenance.
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا أَنْتِ مُنْحَنِيَةٌ يَا نَفْسِي؟ وَلِمَاذَا تَئِنِّينَ فِيَّ؟ ٱرْتَجِي ٱللهَ، لِأَنِّي بَعْدُ أَحْمَدُهُ، لِأَجْلِ خَلَاصِ وَجْهِهِ.

verses.en: O my God, my soul is cast down within me: therefore will I remember thee from the land of Jordan, and of the Hermonites, from the hill Mizar.
verses.ar: يَا إِلَهِي، نَفْسِي مُنْحَنِيَةٌ فِيَّ، لِذَلِكَ أَذْكُرُكَ مِنْ أَرْضِ ٱلْأُرْدُنِّ وَجِبَالِ حَرْمُونَ، مِنْ جَبَلِ مِصْعَرَ.

verses.en: Deep calleth unto deep at the noise of thy waterspouts: all thy waves and thy billows are gone over me.
verses.ar: غَمْرٌ يُنَادِي غَمْرًا عِنْدَ صَوْتِ مَيَازِيبِكَ. كُلُّ تَيَّارَاتِكَ وَلُجَجِكَ طَمَتْ عَلَيَّ.

verses.en: Yet the Lord will command his lovingkindness in the daytime, and in the night his song shall be with me, and my prayer unto the God of my life.
verses.ar: بِٱلنَّهَارِ يُوصِي ٱلرَّبُّ رَحْمَتَهُ، وَبِاللَّيْلِ تَسْبِيحُهُ عِنْدِي صَلَاةٌ لِإِلَهِ حَيَاتِي.

verses.en: I will say unto God my rock, Why hast thou forgotten me? why go I mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?
verses.ar: أَقُولُ لِلهِ صَخْرَتِي: «لِمَاذَا نَسِيتَنِي؟ لِمَاذَا أَذْهَبُ حَزِينًا مِنْ مُضَايَقَةِ ٱلْعَدُوِّ؟».

verses.en: As with a sword in my bones, mine enemies reproach me; while they say daily unto me, Where is thy God?
verses.ar: بِسَحْقٍ فِي عِظَامِي عَيَّرَنِي مُضَايِقِيَّ، بِقَوْلِهِمْ لِي كُلَّ يَوْمٍ: «أَيْنَ إِلَهُكَ؟».

verses.en: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why art thou disquieted within me? hope thou in God: for I shall yet praise him, who is the health of my countenance, and my God.
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا أَنْتِ مُنْحَنِيَةٌ يَا نَفْسِي؟ وَلِمَاذَا تَئِنِّينَ فِيَّ؟ تَرَجَّيِ ٱللهَ، لِأَنِّي بَعْدُ أَحْمَدُهُ، خَلَاصَ وَجْهِي وَإِلَهِي.

verses.en: Judge me, O God, and plead my cause against an ungodly nation: O deliver me from the deceitful and unjust man.
verses.ar: اِقْضِ لِي يَا ٱللهُ، وَخَاصِمْ مُخَاصَمَتِي مَعَ أُمَّةٍ غَيْرِ رَاحِمَةٍ، وَمِنْ إِنْسَانِ غِشٍّ وَظُلْمٍ نَجِّنِي.

verses.en: For thou art the God of my strength: why dost thou cast me off? why go I mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?
verses.ar: لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ إِلَهُ حِصْنِي. لِمَاذَا رَفَضْتَنِي؟ لِمَاذَا أَتَمَشَّى حَزِينًا مِنْ مُضَايَقَةِ ٱلْعَدُوِّ؟

verses.en: O send out thy light and thy truth: let them lead me; let them bring me unto thy holy hill, and to thy tabernacles.
verses.ar: أَرْسِلْ نُورَكَ وَحَقَّكَ، هُمَا يَهْدِيَانِنِي وَيَأْتِيَانِبِي إِلَى جَبَلِ قُدْسِكَ وَإِلَى مَسَاكِنِكَ.

verses.en: Then will I go unto the altar of God, unto God my exceeding joy: yea, upon the harp will I praise thee, O God my God.
verses.ar: فَآتِي إِلَى مَذْبَحِ ٱللهِ، إِلَى ٱللهِ بَهْجَةِ فَرَحِي، وَأَحْمَدُكَ بِٱلْعُودِ يَا ٱللهُ إِلَهِي.

verses.en: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why art thou disquieted within me? hope in God: for I shall yet praise him, who is the health of my countenance, and my God.
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا أَنْتِ مُنْحَنِيَةٌ يَا نَفْسِي؟ وَلِمَاذَا تَئِنِّينَ فِيَّ؟ تَرَجَّيِ ٱللهَ، لِأَنِّي بَعْدُ أَحْمَدُهُ، خَلَاصَ وَجْهِي وَإِلَهِي.

verses.en: We have heard with our ears, O God, our fathers have told us, what work thou didst in their days, in the times of old.
verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ، بِآذَانِنَا قَدْ سَمِعْنَا. آبَاؤُنَا أَخْبَرُونَا بِعَمَلٍ عَمِلْتَهُ فِي أَيَّامِهِمْ، فِي أَيَّامِ ٱلْقِدَمِ.

verses.en: How thou didst drive out the heathen with thy hand, and plantedst them; how thou didst afflict the people, and cast them out.
verses.ar: أَنْتَ بِيَدِكَ ٱسْتَأْصَلْتَ ٱلْأُمَمَ وَغَرَسْتَهُمْ. حَطَّمْتَ شُعُوبًا وَمَدَدْتَهُمْ.

verses.en: For they got not the land in possession by their own sword, neither did their own arm save them: but thy right hand, and thine arm, and the light of thy countenance, because thou hadst a favour unto them.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ لَيْسَ بِسَيْفِهِمْ ٱمْتَلَكُوا ٱلْأَرْضَ، وَلَا ذِرَاعُهُمْ خَلَّصَتْهُمْ، لَكِنْ يَمِينُكَ وَذِرَاعُكَ وَنُورُ وَجْهِكَ، لِأَنَّكَ رَضِيتَ عَنْهُمْ.

verses.en: Thou art my King, O God: command deliverances for Jacob.
verses.ar: أَنْتَ هُوَ مَلِكِي يَا ٱللهُ، فَأْمُرْ بِخَلَاصِ يَعْقُوبَ.

verses.en: Through thee will we push down our enemies: through thy name will we tread them under that rise up against us.
verses.ar: بِكَ نَنْطَحُ مُضَايِقِينَا. بِٱسْمِكَ نَدُوسُ ٱلْقَائِمِينَ عَلَيْنَا.

verses.en: For I will not trust in my bow, neither shall my sword save me.
verses.ar: لِأَنِّي عَلَى قَوْسِي لَا أَتَّكِلُ، وَسَيْفِي لَا يُخَلِّصُنِي.

verses.en: But thou hast saved us from our enemies, and hast put them to shame that hated us.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ خَلَّصْتَنَا مِنْ مُضَايِقِينَا، وَأَخْزَيْتَ مُبْغِضِينَا.

verses.en: In God we boast all the day long, and praise thy name for ever. Selah.
verses.ar: بِٱللهِ نَفْتَخِرُ ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ، وَٱسْمَكَ نَحْمَدُ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: But thou hast cast off, and put us to shame; and goest not forth with our armies.
verses.ar: لَكِنَّكَ قَدْ رَفَضْتَنَا وَأَخْجَلْتَنَا، وَلَا تَخْرُجُ مَعَ جُنُودِنَا.

verses.en: Thou makest us to turn back from the enemy: and they which hate us spoil for themselves.
verses.ar: تُرْجِعُنَا إِلَى ٱلْوَرَاءِ عَنِ ٱلْعَدُوِّ، وَمُبْغِضُونَا نَهَبُوا لِأَنْفُسِهِمْ.

verses.en: Thou hast given us like sheep appointed for meat; and hast scattered us among the heathen.
verses.ar: جَعَلْتَنَا كَٱلضَّأْنِ أُكْلًا. ذَرَّيْتَنَا بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ.

verses.en: Thou sellest thy people for nought, and dost not increase thy wealth by their price.
verses.ar: بِعْتَ شَعْبَكَ بِغَيْرِ مَالٍ، وَمَا رَبِحْتَ بِثَمَنِهِمْ.

verses.en: Thou makest us a reproach to our neighbours, a scorn and a derision to them that are round about us.
verses.ar: تَجْعَلُنَا عَارًا عِنْدَ جِيرَانِنَا، هُزْأَةً وَسُخْرَةً لِلَّذِينَ حَوْلَنَا.

verses.en: Thou makest us a byword among the heathen, a shaking of the head among the people.
verses.ar: تَجْعَلُنَا مَثَلًا بَيْنَ ٱلشُّعُوبِ. لِإِنْغَاضِ ٱلرَّأْسِ بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ.

verses.en: My confusion is continually before me, and the shame of my face hath covered me,
verses.ar: ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ خَجَلِي أَمَامِي، وَخِزْيُ وَجْهِي قَدْ غَطَّانِي.

verses.en: For the voice of him that reproacheth and blasphemeth; by reason of the enemy and avenger.
verses.ar: مِنْ صَوْتِ ٱلْمُعَيِّرِ وَٱلشَّاتِمِ. مِنْ وَجْهِ عَدُوٍّ وَمُنْتَقِمٍ.

verses.en: All this is come upon us; yet have we not forgotten thee, neither have we dealt falsely in thy covenant.
verses.ar: هَذَا كُلُّهُ جَاءَ عَلَيْنَا، وَمَا نَسِينَاكَ وَلَا خُنَّا فِي عَهْدِكَ.

verses.en: Our heart is not turned back, neither have our steps declined from thy way;
verses.ar: لَمْ يَرْتَدَّ قَلْبُنَا إِلَى وَرَاءٍ، وَلَا مَالَتْ خَطْوَتُنَا عَنْ طَرِيقِكَ،

verses.en: Though thou hast sore broken us in the place of dragons, and covered us with the shadow of death.
verses.ar: حَتَّى سَحَقْتَنَا فِي مَكَانِ ٱلتَّنَانِينِ، وَغَطَّيْتَنَا بِظِلِّ ٱلْمَوْتِ.

verses.en: If we have forgotten the name of our God, or stretched out our hands to a strange god;
verses.ar: إِنْ نَسِينَا ٱسْمَ إِلَهِنَا أَوْ بَسَطْنَا أَيْدِيَنَا إِلَى إِلَهٍ غَرِيبٍ،

verses.en: Shall not God search this out? for he knoweth the secrets of the heart.
verses.ar: أَفَلَا يَفْحَصُ ٱللهُ عَنْ هَذَا؟ لِأَنَّهُ هُوَ يَعْرِفُ خَفِيَّاتِ ٱلْقَلْبِ.

verses.en: Yea, for thy sake are we killed all the day long; we are counted as sheep for the slaughter.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّنَا مِنْ أَجْلِكَ نُمَاتُ ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ. قَدْ حُسِبْنَا مِثْلَ غَنَمٍ لِلذَّبْحِ.

verses.en: Awake, why sleepest thou, O Lord? arise, cast us not off for ever.
verses.ar: اِسْتَيْقِظْ! لِمَاذَا تَتَغَافَى يَارَبُّ؟ ٱنْتَبِهْ! لَا تَرْفُضْ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Wherefore hidest thou thy face, and forgettest our affliction and our oppression?
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا تَحْجُبُ وَجْهَكَ وَتَنْسَى مَذَلَّتَنَا وَضِيقَنَا؟

verses.en: For our soul is bowed down to the dust: our belly cleaveth unto the earth.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ أَنْفُسَنَا مُنْحَنِيَةٌ إِلَى ٱلتُّرَابِ. لَصِقَتْ فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ بُطُونُنَا.

verses.en: Arise for our help, and redeem us for thy mercies’ sake.
verses.ar: قُمْ عَوْنًا لَنَا وَٱفْدِنَا مِنْ أَجْلِ رَحْمَتِكَ.

verses.en: My heart is inditing a good matter: I speak of the things which I have made touching the king: my tongue is the pen of a ready writer.
verses.ar: فَاضَ قَلْبِي بِكَلَامٍ صَالِحٍ. مُتَكَلِّمٌ أَنَا بِإِنْشَائِي لِلْمَلِكِ. لِسَانِي قَلَمُ كَاتِبٍ مَاهِرٍ.

verses.en: Thou art fairer than the children of men: grace is poured into thy lips: therefore God hath blessed thee for ever.
verses.ar: أَنْتَ أَبْرَعُ جَمَالًا مِنْ بَنِي ٱلْبَشَرِ. ٱنْسَكَبَتِ ٱلنِّعْمَةُ عَلَى شَفَتَيْكَ، لِذَلِكَ بَارَكَكَ ٱللهُ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Gird thy sword upon thy thigh, O most mighty, with thy glory and thy majesty.
verses.ar: تَقَلَّدْ سَيْفَكَ عَلَى فَخْذِكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْجَبَّارُ، جَلَالَكَ وَبَهَاءَكَ.

verses.en: And in thy majesty ride prosperously because of truth and meekness and righteousness; and thy right hand shall teach thee terrible things.
verses.ar: وَبِجَلَالِكَ ٱقْتَحِمِ. ٱرْكَبْ. مِنْ أَجْلِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَٱلدَّعَةِ وَٱلْبِرِّ، فَتُرِيَكَ يَمِينُكَ مَخَاوِفَ.

verses.en: Thine arrows are sharp in the heart of the king’s enemies; whereby the people fall under thee.
verses.ar: نَبْلُكَ ٱلْمَسْنُونَةُ فِي قَلْبِ أَعْدَاءِ ٱلْمَلِكِ. شُعُوبٌ تَحْتَكَ يَسْقُطُونَ.

verses.en: Thy throne, O God, is for ever and ever: the sceptre of thy kingdom is a right sceptre.
verses.ar: كُرْسِيُّكَ يَا ٱللهُ إِلَى دَهْرِ ٱلدُّهُورِ. قَضِيبُ ٱسْتِقَامَةٍ قَضِيبُ مُلْكِكَ.

verses.en: Thou lovest righteousness, and hatest wickedness: therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.
verses.ar: أَحْبَبْتَ ٱلْبِرَّ وَأَبْغَضْتَ ٱلْإِثْمَ، مِنْ أَجْلِ ذَلِكَ مَسَحَكَ ٱللهُ إِلَهُكَ بِدُهْنِ ٱلِٱبْتِهَاجِ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ رُفَقَائِكَ.

verses.en: All thy garments smell of myrrh, and aloes, and cassia, out of the ivory palaces, whereby they have made thee glad.
verses.ar: كُلُّ ثِيَابِكَ مُرٌّ وَعُودٌ وَسَلِيخَةٌ. مِنْ قُصُورِ ٱلْعَاجِ سَرَّتْكَ ٱلْأَوْتَارُ.

verses.en: Kings’ daughters were among thy honourable women: upon thy right hand did stand the queen in gold of Ophir.
verses.ar: بَنَاتُ مُلُوكٍ بَيْنَ حَظِيَّاتِكَ. جُعِلَتِ ٱلْمَلِكَةُ عَنْ يَمِينِكَ بِذَهَبِ أُوفِيرٍ.

verses.en: Hearken, O daughter, and consider, and incline thine ear; forget also thine own people, and thy father’s house;
verses.ar: اِسْمَعِي يَا بِنْتُ وَٱنْظُرِي، وَأَمِيلِي أُذُنَكِ، وَٱنْسَيْ شَعْبَكِ وَبَيْتَ أَبِيكِ،

verses.en: So shall the king greatly desire thy beauty: for he is thy Lord; and worship thou him.
verses.ar: فَيَشْتَهِيَ ٱلْمَلِكُ حُسْنَكِ، لِأَنَّهُ هُوَ سَيِّدُكِ فَٱسْجُدِي لَهُ.

verses.en: And the daughter of Tyre shall be there with a gift; even the rich among the people shall intreat thy favour.
verses.ar: وَبِنْتُ صُورٍ أَغْنَى ٱلشُّعُوبِ تَتَرَضَّى وَجْهَكِ بِهَدِيَّةٍ.

verses.en: The king’s daughter is all glorious within: her clothing is of wrought gold.
verses.ar: كُلُّهَا مَجْدٌ ٱبْنَةُ ٱلْمَلِكِ فِي خِدْرِهَا. مَنْسُوجَةٌ بِذَهَبٍ مَلَابِسُهَا.

verses.en: She shall be brought unto the king in raiment of needlework: the virgins her companions that follow her shall be brought unto thee.
verses.ar: بِمَلَابِسَ مُطَرَّزَةٍ تُحْضَرُ إِلَى ٱلْمَلِكِ. في إِثْرِهَا عَذَارَى صَاحِبَاتُهَا. مُقَدَّمَاتٌ إِلَيْكَ.

verses.en: With gladness and rejoicing shall they be brought: they shall enter into the king’s palace.
verses.ar: يُحْضَرْنَ بِفَرَحٍ وَٱبْتِهَاجٍ. يَدْخُلْنَ إِلَى قَصْرِ ٱلْمَلِكِ.

verses.en: Instead of thy fathers shall be thy children, whom thou mayest make princes in all the earth.
verses.ar: عِوَضًا عَنْ آبَائِكَ يَكُونُ بَنُوكَ، تُقِيمُهُمْ رُؤَسَاءَ فِي كُلِّ ٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: I will make thy name to be remembered in all generations: therefore shall the people praise thee for ever and ever.
verses.ar: أَذْكُرُ ٱسْمَكَ فِي كُلِّ دَوْرٍ فَدَوْرٍ. مِنْ أَجْلِ ذَلِكَ تَحْمَدُكَ ٱلشُّعُوبُ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ وَٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
verses.ar: ٱللهُ لَنَا مَلْجَأٌ وَقُوَّةٌ. عَوْنًا فِي ٱلضِّيْقَاتِ وُجِدَ شَدِيدًا.

verses.en: Therefore will not we fear, though the earth be removed, and though the mountains be carried into the midst of the sea;
verses.ar: لِذَلِكَ لَا نَخْشَى وَلَوْ تَزَحْزَحَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ، وَلَوِ ٱنْقَلَبَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ إِلَى قَلْبِ ٱلْبِحَارِ.

verses.en: Though the waters thereof roar and be troubled, though the mountains shake with the swelling thereof. Selah.
verses.ar: تَعِجُّ وَتَجِيشُ مِيَاهُهَا. تَتَزَعْزَعُ ٱلْجِبَالُ بِطُمُوِّهَا. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: There is a river, the streams whereof shall make glad the city of God, the holy place of the tabernacles of the most High.
verses.ar: نَهْرٌ سَوَاقِيهِ تُفَرِّحُ مَدِينَةَ ٱللهِ، مَقْدِسَ مَسَاكِنِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ.

verses.en: God is in the midst of her; she shall not be moved: God shall help her, and that right early.
verses.ar: ٱللهُ فِي وَسَطِهَا فَلَنْ تَتَزَعْزَعَ. يُعِينُهَا ٱللهُ عِنْدَ إِقْبَالِ ٱلصُّبْحِ.

verses.en: The heathen raged, the kingdoms were moved: he uttered his voice, the earth melted.
verses.ar: عَجَّتِ ٱلْأُمَمُ. تَزَعْزَعَتِ ٱلْمَمَالِكُ. أَعْطَى صَوْتَهُ، ذَابَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ.

verses.en: The Lord of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our refuge. Selah.
verses.ar: رَبُّ ٱلْجُنُودِ مَعَنَا. مَلْجَأُنَا إِلَهُ يَعْقُوبَ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: Come, behold the works of the Lord, what desolations he hath made in the earth.
verses.ar: هَلُمُّوا ٱنْظُرُوا أَعْمَالَ ٱللهِ، كَيْفَ جَعَلَ خِرَبًا فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: He maketh wars to cease unto the end of the earth; he breaketh the bow, and cutteth the spear in sunder; he burneth the chariot in the fire.
verses.ar: مُسَكِّنُ ٱلْحُرُوبِ إِلَى أَقْصَى ٱلْأَرْضِ. يَكْسِرُ ٱلْقَوْسَ وَيَقْطَعُ ٱلرُّمْحَ. ٱلْمَرْكَبَاتُ يُحْرِقُهَا بِٱلنَّارِ.

verses.en: Be still, and know that I am God: I will be exalted among the heathen, I will be exalted in the earth.
verses.ar: كُفُّوا وَٱعْلَمُوا أَنِّي أَنَا ٱللهُ. أَتَعَالَى بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ، أَتَعَالَى فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: The Lord of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our refuge. Selah.
verses.ar: رَبُّ ٱلْجُنُودِ مَعَنَا. مَلْجَأُنَا إِلَهُ يَعْقُوبَ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: O clap your hands, all ye people; shout unto God with the voice of triumph.
verses.ar: يَا جَمِيعَ ٱلْأُمَمِ صَفِّقُوا بِٱلْأَيَادِي. ٱهْتِفُوا لِلهِ بِصَوْتِ ٱلِٱبْتِهَاجِ.

verses.en: For the Lord most high is terrible; he is a great King over all the earth.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱلرَّبَّ عَلِيٌّ مَخُوفٌ، مَلِكٌ كَبِيرٌ عَلَى كُلِّ ٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: He shall subdue the people under us, and the nations under our feet.
verses.ar: يُخْضِعُ ٱلشُّعُوبَ تَحْتَنَا، وَٱلْأُمَمَ تَحْتَ أَقْدَامِنَا.

verses.en: He shall choose our inheritance for us, the excellency of Jacob whom he loved. Selah.
verses.ar: يَخْتَارُ لَنَا نَصِيبَنَا، فَخْرَ يَعْقُوبَ ٱلَّذِي أَحَبَّهُ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: God is gone up with a shout, the Lord with the sound of a trumpet.
verses.ar: صَعِدَ ٱللهُ بِهُتَافٍ، ٱلرَّبُّ بِصَوْتِ ٱلصُّورِ.

verses.en: Sing praises to God, sing praises: sing praises unto our King, sing praises.
verses.ar: رَنِّمُوا لِلهِ، رَنِّمُوا. رَنِّمُوا لِمَلِكِنَا، رَنِّمُوا.

verses.en: For God is the King of all the earth: sing ye praises with understanding.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱللهَ مَلِكُ ٱلْأَرْضِ كُلِّهَا، رَنِّمُوا قَصِيدَةً.

verses.en: God reigneth over the heathen: God sitteth upon the throne of his holiness.
verses.ar: مَلَكَ ٱللهُ عَلَى ٱلْأُمَمِ. ٱللهُ جَلَسَ عَلَى كُرْسِيِّ قُدْسِهِ.

verses.en: The princes of the people are gathered together, even the people of the God of Abraham: for the shields of the earth belong unto God: he is greatly exalted.
verses.ar: شُرَفَاءُ ٱلشُّعُوبِ ٱجْتَمَعُوا. شَعْبُ إِلَهِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ. لِأَنَّ لِلهِ مَجَانَّ ٱلْأَرْضِ. هُوَ مُتَعَالٍ جِدًّا.

verses.en: Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised in the city of our God, in the mountain of his holiness.
verses.ar: عَظِيمٌ هُوَ ٱلرَّبُّ وَحَمِيدٌ جِدًّا فِي مَدِينَةِ إِلَهِنَا، جَبَلِ قُدْسِهِ.

verses.en: Beautiful for situation, the joy of the whole earth, is mount Zion, on the sides of the north, the city of the great King.
verses.ar: جَمِيلُ ٱلِٱرْتِفَاعِ، فَرَحُ كُلِّ ٱلْأَرْضِ، جَبَلُ صِهْيَوْنَ. فَرَحُ أَقَاصِي ٱلشِّمَالِ، مَدِينَةُ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ.

verses.en: God is known in her palaces for a refuge.
verses.ar: ٱللهُ فِي قُصُورِهَا يُعْرَفُ مَلْجَأً.

verses.en: For, lo, the kings were assembled, they passed by together.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ هُوَذَا ٱلْمُلُوكُ ٱجْتَمَعُوا. مَضَوْا جَمِيعًا.

verses.en: They saw it, and so they marvelled; they were troubled, and hasted away.
verses.ar: لَمَّا رَأَوْا بُهِتُوا، ٱرْتَاعُوا، فَرُّوا.

verses.en: Fear took hold upon them there, and pain, as of a woman in travail.
verses.ar: أَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلرِّعْدَةُ هُنَاكَ، وَٱلْمَخَاضُ كَوَالِدَةٍ.

verses.en: Thou breakest the ships of Tarshish with an east wind.
verses.ar: بِرِيحٍ شَرْقِيَّةٍ تَكْسِرُ سُفُنَ تَرْشِيشَ.

verses.en: As we have heard, so have we seen in the city of the Lord of hosts, in the city of our God: God will establish it for ever. Selah.
verses.ar: كَمَا سَمِعْنَا هَكَذَا رَأَيْنَا فِي مَدِينَةِ رَبِّ ٱلْجُنُودِ، فِي مَدِينَةِ إِلَهِنَا. ٱللهُ يُثَبِّتُهَا إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: We have thought of thy lovingkindness, O God, in the midst of thy temple.
verses.ar: ذَكَرْنَا يَا ٱللهُ رَحْمَتَكَ فِي وَسَطِ هَيْكَلِكَ.

verses.en: According to thy name, O God, so is thy praise unto the ends of the earth: thy right hand is full of righteousness.
verses.ar: نَظِيرُ ٱسْمِكَ يَا ٱللهُ تَسْبِيحُكَ إِلَى أَقَاصِي ٱلْأَرْضِ. يَمِينُكَ مَلآنَةٌ بِرًّا.

verses.en: Let mount Zion rejoice, let the daughters of Judah be glad, because of thy judgments.
verses.ar: يَفْرَحُ جَبَلُ صِهْيَوْنَ، تَبْتَهِجُ بَنَاتُ يَهُوذَا مِنْ أَجْلِ أَحْكَامِكَ.

verses.en: Walk about Zion, and go round about her: tell the towers thereof.
verses.ar: طُوفُوا بِصِهْيَوْنَ، وَدُورُوا حَوْلَهَا. عُدُّوا أَبْرَاجَهَا.

verses.en: Mark ye well her bulwarks, consider her palaces; that ye may tell it to the generation following.
verses.ar: ضَعُوا قُلُوبَكُمْ عَلَى مَتَارِسِهَا. تَأَمَّلُوا قُصُورَهَا لِكَيْ تُحَدِّثُوا بِهَا جِيلًا آخَرَ.

verses.en: For this God is our God for ever and ever: he will be our guide even unto death.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱللهَ هَذَا هُوَ إِلَهُنَا إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ وَٱلْأَبَدِ. هُوَ يَهْدِينَا حَتَّى إِلَى ٱلْمَوْتِ.

verses.en: Hear this, all ye people; give ear, all ye inhabitants of the world:
verses.ar: اِسْمَعُوا هَذَا يَا جَمِيعَ ٱلشُّعُوبِ. أَصْغُوا يَا جَمِيعَ سُكَّانِ ٱلدُّنْيَا،

verses.en: Both low and high, rich and poor, together.
verses.ar: عَالٍ وَدُونٍ، أَغْنِيَاءَ وَفُقَرَاءَ، سَوَاءً.

verses.en: My mouth shall speak of wisdom; and the meditation of my heart shall be of understanding.
verses.ar: فَمِي يَتَكَلَّمُ بِٱلْحِكَمِ، وَلَهَجُ قَلْبِي فَهْمٌ.

verses.en: I will incline mine ear to a parable: I will open my dark saying upon the harp.
verses.ar: أُمِيلُ أُذُنِي إِلَى مَثَلٍ، وَأُوضِّحُ بِعُودٍ لُغْزِي.

verses.en: Wherefore should I fear in the days of evil, when the iniquity of my heels shall compass me about?
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا أَخَافُ فِي أَيَّامِ ٱلشَّرِّ عِنْدَمَا يُحِيطُ بِي إِثْمُ مُتَعَقِّبِيَّ؟

verses.en: They that trust in their wealth, and boast themselves in the multitude of their riches;
verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَّكِلُونَ عَلَى ثَرْوَتِهِمْ، وَبِكَثْرَةِ غِنَاهُمْ يَفْتَخِرُونَ.

verses.en: None of them can by any means redeem his brother, nor give to God a ransom for him:
verses.ar: ٱلْأَخُ لَنْ يَفْدِيَ ٱلْإِنْسَانَ فِدَاءً، وَلَا يُعْطِيَ ٱللهَ كَفَّارَةً عَنْهُ.

verses.en: (For the redemption of their soul is precious, and it ceaseth for ever:)
verses.ar: وَكَرِيمَةٌ هِيَ فِدْيَةُ نُفُوسِهِمْ، فَغَلِقَتْ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ.

verses.en: That he should still live for ever, and not see corruption.
verses.ar: حَتَّى يَحْيَا إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ فَلَا يَرَى ٱلْقَبْرَ.

verses.en: For he seeth that wise men die, likewise the fool and the brutish person perish, and leave their wealth to others.
verses.ar: بَلْ يَرَاهُ! ٱلْحُكَمَاءُ يَمُوتُونَ. كَذَلِكَ ٱلْجَاهِلُ وَٱلْبَلِيدُ يَهْلِكَانِ، وَيَتْرُكَانِ ثَرْوَتَهُمَا لِآخَرِينَ.

verses.en: Their inward thought is, that their houses shall continue for ever, and their dwelling places to all generations; they call their lands after their own names.
verses.ar: بَاطِنُهُمْ أَنَّ بُيُوتَهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ، مَسَاكِنَهُمْ إِلَى دَوْرٍ فَدَوْرٍ. يُنَادُونَ بِأَسْمَائِهِمْ فِي ٱلْأَرَاضِي.

verses.en: Nevertheless man being in honour abideth not: he is like the beasts that perish.
verses.ar: وَٱلْإِنْسَانُ فِي كَرَامَةٍ لَا يَبِيتُ. يُشْبِهُ ٱلْبَهَائِمَ ٱلَّتِي تُبَادُ.

verses.en: This their way is their folly: yet their posterity approve their sayings. Selah.
verses.ar: هَذَا طَرِيقُهُمُ ٱعْتِمَادُهُمْ، وَخُلَفَاؤُهُمْ يَرْتَضُونَ بِأَقْوَالِهِمْ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: Like sheep they are laid in the grave; death shall feed on them; and the upright shall have dominion over them in the morning; and their beauty shall consume in the grave from their dwelling.
verses.ar: مِثْلَ ٱلْغَنَمِ لِلْهَاوِيَةِ يُسَاقُونَ. ٱلْمَوْتُ يَرْعَاهُمْ، وَيَسُودُهُمُ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمُونَ. غَدَاةً وَصُورَتُهُمْ تَبْلَى. ٱلْهَاوِيَةُ مَسْكَنٌ لَهُمْ.

verses.en: But God will redeem my soul from the power of the grave: for he shall receive me. Selah.
verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱللهُ يَفْدِي نَفْسِي مِنْ يَدِ ٱلْهَاوِيَةِ لِأَنَّهُ يَأْخُذُنِي. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: Be not thou afraid when one is made rich, when the glory of his house is increased;
verses.ar: لَا تَخْشَ إِذَا ٱسْتَغْنَى إِنْسَانٌ، إِذَا زَادَ مَجْدُ بَيْتِهِ.

verses.en: For when he dieth he shall carry nothing away: his glory shall not descend after him.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ عِنْدَ مَوْتِهِ كُلَّهُ لَا يَأْخُذُ. لَا يَنْزِلُ وَرَاءَهُ مَجْدُهُ.

verses.en: Though while he lived he blessed his soul: and men will praise thee, when thou doest well to thyself.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ فِي حَيَاتِهِ يُبَارِكُ نَفْسَهُ، وَيَحْمَدُونَكَ إِذَا أَحْسَنْتَ إِلَى نَفْسِكَ.

verses.en: He shall go to the generation of his fathers; they shall never see light.
verses.ar: تَدْخُلُ إِلَى جِيلِ آبَائِهِ، ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُعَايِنُونَ ٱلنُّورَ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Man that is in honour, and understandeth not, is like the beasts that perish.
verses.ar: إِنْسَانٌ فِي كَرَامَةٍ وَلَا يَفْهَمُ يُشْبِهُ ٱلْبَهَائِمَ ٱلَّتِي تُبَادُ.

verses.en: The mighty God, even the Lord, hath spoken, and called the earth from the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof.
verses.ar: إِلَهُ ٱلْآلِهَةِ ٱلرَّبُّ تَكَلَّمَ، وَدَعَا ٱلْأَرْضَ مِنْ مَشْرِقِ ٱلشَّمْسِ إِلَى مَغْرِبِهَا.

verses.en: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God hath shined.
verses.ar: مِنْ صِهْيَوْنَ، كَمَالِ ٱلْجَمَالِ، ٱللهُ أَشْرَقَ.

verses.en: Our God shall come, and shall not keep silence: a fire shall devour before him, and it shall be very tempestuous round about him.
verses.ar: يَأْتِي إِلَهُنَا وَلَا يَصْمُتُ. نَارٌ قُدَّامَهُ تَأْكُلُ، وَحَوْلَهُ عَاصِفٌ جِدًّا.

verses.en: He shall call to the heavens from above, and to the earth, that he may judge his people.
verses.ar: يَدْعُو ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ مِنْ فَوْقُ، وَٱلْأَرْضَ إِلَى مُدَايَنَةِ شَعْبِهِ:

verses.en: Gather my saints together unto me; those that have made a covenant with me by sacrifice.
verses.ar: «ٱجْمَعُوا إِلَيَّ أَتْقِيَائِي، ٱلْقَاطِعِينَ عَهْدِي عَلَى ذَبِيحَةٍ».

verses.en: And the heavens shall declare his righteousness: for God is judge himself. Selah.
verses.ar: وَتُخْبِرُ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتُ بِعَدْلِهِ، لِأَنَّ ٱللهَ هُوَ ٱلدَّيَّانُ. سِلَاهْ.

verses.en: Hear, O my people, and I will speak; O Israel, and I will testify against thee: I am God, even thy God.
verses.ar: «اِسْمَعْ يَا شَعْبِي فَأَتَكَلَّمَ. يَا إِسْرَائِيلُ فَأَشْهَدَ عَلَيْكَ: ٱللهُ إِلَهُكَ أَنَا.

verses.en: I will not reprove thee for thy sacrifices or thy burnt offerings, to have been continually before me.
verses.ar: لَا عَلَى ذَبَائِحِكَ أُوَبِّخُكَ، فَإِنَّ مُحْرَقَاتِكَ هِيَ دَائِمًا قُدَّامِي.

verses.en: I will take no bullock out of thy house, nor he goats out of thy folds.
verses.ar: لَا آخُذُ مِنْ بَيْتِكَ ثَوْرًا، وَلَا مِنْ حَظَائِرِكَ أَعْتِدَةً.

verses.en: For every beast of the forest is mine, and the cattle upon a thousand hills.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ لِي حَيَوَانَ ٱلْوَعْرِ وَٱلْبَهَائِمَ عَلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ ٱلْأُلُوفِ.

verses.en: I know all the fowls of the mountains: and the wild beasts of the field are mine.
verses.ar: قَدْ عَلِمْتُ كُلَّ طُيُورِ ٱلْجِبَالِ، وَوُحُوشُ ٱلْبَرِّيَّةِ عِنْدِي.

verses.en: If I were hungry, I would not tell thee: for the world is mine, and the fulness thereof.
verses.ar: إِنْ جُعْتُ فَلَا أَقُولُ لَكَ، لِأَنَّ لِي ٱلْمَسْكُونَةَ وَمِلْأَهَا.

verses.en: Will I eat the flesh of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?
verses.ar: هَلْ آكُلُ لَحْمَ ٱلثِّيرَانِ، أَوْ أَشْرَبُ دَمَ ٱلتُّيُوسِ؟

verses.en: Offer unto God thanksgiving; and pay thy vows unto the most High:
verses.ar: اِذْبَحْ لِلهِ حَمْدًا، وَأَوْفِ ٱلْعَلِيَّ نُذُورَكَ،

verses.en: And call upon me in the day of trouble: I will deliver thee, and thou shalt glorify me.
verses.ar: وَٱدْعُنِي فِي يَوْمِ ٱلضِّيقِ أُنْقِذْكَ فَتُمَجِّدَنِي».

verses.en: But unto the wicked God saith, What hast thou to do to declare my statutes, or that thou shouldest take my covenant in thy mouth?
verses.ar: وَلِلشِّرِّيرِ قَالَ ٱللهُ: «مَا لَكَ تُحَدِّثُ بِفَرَائِضِي وَتَحْمِلُ عَهْدِي عَلَى فَمِكَ؟

verses.en: Seeing thou hatest instruction, and castest my words behind thee.
verses.ar: وَأَنْتَ قَدْ أَبْغَضْتَ ٱلتَّأْدِيبَ وَأَلْقَيْتَ كَلَامِي خَلْفَكَ.

verses.en: When thou sawest a thief, then thou consentedst with him, and hast been partaker with adulterers.
verses.ar: إِذَا رَأَيْتَ سَارِقًا وَافَقْتَهُ، وَمَعَ ٱلزُّنَاةِ نَصِيبُكَ.

verses.en: Thou givest thy mouth to evil, and thy tongue frameth deceit.
verses.ar: أَطْلَقْتَ فَمَكَ بِٱلشَّرِّ، وَلِسَانُكَ يَخْتَرِعُ غِشًّا.

verses.en: Thou sittest and speakest against thy brother; thou slanderest thine own mother’s son.
verses.ar: تَجْلِسُ تَتَكَلَّمُ عَلَى أَخِيكَ. لِٱبْنِ أُمِّكَ تَضَعُ مَعْثَرَةً.

verses.en: These things hast thou done, and I kept silence; thou thoughtest that I was altogether such an one as thyself: but I will reprove thee, and set them in order before thine eyes.
verses.ar: هَذِهِ صَنَعْتَ وَسَكَتُّ. ظَنَنْتَ أَنِّي مِثْلُكَ. أُوَبِّخُكَ، وَأَصُفُّ خَطَايَاكَ أَمَامَ عَيْنَيْكَ.

verses.en: Now consider this, ye that forget God, lest I tear you in pieces, and there be none to deliver.
verses.ar: ٱفْهَمُوا هَذَا يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُونَ ٱللهَ، لِئَلَّا أَفْتَرِسَكُمْ وَلَا مُنْقِذَ.

verses.en: Whoso offereth praise glorifieth me: and to him that ordereth his conversation aright will I shew the salvation of God.
verses.ar: ذَابِحُ ٱلْحَمْدِ يُمَجِّدُنِي، وَٱلْمُقَوِّمُ طَرِيقَهُ أُرِيهِ خَلَاصَ ٱللهِ».

verses.en: Have mercy upon me, O God, according to thy lovingkindness: according unto the multitude of thy tender mercies blot out my transgressions.
verses.ar: اِرْحَمْنِي يَا ٱللهُ حَسَبَ رَحْمَتِكَ. حَسَبَ كَثْرَةِ رَأْفَتِكَ ٱمْحُ مَعَاصِيَّ.

verses.en: Wash me throughly from mine iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin.
verses.ar: ٱغْسِلْنِي كَثِيرًا مِنْ إِثْمِي، وَمِنْ خَطِيَّتِي طَهِّرْنِي.

verses.en: For I acknowledge my transgressions: and my sin is ever before me.
verses.ar: لِأَنِّي عَارِفٌ بِمَعَاصِيَّ، وَخَطِيَّتِي أَمَامِي دَائِمًا.

verses.en: Against thee, thee only, have I sinned, and done this evil in thy sight: that thou mightest be justified when thou speakest, and be clear when thou judgest.
verses.ar: إِلَيْكَ وَحْدَكَ أَخْطَأْتُ، وَٱلشَّرَّ قُدَّامَ عَيْنَيْكَ صَنَعْتُ، لِكَيْ تَتَبَرَّرَ فِي أَقْوَالِكَ، وَتَزْكُوَ فِي قَضَائِكَ.

verses.en: Behold, I was shapen in iniquity; and in sin did my mother conceive me.
verses.ar: هَأَنَذَا بِٱلْإِثْمِ صُوِّرْتُ، وَبِٱلْخَطِيَّةِ حَبِلَتْ بِي أُمِّي.

verses.en: Behold, thou desirest truth in the inward parts: and in the hidden part thou shalt make me to know wisdom.
verses.ar: هَا قَدْ سُرِرْتَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فِي ٱلْبَاطِنِ، فَفِي ٱلسَّرِيرَةِ تُعَرِّفُنِي حِكْمَةً.

verses.en: Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean: wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.
verses.ar: طَهِّرْنِي بِٱلزُّوفَا فَأَطْهُرَ. ٱغْسِلْنِي فَأَبْيَضَّ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ ٱلثَّلْجِ.

verses.en: Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which thou hast broken may rejoice.
verses.ar: أَسْمِعْنِي سُرُورًا وَفَرَحًا، فَتَبْتَهِجَ عِظَامٌ سَحَقْتَهَا.

verses.en: Hide thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities.
verses.ar: ٱسْتُرْ وَجْهَكَ عَنْ خَطَايَايَ، وَٱمْحُ كُلَّ آثَامِي.

verses.en: Create in me a clean heart, O God; and renew a right spirit within me.
verses.ar: قَلْبًا نَقِيًّا ٱخْلُقْ فِيَّ يَا ٱللهُ، وَرُوحًا مُسْتَقِيمًا جَدِّدْ فِي دَاخِلِي.

verses.en: Cast me not away from thy presence; and take not thy holy spirit from me.
verses.ar: لَا تَطْرَحْنِي مِنْ قُدَّامِ وَجْهِكَ، وَرُوحَكَ ٱلْقُدُّوسَ لَا تَنْزِعْهُ مِنِّي.

verses.en: Restore unto me the joy of thy salvation; and uphold me with thy free spirit.
verses.ar: رُدَّ لِي بَهْجَةَ خَلَاصِكَ، وَبِرُوحٍ مُنْتَدِبَةٍ ٱعْضُدْنِي.

verses.en: Then will I teach transgressors thy ways; and sinners shall be converted unto thee.
verses.ar: فَأُعَلِّمَ ٱلْأَثَمَةَ طُرُقَكَ، وَٱلْخُطَاةُ إِلَيْكَ يَرْجِعُونَ.

verses.en: Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O God, thou God of my salvation: and my tongue shall sing aloud of thy righteousness.
verses.ar: نَجِّنِي مِنَ ٱلدِّمَاءِ يَا ٱللهُ، إِلَهَ خَلَاصِي، فَيُسَبِّحَ لِسَانِي بِرَّكَ.

verses.en: O Lord, open thou my lips; and my mouth shall shew forth thy praise.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ ٱفْتَحْ شَفَتَيَّ، فَيُخْبِرَ فَمِي بِتَسْبِيحِكَ.

verses.en: For thou desirest not sacrifice; else would I give it: thou delightest not in burnt offering.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّكَ لَا تُسَرُّ بِذَبِيحَةٍ وَإِلَّا فَكُنْتُ أُقَدِّمُهَا. بِمُحْرَقَةٍ لَا تَرْضَى.

verses.en: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit: a broken and a contrite heart, O God, thou wilt not despise.
verses.ar: ذَبَائِحُ ٱللهِ هِيَ رُوحٌ مُنْكَسِرَةٌ. ٱلْقَلْبُ ٱلْمُنْكَسِرُ وَٱلْمُنْسَحِقُ يَا ٱللهُ لَا تَحْتَقِرُهُ.

verses.en: Do good in thy good pleasure unto Zion: build thou the walls of Jerusalem.
verses.ar: أَحْسِنْ بِرِضَاكَ إِلَى صِهْيَوْنَ. ٱبْنِ أَسْوَارَ أُورُشَلِيمَ.

verses.en: Then shalt thou be pleased with the sacrifices of righteousness, with burnt offering and whole burnt offering: then shall they offer bullocks upon thine altar.
verses.ar: حِينَئِذٍ تُسَرُّ بِذَبَائِحِ ٱلْبِرِّ، مُحْرَقَةٍ وَتَقْدِمَةٍ تَامَّةٍ. حِينَئِذٍ يُصْعِدُونَ عَلَى مَذْبَحِكَ عُجُولًا.

verses.en: Why boastest thou thyself in mischief, O mighty man? the goodness of God endureth continually.
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا تَفْتَخِرُ بِٱلشَّرِّ أَيُّهَا ٱلْجَبَّارُ؟ رَحْمَةُ ٱللهِ هِيَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ!

verses.en: Thy tongue deviseth mischiefs; like a sharp razor, working deceitfully.
