verses.ar: لِأَنَّ ٱلرَّبَّ صَالِحٌ، إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتُهُ، وَإِلَى دَوْرٍ فَدَوْرٍ أَمَانَتُهُ.

verses.en: I will sing of mercy and judgment: unto thee, O Lord, will I sing.
verses.ar: رَحْمَةً وَحُكْمًا أُغَنِّي. لَكَ يَارَبُّ أُرَنِّمُ.

verses.en: I will behave myself wisely in a perfect way. O when wilt thou come unto me? I will walk within my house with a perfect heart.
verses.ar: أَتَعَقَّلُ فِي طَرِيقٍ كَامِلٍ. مَتَى تَأْتِي إِلَيَّ؟ أَسْلُكُ فِي كَمَالِ قَلْبِي فِي وَسَطِ بَيْتِي.

verses.en: I will set no wicked thing before mine eyes: I hate the work of them that turn aside; it shall not cleave to me.
verses.ar: لَا أَضَعُ قُدَّامَ عَيْنَيَّ أَمْرًا رَدِيئًا. عَمَلَ ٱلزَّيَغَانِ أَبْغَضْتُ. لَا يَلْصَقُ بِي.

verses.en: A froward heart shall depart from me: I will not know a wicked person.
verses.ar: قَلْبٌ مُعْوَجٌّ يَبْعُدُ عَنِّي. ٱلشِّرِّيرُ لَا أَعْرِفُهُ.

verses.en: Whoso privily slandereth his neighbour, him will I cut off: him that hath an high look and a proud heart will not I suffer.
verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يَغْتَابُ صَاحِبَهُ سِرًّا هَذَا أَقْطَعُهُ. مُسْتَكْبِرُ ٱلْعَيْنِ وَمُنْتَفِخُ ٱلْقَلْبِ لَا أَحْتَمِلُهُ.

verses.en: Mine eyes shall be upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me: he that walketh in a perfect way, he shall serve me.
verses.ar: عَيْنَايَ عَلَى أُمَنَاءِ ٱلْأَرْضِ لِكَيْ أُجْلِسَهُمْ مَعِي. ٱلسَّالِكُ طَرِيقًا كَامِلًا هُوَ يَخْدِمُنِي.

verses.en: He that worketh deceit shall not dwell within my house: he that telleth lies shall not tarry in my sight.
verses.ar: لَا يَسْكُنُ وَسَطَ بَيْتِي عَامِلُ غِشٍّ. ٱلْمُتَكَلِّمُ بِٱلْكَذِبِ لَا يَثْبُتُ أَمَامَ عَيْنَيَّ.

verses.en: I will early destroy all the wicked of the land; that I may cut off all wicked doers from the city of the Lord.
verses.ar: بَاكِرًا أُبِيدُ جَمِيعَ أَشْرَارِ ٱلْأَرْضِ، لِأَقْطَعَ مِنْ مَدِينَةِ ٱلرَّبِّ كُلَّ فَاعِلِي ٱلْإِثْمِ.

verses.en: Hear my prayer, O Lord, and let my cry come unto thee.
verses.ar: يَارَبُّ، ٱسْتَمِعْ صَلَاتِي، وَلْيَدْخُلْ إِلَيْكَ صُرَاخِي.

verses.en: Hide not thy face from me in the day when I am in trouble; incline thine ear unto me: in the day when I call answer me speedily.
verses.ar: لَا تَحْجُبْ وَجْهَكَ عَنِّي فِي يَوْمِ ضِيقِي. أَمِلْ إِلَيَّ أُذُنَكَ فِي يَوْمِ أَدْعُوكَ. ٱسْتَجِبْ لِي سَرِيعًا.

verses.en: For my days are consumed like smoke, and my bones are burned as an hearth.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ أَيَّامِي قَدْ فَنِيَتْ فِي دُخَانٍ، وَعِظَامِي مِثْلُ وَقِيدٍ قَدْ يَبِسَتْ.

verses.en: My heart is smitten, and withered like grass; so that I forget to eat my bread.
verses.ar: مَلْفُوحٌ كَٱلْعُشْبِ وَيَابِسٌ قَلْبِي، حَتَّى سَهَوْتُ عَنْ أَكْلِ خُبْزِي.

verses.en: By reason of the voice of my groaning my bones cleave to my skin.
verses.ar: مِنْ صَوْتِ تَنَهُّدِي لَصِقَ عَظْمِي بِلَحْمِي.

verses.en: I am like a pelican of the wilderness: I am like an owl of the desert.
verses.ar: أَشْبَهْتُ قُوقَ ٱلْبَرِّيَّةِ. صِرْتُ مِثْلَ بُومَةِ ٱلْخِرَبِ.

verses.en: I watch, and am as a sparrow alone upon the house top.
verses.ar: سَهِدْتُ وَصِرْتُ كَعُصْفُورٍ مُنْفَرِدٍ عَلَى ٱلسَّطْحِ.

verses.en: Mine enemies reproach me all the day; and they that are mad against me are sworn against me.
verses.ar: ٱلْيَوْمَ كُلَّهُ عَيَّرَنِي أَعْدَائِيَ. ٱلْحَنِقُونَ عَلَيَّ حَلَفُوا عَلَيَّ.

verses.en: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mingled my drink with weeping,
verses.ar: إِنِّي قَدْ أَكَلْتُ ٱلرَّمَادَ مِثْلَ ٱلْخُبْزِ، وَمَزَجْتُ شَرَابِي بِدُمُوعٍ،

verses.en: Because of thine indignation and thy wrath: for thou hast lifted me up, and cast me down.
verses.ar: بِسَبَبِ غَضَبِكَ وَسَخَطِكَ، لِأَنَّكَ حَمَلْتَنِي وَطَرَحْتَنِي.

verses.en: My days are like a shadow that declineth; and I am withered like grass.
verses.ar: أَيَّامِي كَظِلٍّ مَائِلٍ، وَأَنَا مِثْلُ ٱلْعُشْبِ يَبِسْتُ.

verses.en: But thou, O Lord, shalt endure for ever; and thy remembrance unto all generations.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ فَإِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ جَالِسٌ، وَذِكْرُكَ إِلَى دَوْرٍ فَدَوْرٍ.

verses.en: Thou shalt arise, and have mercy upon Zion: for the time to favour her, yea, the set time, is come.
verses.ar: أَنْتَ تَقُومُ وَتَرْحَمُ صِهْيَوْنَ، لِأَنَّهُ وَقْتُ ٱلرَّأْفَةِ، لِأَنَّهُ جَاءَ ٱلْمِيعَادُ.

verses.en: For thy servants take pleasure in her stones, and favour the dust thereof.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ عَبِيدَكَ قَدْ سُرُّوا بِحِجَارَتِهَا، وَحَنُّوا إِلَى تُرَابِهَا.

verses.en: So the heathen shall fear the name of the Lord, and all the kings of the earth thy glory.
verses.ar: فَتَخْشَى ٱلْأُمَمُ ٱسْمَ ٱلرَّبِّ، وَكُلُّ مُلُوكِ ٱلْأَرْضِ مَجْدَكَ.

verses.en: When the Lord shall build up Zion, he shall appear in his glory.
verses.ar: إِذَا بَنَى ٱلرَّبُّ صِهْيَوْنَ يُرَى بِمَجْدِهِ.

verses.en: He will regard the prayer of the destitute, and not despise their prayer.
verses.ar: ٱلْتَفَتَ إِلَى صَلَاةِ ٱلْمُضْطَرِّ، وَلَمْ يَرْذُلْ دُعَاءَهُمْ.

verses.en: This shall be written for the generation to come: and the people which shall be created shall praise the Lord.
verses.ar: يُكْتَبُ هَذَا لِلدَّوْرِ ٱلْآخِرِ، وشَعْبٌ سَوْفَ يُخْلَقُ يُسَبِّحُ ٱلرَّبَّ:

verses.en: For he hath looked down from the height of his sanctuary; from heaven did the Lord behold the earth;
verses.ar: «لِأَنَّهُ أَشْرَفَ مِنْ عُلْوِ قُدْسِهِ. ٱلرَّبُّ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ نَظَرَ،

verses.en: To hear the groaning of the prisoner; to loose those that are appointed to death;
verses.ar: لِيَسْمَعَ أَنِينَ ٱلْأَسِيرِ، لِيُطْلِقَ بَنِي ٱلْمَوْتِ».

verses.en: To declare the name of the Lord in Zion, and his praise in Jerusalem;
verses.ar: لِكَيْ يُحَدَّثَ فِي صِهْيَوْنَ بِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ، وَبِتَسْبِيحِهِ فِي أُورُشَلِيمَ،

verses.en: When the people are gathered together, and the kingdoms, to serve the Lord.
verses.ar: عِنْدَ ٱجْتِمَاعِ ٱلشُّعُوبِ مَعًا وَٱلْمَمَالِكِ لِعِبَادَةِ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: He weakened my strength in the way; he shortened my days.
verses.ar: ضَعَّفَ فِي ٱلطَّرِيقِ قُوَّتِي، قَصَّرَ أَيَّامِي.

verses.en: I said, O my God, take me not away in the midst of my days: thy years are throughout all generations.
verses.ar: أَقُولُ: «يَا إِلَهِي، لَا تَقْبِضْنِي فِي نِصْفِ أَيَّامِي. إِلَى دَهْرِ ٱلدُّهُورِ سِنُوكَ.

verses.en: Of old hast thou laid the foundation of the earth: and the heavens are the work of thy hands.
verses.ar: مِنْ قِدَمٍ أَسَّسْتَ ٱلْأَرْضَ، وَٱلسَّمَاوَاتُ هِيَ عَمَلُ يَدَيْكَ.

verses.en: They shall perish, but thou shalt endure: yea, all of them shall wax old like a garment; as a vesture shalt thou change them, and they shall be changed:
verses.ar: هِيَ تَبِيدُ وَأَنْتَ تَبْقَى، وَكُلُّهَا كَثَوْبٍ تَبْلَى، كَرِدَاءٍ تُغَيِّرُهُنَّ فَتَتَغَيَّرُ.

verses.en: But thou art the same, and thy years shall have no end.
verses.ar: وَأَنْتَ هُوَ وَسِنُوكَ لَنْ تَنْتَهِيَ.

verses.en: The children of thy servants shall continue, and their seed shall be established before thee.
verses.ar: أَبْنَاءُ عَبِيدِكَ يَسْكُنُونَ، وَذُرِّيَّتُهُمْ تُثَبَّتُ أَمَامَكَ».

verses.en: Bless the Lord, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name.
verses.ar: بَارِكِي يَا نَفْسِي ٱلرَّبَّ، وَكُلُّ مَا فِي بَاطِنِي لِيُبَارِكِ ٱسْمَهُ ٱلْقُدُّوسَ.

verses.en: Bless the Lord, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits:
verses.ar: بَارِكِي يَا نَفْسِي ٱلرَّبَّ، وَلَا تَنْسَيْ كُلَّ حَسَنَاتِهِ.

verses.en: Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases;
verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يَغْفِرُ جَمِيعَ ذُنُوبِكِ. ٱلَّذِي يَشْفِي كُلَّ أَمْرَاضِكِ.

verses.en: Who redeemeth thy life from destruction; who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;
verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يَفْدِي مِنَ ٱلْحُفْرَةِ حَيَاتَكِ. ٱلَّذِي يُكَلِّلُكِ بِٱلرَّحْمَةِ وَٱلرَّأْفَةِ.

verses.en: Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يُشْبِعُ بِٱلْخَيْرِ عُمْرَكِ، فَيَتَجَدَّدُ مِثْلَ ٱلنَّسْرِ شَبَابُكِ.

verses.en: The Lord executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed.
verses.ar: اَلرَّبُّ مُجْرِي ٱلْعَدْلِ وَٱلْقَضَاءِ لِجَمِيعِ ٱلْمَظْلُومِينَ.

verses.en: He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel.
verses.ar: عَرَّفَ مُوسَى طُرُقَهُ، وَبَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ أَفْعَالَهُ.

verses.en: The Lord is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ رَحِيمٌ وَرَؤُوفٌ، طَوِيلُ ٱلرُّوحِ وَكَثِيرُ ٱلرَّحْمَةِ.

verses.en: He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever.
verses.ar: لَا يُحَاكِمُ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ، وَلَا يَحْقِدُ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ.

verses.en: He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.
verses.ar: لَمْ يَصْنَعْ مَعَنَا حَسَبَ خَطَايَانَا، وَلَمْ يُجَازِنَا حَسَبَ آثَامِنَا.

verses.en: For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ مِثْلُ ٱرْتِفَاعِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ فَوْقَ ٱلْأَرْضِ قَوِيَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ عَلَى خَائِفِيهِ.

verses.en: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
verses.ar: كَبُعْدِ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ مِنَ ٱلْمَغْرِبِ أَبْعَدَ عَنَّا مَعَاصِيَنَا.

verses.en: Like as a father pitieth his children, so the Lord pitieth them that fear him.
verses.ar: كَمَا يَتَرَأَفُ ٱلْأَبُ عَلَى ٱلْبَنِينَ يَتَرَأَفُ ٱلرَّبُّ عَلَى خَائِفِيهِ.

verses.en: For he knoweth our frame; he remembereth that we are dust.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ يَعْرِفُ جِبْلَتَنَا. يَذْكُرُ أَنَّنَا تُرَابٌ نَحْنُ.

verses.en: As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.
verses.ar: ٱلْإِنْسَانُ مِثْلُ ٱلْعُشْبِ أَيَّامُهُ. كَزَهَرِ ٱلْحَقْلِ كَذَلِكَ يُزْهِرُ.

verses.en: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ رِيحًا تَعْبُرُ عَلَيْهِ فَلَا يَكُونُ، وَلَا يَعْرِفُهُ مَوْضِعُهُ بَعْدُ.

verses.en: But the mercy of the Lord is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him, and his righteousness unto children’s children;
verses.ar: أَمَّا رَحْمَةُ ٱلرَّبِّ فَإِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ وَٱلْأَبَدِ عَلَى خَائِفِيهِ، وَعَدْلُهُ عَلَى بَنِي ٱلْبَنِينَ،

verses.en: To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them.
verses.ar: لِحَافِظِي عَهْدِهِ وَذَاكِرِي وَصَايَاهُ لِيَعْمَلُوهَا.

verses.en: The Lord hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all.
verses.ar: اَلرَّبُّ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ ثَبَّتَ كُرْسِيَّهُ، وَمَمْلَكَتُهُ عَلَى ٱلْكُلِّ تَسُودُ.

verses.en: Bless the Lord, ye his angels, that excel in strength, that do his commandments, hearkening unto the voice of his word.
verses.ar: بَارِكُوا ٱلرَّبَّ يَا مَلَائِكَتَهُ ٱلْمُقْتَدِرِينَ قُوَّةً، ٱلْفَاعِلِينَ أَمْرَهُ عِنْدَ سَمَاعِ صَوْتِ كَلَامِهِ.

verses.en: Bless ye the Lord, all ye his hosts; ye ministers of his, that do his pleasure.
verses.ar: بَارِكُوا ٱلرَّبَّ يَا جَمِيعَ جُنُودِهِ، خُدَّامَهُ ٱلْعَامِلِينَ مَرْضَاتَهُ.

verses.en: Bless the Lord, all his works in all places of his dominion: bless the Lord, O my soul.
verses.ar: بَارِكُوا ٱلرَّبَّ يَا جَمِيعَ أَعْمَالِهِ، فِي كُلِّ مَوَاضِعِ سُلْطَانِهِ. بَارِكِي يَا نَفْسِيَ ٱلرَّبَّ.

verses.en: Bless the Lord, O my soul. O Lord my God, thou art very great; thou art clothed with honour and majesty.
verses.ar: بَارِكِي يَا نَفْسِي ٱلرَّبَّ. يَارَبُّ إِلَهِي، قَدْ عَظُمْتَ جِدًّا. مَجْدًا وَجَلَالًا لَبِسْتَ.

verses.en: Who coverest thyself with light as with a garment: who stretchest out the heavens like a curtain:
verses.ar: ٱللَّابِسُ ٱلنُّورَ كَثَوْبٍ، ٱلْبَاسِطُ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ كَشُقَّةٍ.

verses.en: Who layeth the beams of his chambers in the waters: who maketh the clouds his chariot: who walketh upon the wings of the wind:
verses.ar: ٱلْمُسَقِّفُ عَلَالِيَهُ بِٱلْمِيَاهِ. ٱلْجَاعِلُ ٱلسَّحَابَ مَرْكَبَتَهُ، ٱلْمَاشِي عَلَى أَجْنِحَةِ ٱلرِّيحِ.

verses.en: Who maketh his angels spirits; his ministers a flaming fire:
verses.ar: ٱلصَّانِعُ مَلَائِكَتَهُ رِيَاحًا، وَخُدَّامَهُ نَارًا مُلْتَهِبَةً.

verses.en: Who laid the foundations of the earth, that it should not be removed for ever.
verses.ar: ٱلْمُؤَسِّسُ ٱلْأَرْضَ عَلَى قَوَاعِدِهَا فَلَا تَتَزَعْزَعُ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ وَٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Thou coveredst it with the deep as with a garment: the waters stood above the mountains.
verses.ar: كَسَوْتَهَا ٱلْغَمْرَ كَثَوْبٍ. فَوْقَ ٱلْجِبَالِ تَقِفُ ٱلْمِيَاهُ.

verses.en: At thy rebuke they fled; at the voice of thy thunder they hasted away.
verses.ar: مِنِ ٱنْتِهَارِكَ تَهْرُبُ، مِنْ صَوْتِ رَعْدِكَ تَفِرُّ.

verses.en: They go up by the mountains; they go down by the valleys unto the place which thou hast founded for them.
verses.ar: تَصْعَدُ إِلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ. تَنْزِلُ إِلَى ٱلْبِقَاعِ، إِلَى ٱلْمَوْضِعِ ٱلَّذِي أَسَّسْتَهُ لَهَا.

verses.en: Thou hast set a bound that they may not pass over; that they turn not again to cover the earth.
verses.ar: وَضَعْتَ لَهَا تَخْمًا لَا تَتَعَدَّاهُ. لَا تَرْجِعُ لِتُغَطِّيَ ٱلْأَرْضَ.

verses.en: He sendeth the springs into the valleys, which run among the hills.
verses.ar: اَلْمُفَجِّرُ عُيُونًا فِي ٱلْأَوْدِيَةِ. بَيْنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ تَجْرِي.

verses.en: They give drink to every beast of the field: the wild asses quench their thirst.
verses.ar: تَسْقِي كُلَّ حَيَوَانِ ٱلْبَرِّ. تَكْسِرُ ٱلْفِرَاءُ ظَمْأَهَا.

verses.en: By them shall the fowls of the heaven have their habitation, which sing among the branches.
verses.ar: فَوْقَهَا طُيُورُ ٱلسَّمَاءِ تَسْكُنُ. مِنْ بَيْنِ ٱلْأَغْصَانِ تُسَمِّعُ صَوْتًا.

verses.en: He watereth the hills from his chambers: the earth is satisfied with the fruit of thy works.
verses.ar: ٱلسَّاقِي ٱلْجِبَالَ مِنْ عَلَالِيهِ. مِنْ ثَمَرِ أَعْمَالِكَ تَشْبَعُ ٱلْأَرْضُ.

verses.en: He causeth the grass to grow for the cattle, and herb for the service of man: that he may bring forth food out of the earth;
verses.ar: ٱلْمُنْبِتُ عُشْبًا لِلْبَهَائِمِ، وَخُضْرَةً لِخِدْمَةِ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ، لِإِخْرَاجِ خُبْزٍ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ،

verses.en: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, and oil to make his face to shine, and bread which strengtheneth man’s heart.
verses.ar: وَخَمْرٍ تُفَرِّحُ قَلْبَ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ، لِإِلْمَاعِ وَجْهِهِ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ ٱلزَّيْتِ، وَخُبْزٍ يُسْنِدُ قَلْبَ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ.

verses.en: The trees of the Lord are full of sap; the cedars of Lebanon, which he hath planted;
verses.ar: تَشْبَعُ أَشْجَارُ ٱلرَّبِّ، أَرْزُ لُبْنَانَ ٱلَّذِي نَصَبَهُ.

verses.en: Where the birds make their nests: as for the stork, the fir trees are her house.
verses.ar: حَيْثُ تُعَشِّشُ هُنَاكَ ٱلْعَصَافِيرُ. أَمَّا ٱللَّقْلَقُ فَٱلسَّرْوُ بَيْتُهُ.

verses.en: The high hills are a refuge for the wild goats; and the rocks for the conies.
verses.ar: ٱلْجِبَالُ ٱلْعَالِيَةُ لِلْوُعُولِ، ٱلصُّخُورُ مَلْجَأٌ لِلْوِبَارِ.

verses.en: He appointed the moon for seasons: the sun knoweth his going down.
verses.ar: صَنَعَ ٱلْقَمَرَ لِلْمَوَاقِيتِ. ٱلشَّمْسُ تَعْرِفُ مَغْرِبَهَا.

verses.en: Thou makest darkness, and it is night: wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.
verses.ar: تَجْعَلُ ظُلْمَةً فَيَصِيرُ لَيْلٌ. فِيهِ يَدِبُّ كُلُّ حَيَوَانِ ٱلْوَعْرِ.

verses.en: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their meat from God.
verses.ar: ٱلْأَشْبَالُ تُزَمْجِرُ لِتَخْطَفَ، وَلِتَلْتَمِسَ مِنَ ٱللهِ طَعَامَهَا.

verses.en: The sun ariseth, they gather themselves together, and lay them down in their dens.
verses.ar: تُشْرِقُ ٱلشَّمْسُ فَتَجْتَمِعُ، وَفِي مَآوِيهَا تَرْبِضُ.

verses.en: Man goeth forth unto his work and to his labour until the evening.
verses.ar: ٱلْإِنْسَانُ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى عَمَلِهِ، وَإِلَى شُغْلِهِ إِلَى ٱلْمَسَاءِ.

verses.en: O Lord, how manifold are thy works! in wisdom hast thou made them all: the earth is full of thy riches.
verses.ar: مَا أَعْظَمَ أَعْمَالَكَ يَارَبُّ! كُلَّهَا بِحِكْمَةٍ صَنَعْتَ. مَلْآنةٌ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْ غِنَاكَ.

verses.en: So is this great and wide sea, wherein are things creeping innumerable, both small and great beasts.
verses.ar: هَذَا ٱلْبَحْرُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ ٱلْوَاسِعُ ٱلْأَطْرَافِ. هُنَاكَ دَبَّابَاتٌ بِلَا عَدَدٍ. صِغَارُ حَيَوَانٍ مَعَ كِبَارٍ.

verses.en: There go the ships: there is that leviathan, whom thou hast made to play therein.
verses.ar: هُنَاكَ تَجْرِي ٱلسُّفُنُ. لِوِيَاثَانُ هَذَا خَلَقْتَهُ لِيَلْعَبَ فِيهِ.

verses.en: These wait all upon thee; that thou mayest give them their meat in due season.
verses.ar: كُلُّهَا إِيَّاكَ تَتَرَجَّى لِتَرْزُقَهَا قُوتَهَا فِي حِينِهِ.

verses.en: That thou givest them they gather: thou openest thine hand, they are filled with good.
verses.ar: تُعْطِيهَا فَتَلْتَقِطُ. تَفْتَحُ يَدَكَ فَتَشْبَعُ خَيْرًا.

verses.en: Thou hidest thy face, they are troubled: thou takest away their breath, they die, and return to their dust.
verses.ar: تَحْجُبُ وَجْهَكَ فَتَرْتَاعُ. تَنْزِعُ أَرْوَاحَهَا فَتَمُوتُ، وَإِلَى تُرَابِهَا تَعُودُ.

verses.en: Thou sendest forth thy spirit, they are created: and thou renewest the face of the earth.
verses.ar: تُرْسِلُ رُوحَكَ فَتُخْلَقُ، وَتُجَدِّدُ وَجْهَ ٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: The glory of the Lord shall endure for ever: the Lord shall rejoice in his works.
verses.ar: يَكُونُ مَجْدُ ٱلرَّبِّ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ. يَفْرَحُ ٱلرَّبُّ بِأَعْمَالِهِ.

verses.en: He looketh on the earth, and it trembleth: he toucheth the hills, and they smoke.
verses.ar: ٱلنَّاظِرُ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَتَرْتَعِدُ. يَمَسُّ ٱلْجِبَالَ فَتُدَخِّنُ.

verses.en: I will sing unto the Lord as long as I live: I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.
verses.ar: أُغَنِّي لِلرَّبِّ فِي حَيَاتِي. أُرَنِّمُ لِإِلَهِي مَا دُمْتُ مَوْجُودًا.

verses.en: My meditation of him shall be sweet: I will be glad in the Lord.
verses.ar: فَيَلَذُّ لَهُ نَشِيدِي، وَأَنَا أَفْرَحُ بِٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: Let the sinners be consumed out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless thou the Lord, O my soul. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.ar: لِتُبَدِ ٱلْخُطَاةُ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱلْأَشْرَارُ لَا يَكُونُوا بَعْدُ. بَارِكِي يَا نَفْسِي ٱلرَّبَّ. هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: O give thanks unto the Lord; call upon his name: make known his deeds among the people.
verses.ar: اِحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ. ٱدْعُوا بِٱسْمِهِ. عَرِّفُوا بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ بِأَعْمَالِهِ.

verses.en: Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him: talk ye of all his wondrous works.
verses.ar: غَنُّوا لَهُ. رَنِّمُوا لَهُ. أَنْشِدُوا بِكُلِّ عَجَائِبِهِ.

verses.en: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek the Lord.
verses.ar: ٱفْتَخِرُوا بِٱسْمِهِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ. لِتَفْرَحْ قُلُوبُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَلْتَمِسُونَ ٱلرَّبَّ.

verses.en: Seek the Lord, and his strength: seek his face evermore.
verses.ar: اُطْلُبُوا ٱلرَّبَّ وَقُدْرَتَهُ. ٱلْتَمِسُوا وَجْهَهُ دَائِمًا.

verses.en: Remember his marvellous works that he hath done; his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth;
verses.ar: ٱذْكُرُوا عَجَائِبَهُ ٱلَّتِي صَنَعَ، آيَاتِهِ وَأَحْكَامَ فِيهِ،

verses.en: O ye seed of Abraham his servant, ye children of Jacob his chosen.
verses.ar: يَا ذُرِّيَّةَ إِبْراهِيمَ عَبْدِهِ، يَا بَنِي يَعْقُوبَ مُخْتَارِيهِ.

verses.en: He is the Lord our God: his judgments are in all the earth.
verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلرَّبُّ إِلَهُنَا فِي كُلِّ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَحْكَامُهُ.

verses.en: He hath remembered his covenant for ever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.
verses.ar: ذَكَرَ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ عَهْدَهُ، كَلَامًا أَوْصَى بِهِ إِلَى أَلْفِ دَوْرٍ،

verses.en: Which covenant he made with Abraham, and his oath unto Isaac;
verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي عَاهَدَ بِهِ إِبْراهِيمَ، وَقَسَمَهُ لِإِسْحاقَ،

verses.en: And confirmed the same unto Jacob for a law, and to Israel for an everlasting covenant:
verses.ar: فَثَبَّتَهُ لِيَعْقُوبَ فَرِيضَةً، وَلِإِسْرَائِيلَ عَهْدًا أَبَدِيًّا،

verses.en: Saying, Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance:
verses.ar: قَائِلًا: «لَكَ أُعْطِي أَرْضَ كَنْعَانَ حَبْلَ مِيرَاثِكُمْ».

verses.en: When they were but a few men in number; yea, very few, and strangers in it.
verses.ar: إِذْ كَانُوا عَدَدًا يُحْصَى، قَلِيلِينَ وَغُرَبَاءَ فِيهَا.

verses.en: When they went from one nation to another, from one kingdom to another people;
verses.ar: ذَهَبُوا مِنْ أُمَّةٍ إِلَى أُمَّةٍ، مِنْ مَمْلَكَةٍ إِلَى شَعْبٍ آخَرَ.

verses.en: He suffered no man to do them wrong: yea, he reproved kings for their sakes;
verses.ar: فَلَمْ يَدَعْ إِنْسَانًا يَظْلِمُهُمْ، بَلْ وَبَّخَ مُلُوكًا مِنْ أَجْلِهِمْ،

verses.en: Saying, Touch not mine anointed, and do my prophets no harm.
verses.ar: قَائِلًا: «لَا تَمَسُّوا مُسَحَائِي، وَلَا تُسِيئُوا إِلَى أَنْبِيَائِي».

verses.en: Moreover he called for a famine upon the land: he brake the whole staff of bread.
verses.ar: دَعَا بِٱلْجُوعِ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ. كَسَرَ قِوَامَ ٱلْخُبْزِ كُلَّهُ.

verses.en: He sent a man before them, even Joseph, who was sold for a servant:
verses.ar: أَرْسَلَ أَمَامَهُمْ رَجُلًا. بِيعَ يُوسُفُ عَبْدًا.

verses.en: Whose feet they hurt with fetters: he was laid in iron:
verses.ar: آذَوْا بِٱلْقَيْدِ رِجْلَيْهِ. فِي ٱلْحَدِيدِ دَخَلَتْ نَفْسُهُ،

verses.en: Until the time that his word came: the word of the Lord tried him.
verses.ar: إِلَى وَقْتِ مَجِيءِ كَلِمَتِهِ. قَوْلُ ٱلرَّبِّ ٱمْتَحَنَهُ.

verses.en: The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the people, and let him go free.
verses.ar: أَرْسَلَ ٱلْمَلِكُ فَحَلَّهُ. أَرْسَلَ سُلْطَانُ ٱلشَّعْبِ فَأَطْلَقَهُ.

verses.en: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his substance:
verses.ar: أَقَامَهُ سَيِّدًا عَلَى بَيْتِهِ، وَمُسَلَّطًا عَلَى كُلِّ مُلْكِهِ،

verses.en: To bind his princes at his pleasure; and teach his senators wisdom.
verses.ar: لِيَأْسُرَ رُؤَسَاءَهُ حَسَبَ إِرَادَتِهِ وَيُعَلِّمَ مَشَايِخَهُ حِكْمَةً.

verses.en: Israel also came into Egypt; and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
verses.ar: فَجَاءَ إِسْرَائِيلُ إِلَى مِصْرَ، وَيَعْقُوبُ تَغَرَّبَ فِي أَرْضِ حَامٍ.

verses.en: And he increased his people greatly; and made them stronger than their enemies.
verses.ar: جَعَلَ شَعْبَهُ مُثْمِرًا جِدًّا، وَأَعَزَّهُ عَلَى أَعْدَائِهِ.

verses.en: He turned their heart to hate his people, to deal subtilly with his servants.
verses.ar: حَوَّلَ قُلُوبَهُمْ لِيُبْغِضُوا شَعْبَهُ، لِيَحْتَالُوا عَلَى عَبِيدِهِ.

verses.en: He sent Moses his servant; and Aaron whom he had chosen.
verses.ar: أَرْسَلَ مُوسَى عَبْدَهُ وَهارُونَ ٱلَّذِي ٱخْتَارَهُ.

verses.en: They shewed his signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.
verses.ar: أَقَامَا بَيْنَهُمْ كَلَامَ آيَاتِهِ، وَعَجَائِبَ فِي أَرْضِ حَامٍ.

verses.en: He sent darkness, and made it dark; and they rebelled not against his word.
verses.ar: أَرْسَلَ ظُلْمَةً فَأَظْلَمَتْ، وَلَمْ يَعْصَوْا كَلَامَهُ.

verses.en: He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish.
verses.ar: حَوَّلَ مِيَاهَهُمْ إِلَى دَمٍ وَقَتَلَ أَسْمَاكَهُمْ.

verses.en: Their land brought forth frogs in abundance, in the chambers of their kings.
verses.ar: أَفَاضَتْ أَرْضُهُمْ ضَفَادِعَ حَتَّى فِي مَخَادِعِ مُلُوكِهِمْ.

verses.en: He spake, and there came divers sorts of flies, and lice in all their coasts.
verses.ar: أَمَرَ فَجَاءَ ٱلذُّبَّانُ وَٱلْبَعُوضُ فِي كُلِّ تُخُومِهِمْ.

verses.en: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.
verses.ar: جَعَلَ أَمْطَارَهُمْ بَرَدًا وَنَارًا مُلْتَهِبَةً فِي أَرْضِهِمْ.

verses.en: He smote their vines also and their fig trees; and brake the trees of their coasts.
verses.ar: ضَرَبَ كُرُومَهُمْ وَتِينَهُمْ، وَكَسَّرَ كُلَّ أَشْجَارِ تُخُومِهِمْ.

verses.en: He spake, and the locusts came, and caterpillers, and that without number,
verses.ar: أَمَرَ فَجَاءَ ٱلْجَرَادُ وَغَوْغَاءُ بِلَا عَدَدٍ،

verses.en: And did eat up all the herbs in their land, and devoured the fruit of their ground.
verses.ar: فَأَكَلَ كُلَّ عُشْبٍ فِي بِلَادِهِمْ، وَأَكَلَ أَثْمَارَ أَرْضِهِمْ.

verses.en: He smote also all the firstborn in their land, the chief of all their strength.
verses.ar: قَتَلَ كُلَّ بِكْرٍ فِي أَرْضِهِمْ، أَوَائِلَ كُلِّ قُوَّتِهِمْ.

verses.en: He brought them forth also with silver and gold: and there was not one feeble person among their tribes.
verses.ar: فَأَخْرَجَهُمْ بِفِضَّةٍ وَذَهَبٍ، وَلَمْ يَكُنْ فِي أَسْبَاطِهِمْ عَاثِرٌ.

verses.en: Egypt was glad when they departed: for the fear of them fell upon them.
verses.ar: فَرِحَتْ مِصْرُ بِخُرُوجِهِمْ، لِأَنَّ رُعْبَهُمْ سَقَطَ عَلَيْهِمْ.

verses.en: He spread a cloud for a covering; and fire to give light in the night.
verses.ar: بَسَطَ سَحَابًا سَجْفًا، وَنَارًا لِتُضِيءَ ٱللَّيْلَ.

verses.en: The people asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.
verses.ar: سَأَلُوا فَأَتَاهُمْ بِٱلسَّلْوَى، وَخُبْزَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ أَشْبَعَهُمْ.

verses.en: He opened the rock, and the waters gushed out; they ran in the dry places like a river.
verses.ar: شَقَّ ٱلصَّخْرَةَ فَٱنْفَجَرَتِ ٱلْمِيَاهُ. جَرَتْ فِي ٱلْيَابِسَةِ نَهْرًا.

verses.en: For he remembered his holy promise, and Abraham his servant.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ ذَكَرَ كَلِمَةَ قُدْسِهِ مَعَ إِبْراهِيمَ عَبْدِهِ،

verses.en: And he brought forth his people with joy, and his chosen with gladness:
verses.ar: فَأَخْرَجَ شَعْبَهُ بِٱبْتِهَاجٍ، وَمُخْتَارِيهِ بِتَرَنُّمٍ.

verses.en: And gave them the lands of the heathen: and they inherited the labour of the people;
verses.ar: وَأَعْطَاهُمْ أَرَاضِيَ ٱلْأُمَمِ، وَتَعَبَ ٱلشُّعُوبِ وَرِثُوهُ،

verses.en: That they might observe his statutes, and keep his laws. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.ar: لِكَيْ يَحْفَظُوا فَرَائِضَهُ وَيُطِيعُوا شَرَائِعَهُ. هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: Praise ye the Lord. O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: هَلِّلُويَا. اِحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ لِأَنَّهُ صَالِحٌ، لِأَنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ.

verses.en: Who can utter the mighty acts of the Lord? who can shew forth all his praise?
verses.ar: مَنْ يَتَكَلَّمُ بِجَبَرُوتِ ٱلرَّبِّ؟ مَنْ يُخْبِرُ بِكُلِّ تَسَابِيحِهِ؟

verses.en: Blessed are they that keep judgment, and he that doeth righteousness at all times.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِلْحَافِظِينَ ٱلْحَقَّ وَلِلصَّانِعِ ٱلْبِرَّ فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ.

verses.en: Remember me, O Lord, with the favour that thou bearest unto thy people: O visit me with thy salvation;
verses.ar: ٱذْكُرْنِي يَارَبُّ بِرِضَا شَعْبِكَ. تَعَهَّدْنِي بِخَلَاصِكَ،

verses.en: That I may see the good of thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of thy nation, that I may glory with thine inheritance.
verses.ar: لِأَرَى خَيْرَ مُخْتَارِيكَ. لِأَفْرَحَ بِفَرَحِ أُمَّتِكَ. لِأَفْتَخِرَ مَعَ مِيرَاثِكَ.

verses.en: We have sinned with our fathers, we have committed iniquity, we have done wickedly.
verses.ar: أَخْطَأْنَا مَعَ آبَائِنَا. أَسَأْنَا وَأَذْنَبْنَا.

verses.en: Our fathers understood not thy wonders in Egypt; they remembered not the multitude of thy mercies; but provoked him at the sea, even at the Red sea.
verses.ar: آبَاؤُنَا فِي مِصْرَ لَمْ يَفْهَمُوا عَجَائِبَكَ. لَمْ يَذْكُرُوا كَثْرَةَ مَرَاحِمِكَ، فَتَمَرَّدُوا عِنْدَ ٱلْبَحْرِ، عِنْدَ بَحْرِ سُوفٍ.

verses.en: Nevertheless he saved them for his name’s sake, that he might make his mighty power to be known.
verses.ar: فَخَلَّصَهُمْ مِنْ أَجْلِ ٱسْمِهِ، لِيُعَرِّفَ بِجَبَرُوتِهِ.

verses.en: He rebuked the Red sea also, and it was dried up: so he led them through the depths, as through the wilderness.
verses.ar: وَٱنْتَهَرَ بَحْرَ سُوفٍ فَيَبِسَ، وَسَيَّرَهُمْ فِي ٱللُّجَجِ كَٱلْبَرِّيَّةِ.

verses.en: And he saved them from the hand of him that hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.
verses.ar: وَخَلَّصَهُمْ مِنْ يَدِ ٱلْمُبْغِضِ، وَفَدَاهُمْ مِنْ يَدِ ٱلْعَدُوِّ.

verses.en: And the waters covered their enemies: there was not one of them left.
verses.ar: وَغَطَّتِ ٱلْمِيَاهُ مُضَايِقِيهِمْ. وَاحِدٌ مِنْهُمْ لَمْ يَبْقَ.

verses.en: Then believed they his words; they sang his praise.
verses.ar: فَآمَنُوا بِكَلَامِهِ. غَنَّوْا بِتَسْبِيحِهِ.

verses.en: They soon forgat his works; they waited not for his counsel:
verses.ar: أَسْرَعُوا فَنَسُوا أَعْمَالَهُ. لَمْ يَنْتَظِرُوا مَشُورَتَهُ.

verses.en: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tempted God in the desert.
verses.ar: بَلِ ٱشْتَهَوْا شَهْوَةً فِي ٱلْبَرِّيَّةِ، وَجَرَّبُوا ٱللهَ فِي ٱلْقَفْرِ.

verses.en: And he gave them their request; but sent leanness into their soul.
verses.ar: فَأَعْطَاهُمْ سُؤْلَهُمْ، وَأَرْسَلَ هُزَالًا فِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ.

verses.en: They envied Moses also in the camp, and Aaron the saint of the Lord.
verses.ar: وَحَسَدُوا مُوسَى فِي ٱلْمَحَلَّةِ، وَهارُونَ قُدُّوسَ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.
verses.ar: فَتَحَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱبْتَلَعَتْ دَاثَانَ، وَطَبَقَتْ عَلَى جَمَاعَةِ أَبِيرَامَ،

verses.en: And a fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.
verses.ar: وَٱشْتَعَلَتْ نَارٌ فِي جَمَاعَتِهِمْ. ٱللَّهِيبُ أَحْرَقَ ٱلْأَشْرَارَ.

verses.en: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshipped the molten image.
verses.ar: صَنَعُوا عِجْلًا فِي حُورِيبَ، وَسَجَدُوا لِتِمْثَالٍ مَسْبُوكٍ،

verses.en: Thus they changed their glory into the similitude of an ox that eateth grass.
verses.ar: وَأَبْدَلُوا مَجْدَهُمْ بِمِثَالِ ثَوْرٍ آكِلِ عُشْبٍ.

verses.en: They forgat God their saviour, which had done great things in Egypt;
verses.ar: نَسُوا ٱللهَ مُخَلِّصَهُمُ، ٱلصَّانِعَ عَظَائِمَ فِي مِصْرَ،

verses.en: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, and terrible things by the Red sea.
verses.ar: وَعَجَائِبَ فِي أَرْضِ حَامٍ، وَمَخَاوِفَ عَلَى بَحْرِ سُوفٍ،

verses.en: Therefore he said that he would destroy them, had not Moses his chosen stood before him in the breach, to turn away his wrath, lest he should destroy them.
verses.ar: فَقَالَ بِإِهْلَاكِهِمْ. لَوْلَا مُوسَى مُخْتَارُهُ وَقَفَ فِي ٱلثَّغْرِ قُدَّامَهُ لِيَصْرِفَ غَضَبَهُ عَنْ إِتْلَافِهِمْ.

verses.en: Yea, they despised the pleasant land, they believed not his word:
verses.ar: وَرَذَلُوا ٱلْأَرْضَ ٱلشَّهِيَّةَ. لَمْ يُؤْمِنُوا بِكَلِمَتِهِ.

verses.en: But murmured in their tents, and hearkened not unto the voice of the Lord.
verses.ar: بَلْ تَمَرْمَرُوا فِي خِيَامِهِمْ. لَمْ يَسْمَعُوا لِصَوْتِ ٱلرَّبِّ،

verses.en: Therefore he lifted up his hand against them, to overthrow them in the wilderness:
verses.ar: فَرَفَعَ يَدَهُ عَلَيْهِمْ لِيُسْقِطَهُمْ فِي ٱلْبَرِّيَّةِ،

verses.en: To overthrow their seed also among the nations, and to scatter them in the lands.
verses.ar: وَلِيُسْقِطَ نَسْلَهُمْ بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ، وَلِيُبَدِّدَهُمْ فِي ٱلْأَرَاضِي.

verses.en: They joined themselves also unto Baal–peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.
verses.ar: وَتَعَلَّقُوا بِبَعْلِ فَغُورَ، وَأَكَلُوا ذَبَائِحَ ٱلْمَوْتَى.

verses.en: Thus they provoked him to anger with their inventions: and the plague brake in upon them.
verses.ar: وَأَغَاظُوهُ بِأَعْمَالِهِمْ فَٱقْتَحَمَهُمُ ٱلْوَبَأُ.

verses.en: Then stood up Phinehas, and executed judgment: and so the plague was stayed.
verses.ar: فَوَقَفَ فِينَحَاسُ وَدَانَ، فَٱمْتَنَعَ ٱلْوَبَأُ.

verses.en: And that was counted unto him for righteousness unto all generations for evermore.
verses.ar: فَحُسِبَ لَهُ ذَلِكَ بِرًّا إِلَى دَوْرٍ فَدَوْرٍ، إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: They angered him also at the waters of strife, so that it went ill with Moses for their sakes:
verses.ar: وَأَسْخَطُوهُ عَلَى مَاءِ مَرِيبَةَ حَتَّى تَأَذَّى مُوسَى بِسَبَبِهِمْ.

verses.en: Because they provoked his spirit, so that he spake unadvisedly with his lips.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُمْ أَمَرُّوا رُوحَهُ حَتَّى فَرَطَ بِشَفَتَيْهِ.

verses.en: They did not destroy the nations, concerning whom the Lord commanded them:
verses.ar: لَمْ يَسْتَأْصِلُوا ٱلْأُمَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالَ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّبُّ عَنْهُمْ،

verses.en: But were mingled among the heathen, and learned their works.
verses.ar: بَلِ ٱخْتَلَطُوا بِٱلْأُمَمِ وَتَعَلَّمُوا أَعْمَالَهُمْ.

verses.en: And they served their idols: which were a snare unto them.
verses.ar: وَعَبَدُوا أَصْنَامَهُمْ، فَصَارَتْ لَهُمْ شَرَكًا.

verses.en: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto devils,
verses.ar: وَذَبَحُوا بَنِيهِمْ وَبَنَاتِهِمْ لِلْأَوْثَانِ.

verses.en: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan: and the land was polluted with blood.
verses.ar: وَأَهْرَقُوا دَمًا زَكِيًّا، دَمَ بَنِيهِمْ وَبَنَاتِهِمِ ٱلَّذِينَ ذَبَحُوهُمْ لِأَصْنَامِ كَنْعَانَ، وَتَدَنَّسَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ بِٱلدِّمَاءِ.

verses.en: Thus were they defiled with their own works, and went a whoring with their own inventions.
verses.ar: وَتَنَجَّسُوا بِأَعْمَالِهِمْ وَزَنَوْا بِأَفْعَالِهِمْ.

verses.en: Therefore was the wrath of the Lord kindled against his people, insomuch that he abhorred his own inheritance.
verses.ar: فَحَمِيَ غَضَبُ ٱلرَّبِّ عَلَى شَعْبِهِ، وَكَرِهَ مِيرَاثَهُ.

verses.en: And he gave them into the hand of the heathen; and they that hated them ruled over them.
verses.ar: وَأَسْلَمَهُمْ لِيَدِ ٱلْأُمَمِ، وَتَسَلَّطَ عَلَيْهِمْ مُبْغِضُوهُمْ.

verses.en: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their hand.
verses.ar: وَضَغَطَهُمْ أَعْدَاؤُهُمْ، فَذَلُّوا تَحْتَ يَدِهِمْ.

verses.en: Many times did he deliver them; but they provoked him with their counsel, and were brought low for their iniquity.
verses.ar: مَرَّاتٍ كَثِيرَةً أَنْقَذَهُمْ، أَمَّا هُمْ فَعَصَوْهُ بِمَشُورَتِهِمْ وَٱنْحَطُّوا بِإِثْمِهِمْ.

verses.en: Nevertheless he regarded their affliction, when he heard their cry:
verses.ar: فَنَظَرَ إِلَى ضِيقِهِمْ إِذْ سَمِعَ صُرَاخَهُمْ.

verses.en: And he remembered for them his covenant, and repented according to the multitude of his mercies.
verses.ar: وَذَكَرَ لَهُمْ عَهْدَهُ، وَنَدِمَ حَسَبَ كَثْرَةِ رَحْمَتِهِ.

verses.en: He made them also to be pitied of all those that carried them captives.
verses.ar: وَأَعْطَاهُمْ نِعْمَةً قُدَّامَ كُلِّ ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَوْهُمْ.

verses.en: Save us, O Lord our God, and gather us from among the heathen, to give thanks unto thy holy name, and to triumph in thy praise.
verses.ar: خَلِّصْنَا أَيُّهَا ٱلرَّبُّ إِلَهُنَا، وَٱجْمَعْنَا مِنْ بَيْنِ ٱلْأُمَمِ، لِنَحْمَدَ ٱسْمَ قُدْسِكَ، وَنَتَفَاخَرَ بِتَسْبِيحِكَ.

verses.en: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel from everlasting to everlasting: and let all the people say, Amen. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.ar: مُبَارَكٌ ٱلرَّبُّ إِلَهُ إِسْرَائِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْأَزَلِ وَإِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ. وَيَقُولُ كُلُّ ٱلشَّعْبِ: «آمِينَ». هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: O give thanks unto the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: اِحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ لِأَنَّهُ صَالِحٌ، لِأَنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ.

verses.en: Let the redeemed of the Lord say so, whom he hath redeemed from the hand of the enemy;
verses.ar: لِيَقُلْ مَفْدِيُّو ٱلرَّبِّ، ٱلَّذِينَ فَدَاهُمْ مِنْ يَدِ ٱلْعَدُوِّ،

verses.en: And gathered them out of the lands, from the east, and from the west, from the north, and from the south.
verses.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلْبُلْدَانِ جَمَعَهُمْ، مِنَ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَمِنَ ٱلْمَغْرِبِ، مِنَ ٱلشِّمَالِ وَمِنَ ٱلْبَحْرِ.

verses.en: They wandered in the wilderness in a solitary way; they found no city to dwell in.
verses.ar: تَاهُوا فِي ٱلْبَرِّيَّةِ فِي قَفْرٍ بِلَا طَرِيقٍ. لَمْ يَجِدُوا مَدِينَةَ سَكَنٍ.

verses.en: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.
verses.ar: جِيَاعٌ عِطَاشٌ أَيْضًا أَعْيَتْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ فِيهِمْ.

verses.en: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he delivered them out of their distresses.
verses.ar: فَصَرَخُوا إِلَى ٱلرَّبِّ فِي ضِيقِهِمْ، فَأَنْقَذَهُمْ مِنْ شَدَائِدِهِمْ،

verses.en: And he led them forth by the right way, that they might go to a city of habitation.
verses.ar: وَهَدَاهُمْ طَرِيقًا مُسْتَقِيمًا لِيَذْهَبُوا إِلَى مَدِينَةِ سَكَنٍ.

verses.en: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.ar: فَلْيَحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ عَلَى رَحْمَتِهِ وَعَجَائِبِهِ لِبَنِي آدَمَ.

verses.en: For he satisfieth the longing soul, and filleth the hungry soul with goodness.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ أَشْبَعَ نَفْسًا مُشْتَهِيَةً وَمَلَأَ نَفْسًا جَائِعَةً خَيْرًا،

verses.en: Such as sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron;
verses.ar: ٱلْجُلُوسَ فِي ٱلظُّلْمَةِ وَظِلَالِ ٱلْمَوْتِ، مُوثَقِينَ بِٱلذُّلِّ وَٱلْحَدِيدِ.

verses.en: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and contemned the counsel of the most High:
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُمْ عَصَوْا كَلَامَ ٱللهِ، وَأَهَانُوا مَشُورَةَ ٱلْعَلِيِّ.

verses.en: Therefore he brought down their heart with labour; they fell down, and there was none to help.
verses.ar: فَأَذَلَّ قُلُوبَهُمْ بِتَعَبٍ. عَثَرُوا وَلَا مَعِينَ.

verses.en: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saved them out of their distresses.
verses.ar: ثُمَّ صَرَخُوا إِلَى ٱلرَّبِّ فِي ضِيقِهِمْ، فَخَلَّصَهُمْ مِنْ شَدَائِدِهِمْ.

verses.en: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and brake their bands in sunder.
verses.ar: أَخْرَجَهُمْ مِنَ ٱلظُّلْمَةِ وَظِلَالِ ٱلْمَوْتِ، وَقَطَّعَ قُيُودَهُمْ.

verses.en: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.ar: فَلْيَحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ عَلَى رَحْمَتِهِ وَعَجَائِبِهِ لِبَنِي آدَمَ.

verses.en: For he hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ كَسَّرَ مَصَارِيعَ نُحَاسٍ، وَقَطَّعَ عَوَارِضَ حَدِيدٍ.

verses.en: Fools because of their transgression, and because of their iniquities, are afflicted.
verses.ar: وَٱلْجُهَّالُ مِنْ طَرِيقِ مَعْصِيَتِهِمْ، وَمِنْ آثَامِهِمْ يُذَلُّونَ.

verses.en: Their soul abhorreth all manner of meat; and they draw near unto the gates of death.
verses.ar: كَرِهَتْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ كُلَّ طَعَامٍ، وَٱقْتَرَبُوا إِلَى أَبْوَابِ ٱلْمَوْتِ.

verses.en: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saveth them out of their distresses.
verses.ar: فَصَرَخُوا إِلَى ٱلرَّبِّ فِي ضِيقِهِمْ، فَخَلَّصَهُمْ مِنْ شَدَائِدِهِمْ.

verses.en: He sent his word, and healed them, and delivered them from their destructions.
verses.ar: أَرْسَلَ كَلِمَتَهُ فَشَفَاهُمْ، وَنَجَّاهُمْ مِنْ تَهْلُكَاتِهِمْ.

verses.en: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.ar: فَلْيَحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ عَلَى رَحْمَتِهِ وَعَجَائِبِهِ لِبَنِي آدَمَ.

verses.en: And let them sacrifice the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his works with rejoicing.
verses.ar: وَلْيَذْبَحُوا لَهُ ذَبَائِحَ ٱلْحَمْدِ، وَلْيَعُدُّوا أَعْمَالَهُ بِتَرَنُّمٍ.

verses.en: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters;
verses.ar: اَلنَّازِلُونَ إِلَى ٱلْبَحْرِ فِي ٱلسُّفُنِ، ٱلْعَامِلُونَ عَمَلًا فِي ٱلْمِيَاهِ ٱلْكَثِيرَةِ،

verses.en: These see the works of the Lord, and his wonders in the deep.
verses.ar: هُمْ رَأَوْا أَعْمَالَ ٱلرَّبِّ وَعَجَائِبَهُ فِي ٱلْعُمْقِ.

verses.en: For he commandeth, and raiseth the stormy wind, which lifteth up the waves thereof.
verses.ar: أَمَرَ فَأَهَاجَ رِيحًا عَاصِفَةً فَرَفَعَتْ أَمْوَاجَهُ.

verses.en: They mount up to the heaven, they go down again to the depths: their soul is melted because of trouble.
verses.ar: يَصْعَدُونَ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ، يَهْبِطُونَ إِلَى ٱلْأَعْمَاقِ. ذَابَتْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ بِٱلشَّقَاءِ.

verses.en: They reel to and fro, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wits’ end.
verses.ar: يَتَمَايَلُونَ وَيَتَرَنَّحُونَ مِثْلَ ٱلسَّكْرَانِ، وَكُلُّ حِكْمَتِهِمِ ٱبْتُلِعَتْ.

verses.en: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he bringeth them out of their distresses.
verses.ar: فَيَصْرُخُونَ إِلَى ٱلرَّبِّ فِي ضِيقِهِمْ، وَمِنْ شَدَائِدِهِمْ يُخَلِّصُهُمْ.

verses.en: He maketh the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof are still.
verses.ar: يُهْدِئُ ٱلْعَاصِفَةَ فَتَسْكُنُ، وَتَسْكُتُ أَمْوَاجُهَا.

verses.en: Then are they glad because they be quiet; so he bringeth them unto their desired haven.
verses.ar: فَيَفْرَحُونَ لِأَنَّهُمْ هَدَأُوا، فَيَهْدِيهِمْ إِلَى ٱلْمَرْفَإِ ٱلَّذِي يُرِيدُونَهُ.

verses.en: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.ar: فَلْيَحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ عَلَى رَحْمَتِهِ وَعَجَائِبِهِ لِبَنِي آدَمَ.

verses.en: Let them exalt him also in the congregation of the people, and praise him in the assembly of the elders.
verses.ar: وَلْيَرْفَعُوهُ فِي مَجْمَعِ ٱلشَّعْبِ، وَلْيُسَبِّحُوهُ فِي مَجْلِسِ ٱلْمَشَايِخِ.

verses.en: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, and the watersprings into dry ground;
verses.ar: يَجْعَلُ ٱلْأَنْهَارَ قِفَارًا، وَمَجَارِيَ ٱلْمِيَاهِ مَعْطَشَةً،

verses.en: A fruitful land into barrenness, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.
verses.ar: وَٱلْأَرْضَ ٱلْمُثْمِرَةَ سَبِخَةً مِنْ شَرِّ ٱلسَّاكِنِينَ فِيهَا.

verses.en: He turneth the wilderness into a standing water, and dry ground into watersprings.
verses.ar: يَجْعَلُ ٱلْقَفْرَ غَدِيرَ مِيَاهٍ، وَأَرْضًا يَبَسًا يَنَابِيعَ مِيَاهٍ.

verses.en: And there he maketh the hungry to dwell, that they may prepare a city for habitation;
verses.ar: وَيُسْكِنُ هُنَاكَ ٱلْجِيَاعَ فَيُهَيِّئُونَ مَدِينَةَ سَكَنٍ.

verses.en: And sow the fields, and plant vineyards, which may yield fruits of increase.
verses.ar: وَيَزْرَعُونَ حُقُولًا وَيَغْرِسُونَ كُرُومًا، فَتَصْنَعُ ثَمَرَ غَلَّةٍ.

verses.en: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly; and suffereth not their cattle to decrease.
verses.ar: وَيُبَارِكُهُمْ فَيَكْثُرُونَ جِدًّا، وَلَا يُقَلِّلُ بَهَائِمَهُمْ.

verses.en: Again, they are minished and brought low through oppression, affliction, and sorrow.
verses.ar: ثُمَّ يَقِلُّونَ وَيَنْحَنُونَ مِنْ ضَغْطِ ٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْحُزْنِ.

verses.en: He poureth contempt upon princes, and causeth them to wander in the wilderness, where there is no way.
verses.ar: يَسْكُبُ هَوَانًا عَلَى رُؤَسَاءَ، وَيُضِلُّهُمْ فِي تِيهٍ بِلَا طَرِيقٍ،

verses.en: Yet setteth he the poor on high from affliction, and maketh him families like a flock.
verses.ar: وَيُعَلِّي ٱلْمِسْكِينَ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ، وَيَجْعَلُ ٱلْقَبَائِلَ مِثْلَ قُطْعَانِ ٱلْغَنَمِ.

verses.en: The righteous shall see it, and rejoice: and all iniquity shall stop her mouth.
verses.ar: يَرَى ذَلِكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمُونَ فَيَفْرَحُونَ، وَكُلُّ إِثْمٍ يَسُدُّ فَاهُ.

verses.en: Whoso is wise, and will observe these things, even they shall understand the lovingkindness of the Lord.
verses.ar: مَنْ كَانَ حَكِيمًا يَحْفَظُ هَذَا، وَيَتَعَقَّلُ مَرَاحِمَ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: O God, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
verses.ar: ثَابِتٌ قَلْبِي يَا ٱللهُ. أُغَنِّي وَأُرَنِّمُ. كَذَلِكَ مَجْدِي.

verses.en: Awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.
verses.ar: ٱسْتَيْقِظِي أَيَّتُهَا ٱلرَّبَابُ وَٱلْعُودُ. أَنَا أَسْتَيْقِظُ سَحَرًا.

verses.en: I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: and I will sing praises unto thee among the nations.
verses.ar: أَحْمَدُكَ بَيْنَ ٱلشُّعُوبِ يَارَبُّ، وَأُرَنِّمُ لَكَ بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ.

verses.en: For thy mercy is great above the heavens: and thy truth reacheth unto the clouds.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ رَحْمَتَكَ قَدْ عَظُمَتْ فَوْقَ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ، وَإِلَى ٱلْغَمَامِ حَقُّكَ.

verses.en: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: and thy glory above all the earth;
verses.ar: ٱرْتَفِعِ ٱللَّهُمَّ عَلَى ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ، وَلْيَرْتَفِعْ عَلَى كُلِّ ٱلْأَرْضِ مَجْدُكَ.

verses.en: That thy beloved may be delivered: save with thy right hand, and answer me.
verses.ar: لِكَيْ يَنْجُوَ أَحِبَّاؤُكَ. خَلِّصْ بِيَمِينِكَ وَٱسْتَجِبْ لِي.

verses.en: God hath spoken in his holiness; I will rejoice, I will divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.
verses.ar: ٱللهُ قَدْ تَكَلَّمَ بِقُدْسِهِ: «أَبْتَهِجُ، أَقْسِمُ شَكِيمَ، وَأَقِيسُ وَادِيَ سُكُّوتَ.

verses.en: Gilead is mine; Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the strength of mine head; Judah is my lawgiver;
verses.ar: لِي جِلْعَادُ، لِي مَنَسَّى. إِفْرَايِمُ خُوذَةُ رَأْسِي. يَهُوذَا صَوْلَجَانِي.

verses.en: Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe; over Philistia will I triumph.
verses.ar: مُوآبُ مِرْحَضَتِيْ. عَلَى أَدُومَ أَطْرَحُ نَعْلِي. يَا فَلَسْطِينُ ٱهْتِفِي عَلَيَّ».

verses.en: Who will bring me into the strong city? who will lead me into Edom?
verses.ar: مَنْ يَقُودُنِي إِلَى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ ٱلْمُحَصَّنَةِ؟ مَنْ يَهْدِينِي إِلَى أَدُومَ؟

verses.en: Wilt not thou, O God, who hast cast us off? and wilt not thou, O God, go forth with our hosts?
verses.ar: أَلَيْسَ أَنْتَ يَا ٱللهُ ٱلَّذِي رَفَضْتَنَا، وَلَا تَخْرُجُ يَا ٱللهُ مَعَ جُيُوشِنَا؟

verses.en: Give us help from trouble: for vain is the help of man.
verses.ar: أَعْطِنَا عَوْنًا فِي ٱلضِّيقِ، فَبَاطِلٌ هُوَ خَلَاصُ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ.

verses.en: Through God we shall do valiantly: for he it is that shall tread down our enemies.
verses.ar: بِٱللهِ نَصْنَعُ بِبَأْسٍ، وَهُوَ يَدُوسُ أَعْدَاءَنَا.

verses.en: Hold not thy peace, O God of my praise;
verses.ar: يَا إِلَهَ تَسْبِيحِي لَا تَسْكُتْ،

verses.en: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ قَدِ ٱنْفَتَحَ عَلَيَّ فَمُ ٱلشِّرِّيرِ وَفَمُ ٱلْغِشِّ. تَكَلَّمُوا مَعِي بِلِسَانِ كِذْبٍ،

verses.en: They compassed me about also with words of hatred; and fought against me without a cause.
verses.ar: بِكَلَامِ بُغْضٍ أَحَاطُوا بِي، وَقَاتَلُونِي بِلَا سَبَبٍ.

verses.en: For my love they are my adversaries: but I give myself unto prayer.
verses.ar: بَدَلَ مَحَبَّتِي يُخَاصِمُونَنِي. أَمَّا أَنَا فَصَلَاةٌ.

verses.en: And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.
verses.ar: وَضَعُوا عَلَيَّ شَرًّا بَدَلَ خَيْرٍ، وَبُغْضًا بَدَلَ حُبِّي.

verses.en: Set thou a wicked man over him: and let Satan stand at his right hand.
verses.ar: فَأَقِمْ أَنْتَ عَلَيْهِ شِرِّيرًا، وَلْيَقِفْ شَيْطَانٌ عَنْ يَمِينِهِ.

verses.en: When he shall be judged, let him be condemned: and let his prayer become sin.
verses.ar: إِذَا حُوكِمَ فَلْيَخْرُجْ مُذْنِبًا، وَصَلَاتُهُ فَلْتَكُنْ خَطِيَّةً.

verses.en: Let his days be few; and let another take his office.
verses.ar: لِتَكُنْ أَيَّامُهُ قَلِيلَةً، وَوَظِيفَتُهُ لِيَأْخُذْهَا آخَرُ.

verses.en: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.
verses.ar: لِيَكُنْ بَنُوهُ أَيْتَامًا وَٱمْرَأَتُهُ أَرْمَلَةً.

verses.en: Let his children be continually vagabonds, and beg: let them seek their bread also out of their desolate places.
verses.ar: لِيَتِهْ بَنُوهُ تَيَهَانًا وَيَسْتَعْطُوا، وَيَلْتَمِسُوا خُبْزًا مِنْ خِرَبِهِمْ.

verses.en: Let the extortioner catch all that he hath; and let the strangers spoil his labour.
verses.ar: لِيَصْطَدِ ٱلْمُرَابِي كُلَّ مَا لَهُ، وَلْيَنْهَبِ ٱلْغُرَبَاءُ تَعَبَهُ.

verses.en: Let there be none to extend mercy unto him: neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children.
verses.ar: لَا يَكُنْ لَهُ بَاسِطٌ رَحْمَةً، وَلَا يَكُنْ مُتَرَأِفٌ عَلَى يَتَامَاهُ.

verses.en: Let his posterity be cut off; and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.
verses.ar: لِتَنْقَرِضْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُ. فِي ٱلْجِيلِ ٱلْقَادِمِ لِيُمْحَ ٱسْمُهُمْ.

verses.en: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with the Lord; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.
verses.ar: لِيُذْكَرْ إِثْمُ آبَائِهِ لَدَى ٱلرَّبِّ، وَلَا تُمْحَ خَطِيَّةُ أُمِّهِ.

verses.en: Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth.
verses.ar: لِتَكُنْ أَمَامَ ٱلرَّبِّ دَائِمًا، وَلْيَقْرِضْ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ذِكْرَهُمْ.

verses.en: Because that he remembered not to shew mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.
verses.ar: مِنْ أَجْلِ أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَذْكُرْ أَنْ يَصْنَعَ رَحْمَةً، بَلْ طَرَدَ إِنْسَانًا مِسْكِينًا وَفَقِيرًا وَٱلْمُنْسَحِقَ ٱلْقَلْبِ لِيُمِيتَهُ.

verses.en: As he loved cursing, so let it come unto him: as he delighted not in blessing, so let it be far from him.
verses.ar: وَأَحَبَّ ٱللَّعْنَةَ فَأَتَتْهُ، وَلَمْ يُسَرَّ بِٱلْبَرَكَةِ فَتَبَاعَدَتْ عَنْهُ.

verses.en: As he clothed himself with cursing like as with his garment, so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones.
verses.ar: وَلَبِسَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ مِثْلَ ثَوْبِهِ، فَدَخَلَتْ كَمِيَاهٍ فِي حَشَاهُ وَكَزَيْتٍ فِي عِظَامِهِ.

verses.en: Let it be unto him as the garment which covereth him, and for a girdle wherewith he is girded continually.
verses.ar: لِتَكُنْ لَهُ كَثَوْبٍ يَتَعَطَّفُ بِهِ، وَكَمِنْطَقَةٍ يَتَنَطَّقُ بِهَا دَائِمًا.

verses.en: Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from the Lord, and of them that speak evil against my soul.
verses.ar: هَذِهِ أُجْرَةُ مُبْغِضِيَّ مِنْ عِنْدِ ٱلرَّبِّ، وَأُجْرَةُ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّمِينَ شَرًّا عَلَى نَفْسِي.

verses.en: But do thou for me, O God the Lord, for thy name’s sake: because thy mercy is good, deliver thou me.
verses.ar: أَمَّا أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ ٱلسَّيِّدُ فَٱصْنَعْ مَعِي مِنْ أَجْلِ ٱسْمِكَ. لِأَنَّ رَحْمَتَكَ طَيِّبَةٌ نَجِّنِي.

verses.en: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.
verses.ar: فَإِنِّي فَقِيرٌ وَمِسْكِينٌ أَنَا، وَقَلْبِي مَجْرُوحٌ فِي دَاخِلِي.

verses.en: I am gone like the shadow when it declineth: I am tossed up and down as the locust.
verses.ar: كَظِلٍّ عِنْدَ مَيْلِهِ ذَهَبْتُ. ٱنْتَفَضْتُ كَجَرَادَةٍ.

verses.en: My knees are weak through fasting; and my flesh faileth of fatness.
verses.ar: رُكْبَتَايَ ٱرْتَعَشَتَا مِنَ ٱلصَّوْمِ، وَلَحْمِي هُزِلَ عَنْ سِمَنٍ.

verses.en: I became also a reproach unto them: when they looked upon me they shaked their heads.
verses.ar: وَأَنَا صِرْتُ عَارًا عِنْدَهُمْ. يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَيَّ وَيُنْغِضُونَ رُؤُوسَهُمْ

verses.en: Help me, O Lord my God: O save me according to thy mercy:
verses.ar: أَعِنِّي يَارَبُّ إِلَهِي. خَلِّصْنِي حَسَبَ رَحْمَتِكَ.

verses.en: That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Lord, hast done it.
verses.ar: وَلْيَعْلَمُوا أَنَّ هَذِهِ هِيَ يَدُكَ. أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ فَعَلْتَ هَذَا.

verses.en: Let them curse, but bless thou: when they arise, let them be ashamed; but let thy servant rejoice.
verses.ar: أَمَّا هُمْ فَيَلْعَنُونَ، وَأَمَّا أَنْتَ فَتُبَارِكُ. قَامُوا وَخَزُوا، أَمَّا عَبْدُكَ فَيَفْرَحُ.

verses.en: Let mine adversaries be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own confusion, as with a mantle.
verses.ar: لِيَلْبِسْ خُصَمَائِي خَجَلًا، وَلْيَتَعَطَّفُوا بِخِزْيِهِمْ كَٱلرِّدَاءِ.

verses.en: I will greatly praise the Lord with my mouth; yea, I will praise him among the multitude.
verses.ar: أَحْمَدُ ٱلرَّبَّ جِدًّا بِفَمِي، وَفِي وَسَطِ كَثِيرِينَ أُسَبِّحُهُ.

verses.en: For he shall stand at the right hand of the poor, to save him from those that condemn his soul.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ يَقُومُ عَنْ يَمِينِ ٱلْمَسْكِينِ، لِيُخَلِّصَهُ مِنَ ٱلْقَاضِينَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ.

verses.en: The Lord said unto my Lord, Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.
verses.ar: قَالَ ٱلرَّبُّ لِرَبِّي: «ٱجْلِسْ عَنْ يَمِينِي حَتَّى أَضَعَ أَعْدَاءَكَ مَوْطِئًا لِقَدَمَيْكَ».

verses.en: The Lord shall send the rod of thy strength out of Zion: rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.
verses.ar: يُرْسِلُ ٱلرَّبُّ قَضِيبَ عِزِّكَ مِنْ صِهْيَوْنَ. تَسَلَّطْ فِي وَسَطِ أَعْدَائِكَ.

verses.en: Thy people shall be willing in the day of thy power, in the beauties of holiness from the womb of the morning: thou hast the dew of thy youth.
verses.ar: شَعْبُكَ مُنْتَدَبٌ فِي يَوْمِ قُوَّتِكَ، فِي زِينَةٍ مُقَدَّسَةٍ مِنْ رَحِمِ ٱلْفَجْرِ، لَكَ طَلُّ حَدَاثَتِكَ.

verses.en: The Lord hath sworn, and will not repent, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchizedek.
verses.ar: أَقْسَمَ ٱلرَّبُّ وَلَنْ يَنْدَمَ: «أَنْتَ كَاهِنٌ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ عَلَى رُتْبَةِ مَلْكِي صَادَقَ».

verses.en: The Lord at thy right hand shall strike through kings in the day of his wrath.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ عَنْ يَمِينِكَ يُحَطِّمُ فِي يَوْمِ رِجْزِهِ مُلُوكًا.

verses.en: He shall judge among the heathen, he shall fill the places with the dead bodies; he shall wound the heads over many countries.
verses.ar: يَدِينُ بَيْنَ ٱلْأُمَمِ. مَلَأَ جُثَثًا أَرْضًا وَاسِعَةً. سَحَقَ رُؤُوسَهَا.

verses.en: He shall drink of the brook in the way: therefore shall he lift up the head.
verses.ar: مِنَ ٱلنَّهْرِ يَشْرَبُ فِي ٱلطَّرِيقِ، لِذَلِكَ يَرْفَعُ ٱلرَّأْسَ.

verses.en: Praise ye the Lord. I will praise the Lord with my whole heart, in the assembly of the upright, and in the congregation.
verses.ar: هَلِّلُويَا. أَحْمَدُ ٱلرَّبَّ بِكُلِّ قَلْبِي فِي مَجْلِسِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِينَ وَجَمَاعَتِهِمْ.

verses.en: The works of the Lord are great, sought out of all them that have pleasure therein.
verses.ar: عَظِيمَةٌ هِيَ أَعْمَالُ ٱلرَّبِّ. مَطْلُوبَةٌ لِكُلِّ ٱلْمَسْرُورِينَ بِهَا.

verses.en: His work is honourable and glorious: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
verses.ar: جَلَالٌ وَبَهَاءٌ عَمَلُهُ، وَعَدْلُهُ قَائِمٌ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: He hath made his wonderful works to be remembered: the Lord is gracious and full of compassion.
verses.ar: صَنَعَ ذِكْرًا لِعَجَائِبِهِ. حَنَّانٌ وَرَحِيمٌ هُوَ ٱلرَّبُّ.

verses.en: He hath given meat unto them that fear him: he will ever be mindful of his covenant.
verses.ar: أَعْطَى خَائِفِيهِ طَعَامًا. يَذْكُرُ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ عَهْدَهُ.

verses.en: He hath shewed his people the power of his works, that he may give them the heritage of the heathen.
verses.ar: أَخْبَرَ شَعْبَهُ بِقُوَّةِ أَعْمَالِهِ، لِيُعْطِيَهُمْ مِيرَاثَ ٱلْأُمَمِ.

verses.en: The works of his hands are verity and judgment; all his commandments are sure.
verses.ar: أَعْمَالُ يَدَيْهِ أَمَانَةٌ وَحَقٌّ. كُلُّ وَصَايَاهُ أَمِينَةٌ.

verses.en: They stand fast for ever and ever, and are done in truth and uprightness.
verses.ar: ثَابِتَةٌ مَدَى ٱلدَّهْرِ وَٱلْأَبَدِ، مَصْنُوعَةٌ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَٱلِٱسْتِقَامَةِ.

verses.en: He sent redemption unto his people: he hath commanded his covenant for ever: holy and reverend is his name.
verses.ar: أَرْسَلَ فِدَاءً لِشَعْبِهِ. أَقَامَ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ عَهْدَهُ. قُدُّوسٌ وَمَهُوبٌ ٱسْمُهُ.

verses.en: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom: a good understanding have all they that do his commandments: his praise endureth for ever.
verses.ar: رَأْسُ ٱلْحِكْمَةِ مَخَافَةُ ٱلرَّبِّ. فِطْنَةٌ جَيِّدَةٌ لِكُلِّ عَامِلِيهَا. تَسْبِيحُهُ قَائِمٌ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Praise ye the Lord. Blessed is the man that feareth the Lord, that delighteth greatly in his commandments.
verses.ar: هَلِّلُويَا. طُوبَى لِلرَّجُلِ ٱلْمُتَّقِي ٱلرَّبِّ، ٱلْمَسْرُورِ جِدًّا بِوَصَايَاهُ.

verses.en: His seed shall be mighty upon earth: the generation of the upright shall be blessed.
verses.ar: نَسْلُهُ يَكُونُ قَوِيًّا فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ. جِيلُ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِينَ يُبَارَكُ.

verses.en: Wealth and riches shall be in his house: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
verses.ar: رَغْدٌ وَغِنًى فِي بَيْتِهِ، وَبِرُّهُ قَائِمٌ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness: he is gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.
verses.ar: نُورٌ أَشْرَقَ فِي ٱلظُّلْمَةِ لِلْمُسْتَقِيمِينَ. هُوَ حَنَّانٌ وَرَحِيمٌ وَصِدِّيقٌ.

verses.en: A good man sheweth favour, and lendeth: he will guide his affairs with discretion.
verses.ar: سَعِيدٌ هُوَ ٱلرَّجُلُ ٱلَّذِي يَتَرَأَّفُ وَيُقْرِضُ. يُدَبِّرُ أُمُورَهُ بِٱلْحَقِّ.

verses.en: Surely he shall not be moved for ever: the righteous shall be in everlasting remembrance.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ لَا يَتَزَعْزَعُ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ. ٱلصِّدِّيقُ يَكُونُ لِذِكْرٍ أَبَدِيٍّ.

verses.en: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: his heart is fixed, trusting in the Lord.
verses.ar: لَا يَخْشَى مِنْ خَبَرِ سُوءٍ. قَلْبُهُ ثَابِتٌ مُتَّكِلًا عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, until he see his desire upon his enemies.
verses.ar: قَلْبُهُ مُمَكَّنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ حَتَّى يَرَى بِمُضَايِقِيهِ.

verses.en: He hath dispersed, he hath given to the poor; his righteousness endureth for ever; his horn shall be exalted with honour.
verses.ar: فَرَّقَ أَعْطَى ٱلْمَسَاكِينَ. بِرُّهُ قَائِمٌ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ. قَرْنُهُ يَنْتَصِبُ بِٱلْمَجْدِ.

verses.en: The wicked shall see it, and be grieved; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away: the desire of the wicked shall perish.
verses.ar: ٱلشِّرِّيرُ يَرَى فَيَغْضَبُ. يُحَرِّقُ أَسْنَانَهُ وَيَذُوبُ. شَهْوَةُ ٱلشِّرِّيرِ تَبِيدُ.

verses.en: Praise ye the Lord. Praise, O ye servants of the Lord, praise the name of the Lord.
verses.ar: هَلِّلُويَا. سَبِّحُوا يَا عَبِيدَ ٱلرَّبِّ. سَبِّحُوا ٱسْمَ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: Blessed be the name of the Lord from this time forth and for evermore.
verses.ar: لِيَكُنِ ٱسْمُ ٱلرَّبِّ مُبَارَكًا مِنَ ٱلْآنَ وَإِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ.

verses.en: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same the Lord’s name is to be praised.
verses.ar: مِنْ مَشْرِقِ ٱلشَّمْسِ إِلَى مَغْرِبِهَا ٱسْمُ ٱلرَّبِّ مُسَبَّحٌ.

verses.en: The Lord is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ عَالٍ فَوْقَ كُلِّ ٱلْأُمَمِ. فَوْقَ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ مَجْدُهُ.

verses.en: Who is like unto the Lord our God, who dwelleth on high,
verses.ar: مَنْ مِثْلُ ٱلرَّبِّ إِلَهِنَا ٱلسَّاكِنِ فِي ٱلْأَعَالِي؟

verses.en: Who humbleth himself to behold the things that are in heaven, and in the earth!
verses.ar: ٱلنَّاظِرِ ٱلْأَسَافِلَ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَفِي ٱلْأَرْضِ،

verses.en: He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth the needy out of the dunghill;
verses.ar: ٱلْمُقِيمِ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ مِنَ ٱلتُّرَابِ، ٱلرَّافِعِ ٱلْبَائِسَ مِنَ ٱلْمَزْبَلَةِ

verses.en: That he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.
verses.ar: لِيُجْلِسَهُ مَعَ أَشْرَافٍ، مَعَ أَشْرَافِ شَعْبِهِ.

verses.en: He maketh the barren woman to keep house, and to be a joyful mother of children. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.ar: ٱلْمُسْكِنِ ٱلْعَاقِرَ فِي بَيْتٍ، أُمَّ أَوْلَادٍ فَرْحَانَةً. هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: When Israel went out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language;
verses.ar: عِنْدَ خُرُوجِ إِسْرَائِيلَ مِنْ مِصْرَ، وَبَيْتِ يَعْقُوبَ مِنْ شَعْبٍ أَعْجَمَ،

verses.en: Judah was his sanctuary, and Israel his dominion.
verses.ar: كَانَ يَهُوذَا مَقْدِسَهُ، وَإِسْرَائِيلُ مَحَلَّ سُلْطَانِهِ.

verses.en: The sea saw it, and fled: Jordan was driven back.
verses.ar: ٱلْبَحْرُ رَآهُ فَهَرَبَ. ٱلْأُرْدُنُّ رَجَعَ إِلَى خَلْفٍ.

verses.en: The mountains skipped like rams, and the little hills like lambs.
verses.ar: ٱلْجِبَالُ قَفَزَتْ مِثْلَ ٱلْكِبَاشِ، وَٱلْآكَامُ مِثْلَ حُمْلَانِ ٱلْغَنَمِ.

verses.en: What ailed thee, O thou sea, that thou fleddest? thou Jordan, that thou wast driven back?
verses.ar: مَا لَكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْبَحْرُ قَدْ هَرَبْتَ ؟ وَمَا لَكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْأُرْدُنُّ قَدْ رَجَعْتَ إِلَى خَلْفٍ ؟

verses.en: Ye mountains, that ye skipped like rams; and ye little hills, like lambs?
verses.ar: وَمَا لَكُنَّ أَيَّتُهَا ٱلْجِبَالُ قَدْ قَفَزْتُنَّ مِثْلَ ٱلْكِبَاشِ، وَأَيَّتُهَا ٱلتِّلَالُ مِثْلَ حُمْلَانِ ٱلْغَنَمِ؟

verses.en: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob;
verses.ar: أَيَّتُهَا ٱلْأَرْضُ تَزَلْزَلِي مِنْ قُدَّامِ ٱلرَّبِّ، مِنْ قُدَّامِ إِلَهِ يَعْقُوبَ!

verses.en: Which turned the rock into a standing water, the flint into a fountain of waters.
verses.ar: ٱلْمُحَوِّلِ ٱلصَّخْرَةَ إِلَى غُدْرَانِ مِيَاهٍ، ٱلصَّوَّانَ إِلَى يَنَابِيعِ مِيَاهٍ.

verses.en: Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto thy name give glory, for thy mercy, and for thy truth’s sake.
verses.ar: لَيْسَ لَنَا يَارَبُّ لَيْسَ لَنَا، لَكِنْ لِٱسْمِكَ أَعْطِ مَجْدًا، مِنْ أَجْلِ رَحْمَتِكَ مِنْ أَجْلِ أَمَانَتِكَ.

verses.en: Wherefore should the heathen say, Where is now their God?
verses.ar: لِمَاذَا يَقُولُ ٱلْأُمَمُ: «أَيْنَ هُوَ إِلَهُهُمْ؟».

verses.en: But our God is in the heavens: he hath done whatsoever he hath pleased.
verses.ar: إِنَّ إِلَهَنَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ. كُلَّمَا شَاءَ صَنَعَ.

verses.en: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.
verses.ar: أَصْنَامُهُمْ فِضَّةٌ وَذَهَبٌ، عَمَلُ أَيْدِي ٱلنَّاسِ.

verses.en: They have mouths, but they speak not: eyes have they, but they see not:
verses.ar: لَهَا أَفْوَاهٌ وَلَا تَتَكَلَّمُ. لَهَا أَعْيُنٌ وَلَا تُبْصِرُ.

verses.en: They have ears, but they hear not: noses have they, but they smell not:
verses.ar: لَهَا آذَانٌ وَلَا تَسْمَعُ. لَهَا مَنَاخِرُ وَلَا تَشُمُّ.

verses.en: They have hands, but they handle not: feet have they, but they walk not: neither speak they through their throat.
verses.ar: لَهَا أَيْدٍ وَلَا تَلْمِسُ. لَهَا أَرْجُلٌ وَلَا تَمْشِي، وَلَا تَنْطِقُ بِحَنَاجِرِهَا.

verses.en: They that make them are like unto them; so is every one that trusteth in them.
verses.ar: مِثْلَهَا يَكُونُ صَانِعُوهَا، بَلْ كُلُّ مَنْ يَتَّكِلُ عَلَيْهَا.

verses.en: O Israel, trust thou in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
verses.ar: يَا إِسْرَائِيلُ، ٱتَّكِلْ عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ. هُوَ مُعِينُهُمْ وَمِجَنُّهُمْ.

verses.en: O house of Aaron, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
verses.ar: يَا بَيْتَ هَارُونَ، ٱتَّكِلُوا عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ. هُوَ مُعِينُهُمْ وَمِجَنُّهُمْ.

verses.en: Ye that fear the Lord, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
verses.ar: يَا مُتَّقِي ٱلرَّبِّ، ٱتَّكِلُوا عَلَى ٱلرَّبِّ. هُوَ مُعِينُهُمْ وَمِجَنُّهُمْ.

verses.en: The Lord hath been mindful of us: he will bless us; he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ قَدْ ذَكَرَنَا فَيُبَارِكُ. يُبَارِكُ بَيْتَ إِسْرَائِيلَ. يُبَارِكُ بَيْتَ هَارُونَ.

verses.en: He will bless them that fear the Lord, both small and great.
verses.ar: يُبَارِكُ مُتَّقِي ٱلرَّبِّ، ٱلصِّغَارَ مَعَ ٱلْكِبَارِ.

verses.en: The Lord shall increase you more and more, you and your children.
verses.ar: لِيَزِدِ ٱلرَّبُّ عَلَيْكُمْ، عَلَيْكُمْ وَعَلَى أَبْنَائِكُمْ.

verses.en: Ye are blessed of the Lord which made heaven and earth.
verses.ar: أَنْتُمْ مُبَارَكُونَ لِلرَّبِّ ٱلصَّانِعِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ.

verses.en: The heaven, even the heavens, are the Lord’s: but the earth hath he given to the children of men.
verses.ar: ٱلسَّمَاوَاتُ سَمَاوَاتٌ لِلرَّبِّ، أَمَّا ٱلْأَرْضُ فَأَعْطَاهَا لِبَنِي آدَمَ.

verses.en: The dead praise not the Lord, neither any that go down into silence.
verses.ar: لَيْسَ ٱلْأَمْوَاتُ يُسَبِّحُونَ ٱلرَّبَّ، وَلَا مَنْ يَنْحَدِرُ إِلَى أَرْضِ ٱلسُّكُوتِ.

verses.en: But we will bless the Lord from this time forth and for evermore. Praise the Lord.
verses.ar: أَمَّا نَحْنُ فَنُبَارِكُ ٱلرَّبَّ مِنَ ٱلْآنَ وَإِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ. هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: I love the Lord, because he hath heard my voice and my supplications.
verses.ar: أَحْبَبْتُ لِأَنَّ ٱلرَّبَّ يَسْمَعُ صَوْتِي، تَضَرُّعَاتِي.

verses.en: Because he hath inclined his ear unto me, therefore will I call upon him as long as I live.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّهُ أَمَالَ أُذْنَهُ إِلَيَّ فَأَدْعُوهُ مُدَّةَ حَيَاتِي.

verses.en: The sorrows of death compassed me, and the pains of hell gat hold upon me: I found trouble and sorrow.
verses.ar: ٱكْتَنَفَتْنِي حِبَالُ ٱلْمَوْتِ. أَصَابَتْنِي شَدَائِدُ ٱلْهَاوِيَةِ. كَابَدْتُ ضِيقًا وَحُزْنًا.

verses.en: Then called I upon the name of the Lord; O Lord, I beseech thee, deliver my soul.
verses.ar: وَبِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ دَعَوْتُ: «آهِ يَارَبُّ، نَجِّ نَفْسِي!».

verses.en: Gracious is the Lord, and righteous; yea, our God is merciful.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ حَنَّانٌ وَصِدِّيقٌ، وَإِلَهُنَا رَحِيمٌ.

verses.en: The Lord preserveth the simple: I was brought low, and he helped me.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ حَافِظُ ٱلْبُسَطَاءِ. تَذَلَّلْتُ فَخَلَّصَنِي.

verses.en: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for the Lord hath dealt bountifully with thee.
verses.ar: ٱرْجِعِي يَا نَفْسِي إِلَى رَاحَتِكِ، لِأَنَّ ٱلرَّبَّ قَدْ أَحْسَنَ إِلَيْكِ.

verses.en: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّكَ أَنْقَذْتَ نَفْسِي مِنَ ٱلْمَوْتِ، وَعَيْنِي مِنَ ٱلدَّمْعَةِ، وَرِجْلَيَّ مِنَ ٱلزَّلَقِ.

verses.en: I will walk before the Lord in the land of the living.
verses.ar: أَسْلُكُ قُدَّامَ ٱلرَّبِّ فِي أَرْضِ ٱلْأَحْيَاءِ.

verses.en: I believed, therefore have I spoken: I was greatly afflicted:
verses.ar: آمَنْتُ لِذَلِكَ تَكَلَّمْتُ: «أَنَا تَذَلَّلْتُ جِدًّا».

verses.en: I said in my haste, All men are liars.
verses.ar: أَنَا قُلْتُ فِي حَيْرَتِي: «كُلُّ إِنْسَانٍ كَاذِبٌ».

verses.en: What shall I render unto the Lord for all his benefits toward me?
verses.ar: مَاذَا أَرُدُّ لِلرَّبِّ مِنْ أَجْلِ كُلِّ حَسَنَاتِهِ لِي؟

verses.en: I will take the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of the Lord.
verses.ar: كَأْسَ ٱلْخَلَاصِ أَتَنَاوَلُ، وَبِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ أَدْعُو.

verses.en: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people.
verses.ar: أُوفِي نُذُورِي لِلرَّبِّ مُقَابِلَ كُلِّ شَعْبِهِ.

verses.en: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.
verses.ar: عَزِيزٌ فِي عَيْنَيِ ٱلرَّبِّ مَوْتُ أَتْقِيَائِهِ.

verses.en: O Lord, truly I am thy servant; I am thy servant, and the son of thine handmaid: thou hast loosed my bonds.
verses.ar: آهِ يَارَبُّ، لِأَنِّي عَبْدُكَ! أَنَا عَبْدُكَ ٱبْنُ أَمَتِكَ. حَلَلْتَ قُيُودِي.

verses.en: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the Lord.
verses.ar: فَلَكَ أَذْبَحُ ذَبِيحَةَ حَمْدٍ، وَبِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ أَدْعُو.

verses.en: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people,
verses.ar: أُوفِي نُذُورِي لِلرَّبِّ مُقَابِلَ شَعْبِهِ،

verses.en: In the courts of the Lord’s house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.ar: فِي دِيَارِ بَيْتِ ٱلرَّبِّ، فِي وَسَطِكِ يَا أُورُشَلِيمُ. هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: O praise the Lord, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.
verses.ar: سَبِّحُوا ٱلرَّبَّ يَا كُلَّ ٱلْأُمَمِ. حَمِّدُوهُ يَا كُلَّ ٱلشُّعُوبِ.

verses.en: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the Lord endureth for ever. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.ar: لِأَنَّ رَحْمَتَهُ قَدْ قَوِيَتْ عَلَيْنَا، وَأَمَانَةُ ٱلرَّبِّ إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ. هَلِّلُويَا.

verses.en: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: because his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: اِحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ لِأَنَّهُ صَالِحٌ، لِأَنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ.

verses.en: Let Israel now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: لِيَقُلْ إِسْرَائِيلُ: «إِنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ».

verses.en: Let the house of Aaron now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: لِيَقُلْ بَيْتُ هَارُونَ: «إِنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ».

verses.en: Let them now that fear the Lord say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: لِيَقُلْ مُتَّقُو ٱلرَّبِّ: «إِنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ».

verses.en: I called upon the Lord in distress: the Lord answered me, and set me in a large place.
verses.ar: مِنَ ٱلضِّيقِ دَعَوْتُ ٱلرَّبَّ فَأَجَابَنِي مِنَ ٱلرُّحْبِ.

verses.en: The Lord is on my side; I will not fear: what can man do unto me?
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ لِي فَلَا أَخَافُ. مَاذَا يَصْنَعُ بِي ٱلْإِنْسَانُ؟

verses.en: The Lord taketh my part with them that help me: therefore shall I see my desire upon them that hate me.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ لِي بَيْنَ مُعِينِيَّ، وَأَنَا سَأَرَى بِأَعْدَائِي.

verses.en: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in man.
verses.ar: ٱلِٱحْتِمَاءُ بِٱلرَّبِّ خَيْرٌ مِنَ ٱلتَّوَكُّلِ عَلَى إِنْسَانٍ.

verses.en: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in princes.
verses.ar: ٱلِٱحْتِمَاءُ بِٱلرَّبِّ خَيْرٌ مِنَ ٱلتَّوَكُّلِ عَلَى ٱلرُّؤَسَاءِ.

verses.en: All nations compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord will I destroy them.
verses.ar: كُلُّ ٱلْأُمَمِ أَحَاطُوا بِي. بِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ أُبِيدُهُمْ.

verses.en: They compassed me about; yea, they compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.
verses.ar: أَحَاطُوا بِي وَٱكْتَنَفُونِي. بِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ أُبِيدُهُمْ.

verses.en: They compassed me about like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns: for in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.
verses.ar: أَحَاطُوا بِي مِثْلَ ٱلنَّحْلِ. ٱنْطَفَأُوا كَنَارِ ٱلشَّوْكِ. بِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ أُبِيدُهُمْ.

verses.en: Thou hast thrust sore at me that I might fall: but the Lord helped me.
verses.ar: دَحَرْتَنِي دُحُورًا لِأَسْقُطَ، أَمَّا ٱلرَّبُّ فَعَضَدَنِي.

verses.en: The Lord is my strength and song, and is become my salvation.
verses.ar: قُوَّتِي وَتَرَنُّمِي ٱلرَّبُّ، وَقَدْ صَارَ لِي خَلَاصًا.

verses.en: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tabernacles of the righteous: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.
verses.ar: صَوْتُ تَرَنُّمٍ وَخَلَاصٍ فِي خِيَامِ ٱلصِّدِّيقِينَ: «يَمِينُ ٱلرَّبِّ صَانِعَةٌ بِبَأْسٍ.

verses.en: The right hand of the Lord is exalted: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.
verses.ar: يَمِينُ ٱلرَّبِّ مُرْتَفِعَةٌ. يَمِينُ ٱلرَّبِّ صَانِعَةٌ بِبَأْسٍ».

verses.en: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the Lord.
verses.ar: لَا أَمُوتُ بَلْ أَحْيَا وَأُحَدِّثُ بِأَعْمَالِ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: The Lord hath chastened me sore: but he hath not given me over unto death.
verses.ar: تَأْدِيبًا أَدَّبَنِي ٱلرَّبُّ، وَإِلَى ٱلْمَوْتِ لَمْ يُسْلِمْنِي.

verses.en: Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will go into them, and I will praise the Lord:
verses.ar: اِفْتَحُوا لِي أَبْوَابَ ٱلْبِرِّ. أَدْخُلْ فِيهَا وَأَحْمَدِ ٱلرَّبَّ.

verses.en: This gate of the Lord, into which the righteous shall enter.
verses.ar: هَذَا ٱلْبَابُ لِلرَّبِّ. ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِيهِ.

verses.en: I will praise thee: for thou hast heard me, and art become my salvation.
verses.ar: أَحْمَدُكَ لِأَنَّكَ ٱسْتَجَبْتَ لِي وَصِرْتَ لِي خَلَاصًا.

verses.en: The stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner.
verses.ar: ٱلْحَجَرُ ٱلَّذِي رَفَضَهُ ٱلْبَنَّاؤُونَ قَدْ صَارَ رَأْسَ ٱلزَّاوِيَةِ.

verses.en: This is the Lord’s doing; it is marvellous in our eyes.
verses.ar: مِنْ قِبَلِ ٱلرَّبِّ كَانَ هَذَا، وَهُوَ عَجِيبٌ فِي أَعْيُنِنَا.

verses.en: This is the day which the Lord hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
verses.ar: هَذَا هُوَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِي صَنَعُهُ ٱلرَّبُّ، نَبْتَهِجُ وَنَفْرَحُ فِيهِ.

verses.en: Save now, I beseech thee, O Lord: O Lord, I beseech thee, send now prosperity.
verses.ar: آهِ يَارَبُّ خَلِّصْ! آهِ يَارَبُّ أَنْقِذْ!

verses.en: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the Lord: we have blessed you out of the house of the Lord.
verses.ar: مُبَارَكٌ ٱلْآتِي بِٱسْمِ ٱلرَّبِّ. بَارَكْنَاكُمْ مِنْ بَيْتِ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: God is the Lord, which hath shewed us light: bind the sacrifice with cords, even unto the horns of the altar.
verses.ar: ٱلرَّبُّ هُوَ ٱللهُ وَقَدْ أَنَارَ لَنَا. أَوْثِقُوا ٱلذَّبِيحَةَ بِرُبُطٍ إِلَى قُرُونِ ٱلْمَذْبَحِ.

verses.en: Thou art my God, and I will praise thee: thou art my God, I will exalt thee.
verses.ar: إِلَهِي أَنْتَ فَأَحْمَدُكَ، إِلَهِي فَأَرْفَعُكَ.

verses.en: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.ar: ٱحْمَدُوا ٱلرَّبَّ لِأَنَّهُ صَالِحٌ، لِأَنَّ إِلَى ٱلْأَبَدِ رَحْمَتَهُ.

verses.en: Blessed are the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the Lord.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِلْكَامِلِينَ طَرِيقًا، ٱلسَّالِكِينَ فِي شَرِيعَةِ ٱلرَّبِّ.

verses.en: Blessed are they that keep his testimonies, and that seek him with the whole heart.
verses.ar: طُوبَى لِحَافِظِي شَهَادَاتِهِ. مِنْ كُلِّ قُلُوبِهِمْ يَطْلُبُونَهُ.

verses.en: They also do no iniquity: they walk in his ways.
verses.ar: أَيْضًا لَا يَرْتَكِبُونَ إِثْمًا. فِي طُرُقِهِ يَسْلُكُونَ.

verses.en: Thou hast commanded us to keep thy precepts diligently.
verses.ar: أَنْتَ أَوْصَيْتَ بِوَصَايَاكَ أَنْ تُحْفَظَ تَمَامًا.

verses.en: O that my ways were directed to keep thy statutes!
verses.ar: لَيْتَ طُرُقِي تُثَبَّتُ فِي حِفْظِ فَرَائِضِكَ.

verses.en: Then shall I not be ashamed, when I have respect unto all thy commandments.
verses.ar: حِينَئِذٍ لَا أَخْزَى إِذَا نَظَرْتُ إِلَى كُلِّ وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: I will praise thee with uprightness of heart, when I shall have learned thy righteous judgments.
verses.ar: أَحْمَدُكَ بِٱسْتِقَامَةِ قَلْبٍ عِنْدَ تَعَلُّمِي أَحْكَامَ عَدْلِكَ.

verses.en: I will keep thy statutes: O forsake me not utterly.
verses.ar: وَصَايَاكَ أَحْفَظُ. لَا تَتْرُكْنِي إِلَى ٱلْغَايَةِ.

verses.en: Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his way? by taking heed thereto according to thy word.
verses.ar: بِمَ يُزَكِّي ٱلشَّابُّ طَرِيقَهُ؟ بِحِفْظِهِ إِيَّاهُ حَسَبَ كَلَامِكَ.

verses.en: With my whole heart have I sought thee: O let me not wander from thy commandments.
verses.ar: بِكُلِّ قَلْبِي طَلَبْتُكَ. لَا تُضِلَّنِي عَنْ وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: Thy word have I hid in mine heart, that I might not sin against thee.
verses.ar: خَبَأْتُ كَلَامَكَ فِي قَلْبِي لِكَيْلَا أُخْطِئَ إِلَيْكَ.

verses.en: Blessed art thou, O Lord: teach me thy statutes.
verses.ar: مُبَارَكٌ أَنْتَ يَارَبُّ. عَلِّمْنِي فَرَائِضَكَ.

verses.en: With my lips have I declared all the judgments of thy mouth.
verses.ar: بِشَفَتَيَّ حَسَبْتُ كُلَّ أَحْكَامِ فَمِكَ.

verses.en: I have rejoiced in the way of thy testimonies, as much as in all riches.
verses.ar: بِطَرِيقِ شَهَادَاتِكَ فَرِحْتُ كَمَا عَلَى كُلِّ ٱلْغِنَى.

verses.en: I will meditate in thy precepts, and have respect unto thy ways.
verses.ar: بِوَصَايَاكَ أَلْهَجُ، وَأُلَاحِظُ سُبُلَكَ.

verses.en: I will delight myself in thy statutes: I will not forget thy word.
verses.ar: بِفَرَائِضِكَ أَتَلَذَّذُ. لَا أَنْسَى كَلَامَكَ.

verses.en: Deal bountifully with thy servant, that I may live, and keep thy word.
verses.ar: أَحْسِنْ إِلَى عَبْدِكَ، فَأَحْيَا وَأَحْفَظَ أَمْرَكَ.

verses.en: Open thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of thy law.
verses.ar: ٱكْشِفْ عَنْ عَيْنَيَّ فَأَرَى عَجَائِبَ مِنْ شَرِيعَتِكَ.

verses.en: I am a stranger in the earth: hide not thy commandments from me.
verses.ar: غَرِيبٌ أَنَا فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ. لَا تُخْفِ عَنِّي وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto thy judgments at all times.
verses.ar: ٱنْسَحَقَتْ نَفْسِي شَوْقًا إِلَى أَحْكَامِكَ فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ.

verses.en: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, which do err from thy commandments.
verses.ar: ٱنْتَهَرْتَ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ ٱلْمَلَاعِينَ ٱلضَّالِّينَ عَنْ وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: Remove from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept thy testimonies.
verses.ar: دَحْرِجْ عَنِّي ٱلْعَارَ وَٱلْإِهَانَةَ، لِأَنِّي حَفِظْتُ شَهَادَاتِكَ.

verses.en: Princes also did sit and speak against me: but thy servant did meditate in thy statutes.
verses.ar: جَلَسَ أَيْضًا رُؤَسَاءُ، تَقَاوَلُوا عَلَيَّ. أَمَّا عَبْدُكَ فَيُنَاجِي بِفَرَائِضِكَ.

verses.en: Thy testimonies also are my delight and my counsellors.
verses.ar: أَيْضًا شَهَادَاتُكَ هِيَ لَذَّتِي، أَهْلُ مَشُورَتِي.

verses.en: My soul cleaveth unto the dust: quicken thou me according to thy word.
verses.ar: لَصِقَتْ بِٱلتُّرَابِ نَفْسِي، فَأَحْيِنِي حَسَبَ كَلِمَتِكَ.

verses.en: I have declared my ways, and thou heardest me: teach me thy statutes.
verses.ar: قَدْ صَرَّحْتُ بِطُرُقِي فَٱسْتَجَبْتَ لِي. عَلِّمْنِي فَرَائِضَكَ.

verses.en: Make me to understand the way of thy precepts: so shall I talk of thy wondrous works.
verses.ar: طَرِيقَ وَصَايَاكَ فَهِّمْنِي، فَأُنَاجِيَ بِعَجَائِبِكَ.

verses.en: My soul melteth for heaviness: strengthen thou me according unto thy word.
verses.ar: قَطَرَتْ نَفْسِي مِنَ ٱلْحُزْنِ. أَقِمْنِي حَسَبَ كَلَامِكَ.

verses.en: Remove from me the way of lying: and grant me thy law graciously.
verses.ar: طَرِيقَ ٱلْكَذِبِ أَبْعِدْ عَنِّي، وَبِشَرِيعَتِكَ ٱرْحَمْنِي.

verses.en: I have chosen the way of truth: thy judgments have I laid before me.
verses.ar: ٱخْتَرْتُ طَرِيقَ ٱلْحَقِّ. جَعَلْتُ أَحْكَامَكَ قُدَّامِي.

verses.en: I have stuck unto thy testimonies: O Lord, put me not to shame.
verses.ar: لَصِقْتُ بِشَهَادَاتِكَ. يَارَبُّ، لَا تُخْزِنِي.

verses.en: I will run the way of thy commandments, when thou shalt enlarge my heart.
verses.ar: فِي طَرِيقِ وَصَايَاكَ أَجْرِي، لِأَنَّكَ تُرَحِّبُ قَلْبِي.

verses.en: Teach me, O Lord, the way of thy statutes; and I shall keep it unto the end.
verses.ar: عَلِّمْنِي يَارَبُّ طَرِيقَ فَرَائِضِكَ، فَأَحْفَظَهَا إِلَى ٱلنِّهَايَةِ.

verses.en: Give me understanding, and I shall keep thy law; yea, I shall observe it with my whole heart.
verses.ar: فَهِّمْنِي فَأُلَاحِظَ شَرِيعَتَكَ، وَأَحْفَظَهَا بِكُلِّ قَلْبِي.

verses.en: Make me to go in the path of thy commandments; for therein do I delight.
verses.ar: دَرِّبْنِي فِي سَبِيلِ وَصَايَاكَ، لِأَنِّي بِهِ سُرِرْتُ.

verses.en: Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.
verses.ar: أَمِلْ قَلْبِي إِلَى شَهَادَاتِكَ، لَا إِلَى ٱلْمَكْسَبِ.

verses.en: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity; and quicken thou me in thy way.
verses.ar: حَوِّلْ عَيْنَيَّ عَنِ ٱلنَّظَرِ إِلَى ٱلْبَاطِلِ. فِي طَرِيقِكَ أَحْيِنِي.

verses.en: Stablish thy word unto thy servant, who is devoted to thy fear.
verses.ar: أَقِمْ لِعَبْدِكَ قَوْلَكَ ٱلَّذِي لِمُتَّقِيكَ.

verses.en: Turn away my reproach which I fear: for thy judgments are good.
verses.ar: أَزِلْ عَارِي ٱلَّذِي حَذِرْتُ مِنْهُ، لِأَنَّ أَحْكَامَكَ طَيِّبَةٌ.

verses.en: Behold, I have longed after thy precepts: quicken me in thy righteousness.
verses.ar: هَأَنَذَا قَدِ ٱشْتَهَيْتُ وَصَايَاكَ. بِعَدْلِكَ أَحْيِنِي.

verses.en: Let thy mercies come also unto me, O Lord, even thy salvation, according to thy word.
verses.ar: لِتَأْتِنِي رَحْمَتُكَ يَارَبُّ، خَلَاصُكَ حَسَبَ قَوْلِكَ،

verses.en: So shall I have wherewith to answer him that reproacheth me: for I trust in thy word.
verses.ar: فَأُجَاوِبَ مُعَيِّرِي كَلِمَةً، لِأَنِّي ٱتَّكَلْتُ عَلَى كَلَامِكَ.

verses.en: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I have hoped in thy judgments.
verses.ar: وَلَا تَنْزِعْ مِنْ فَمِي كَلَامَ ٱلْحَقِّ كُلَّ ٱلنَّزْعِ، لِأَنِّي ٱنْتَظَرْتُ أَحْكَامَكَ.

verses.en: So shall I keep thy law continually for ever and ever.
verses.ar: فَأَحْفَظَ شَرِيعَتَكَ دَائِمًا، إِلَى ٱلدَّهْرِ وَٱلْأَبَدِ،

verses.en: And I will walk at liberty: for I seek thy precepts.
verses.ar: وَأَتَمَشَّى فِي رَحْبٍ، لِأَنِّي طَلَبْتُ وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: I will speak of thy testimonies also before kings, and will not be ashamed.
verses.ar: وَأَتَكَلَّمُ بِشَهَادَاتِكَ قُدَّامَ مُلُوكٍ وَلَا أَخْزَى،

verses.en: And I will delight myself in thy commandments, which I have loved.
verses.ar: وَأَتَلَذَّذُ بِوَصَايَاكَ ٱلَّتِي أَحْبَبْتُ.

verses.en: My hands also will I lift up unto thy commandments, which I have loved; and I will meditate in thy statutes.
verses.ar: وَأَرْفَعُ يَدَيَّ إِلَى وَصَايَاكَ ٱلَّتِي وَدِدْتُ، وَأُنَاجِي بِفَرَائِضِكَ.

verses.en: Remember the word unto thy servant, upon which thou hast caused me to hope.
verses.ar: اُذْكُرْ لِعَبْدِكَ ٱلْقَوْلَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلْتَنِي أَنْتَظِرُهُ.

verses.en: This is my comfort in my affliction: for thy word hath quickened me.
verses.ar: هَذِهِ هِيَ تَعْزِيَتِي فِي مَذَلَّتِي، لِأَنَّ قَوْلَكَ أَحْيَانِي.

verses.en: The proud have had me greatly in derision: yet have I not declined from thy law.
verses.ar: ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُونَ ٱسْتَهْزَأُوا بِي إِلَى ٱلْغَايَةِ. عَنْ شَرِيعَتِكَ لَمْ أَمِلْ.

verses.en: I remembered thy judgments of old, O Lord; and have comforted myself.
verses.ar: تَذَكَّرْتُ أَحْكَامَكَ مُنْذُ ٱلدَّهْرِ يَارَبُّ، فَتَعَزَّيْتُ.

verses.en: Horror hath taken hold upon me because of the wicked that forsake thy law.
verses.ar: ٱلْحَمِيَّةُ أَخَذَتْنِي بِسَبَبِ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ تَارِكِي شَرِيعَتِكَ.

verses.en: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.
verses.ar: تَرْنِيمَاتٍ صَارَتْ لِي فَرَائِضُكَ فِي بَيْتِ غُرْبَتِي.

verses.en: I have remembered thy name, O Lord, in the night, and have kept thy law.
verses.ar: ذَكَرْتُ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ ٱسْمَكَ يَارَبُّ، وَحَفِظْتُ شَرِيعَتَكَ.

verses.en: This I had, because I kept thy precepts.
verses.ar: هَذَا صَارَ لِي، لِأَنِّي حَفِظْتُ وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: Thou art my portion, O Lord: I have said that I would keep thy words.
verses.ar: نَصِيبِي ٱلرَّبُّ، قُلْتُ لِحِفْظِ كَلَامِكَ.

verses.en: I intreated thy favour with my whole heart: be merciful unto me according to thy word.
verses.ar: تَرَضَّيْتُ وَجْهَكَ بِكُلِّ قَلْبِي. ٱرْحَمْنِي حَسَبَ قَوْلِكَ.

verses.en: I thought on my ways, and turned my feet unto thy testimonies.
verses.ar: تَفَكَّرْتُ فِي طُرُقِي، وَرَدَدْتُ قَدَمَيَّ إِلَى شَهَادَاتِكَ.

verses.en: I made haste, and delayed not to keep thy commandments.
verses.ar: أَسْرَعْتُ وَلَمْ أَتَوَانَ لِحِفْظِ وَصَايَاكَ.

verses.en: The bands of the wicked have robbed me: but I have not forgotten thy law.
verses.ar: حِبَالُ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ ٱلْتَفَّتْ عَلَيَّ. أَمَّا شَرِيعَتُكَ فَلَمْ أَنْسَهَا.
